subject: Citizens’ Grand Jury to seek indictment of NYC District Attorney Alvin Bragg
body:
New York City District Attorney Alvin Bragg has declared war on President Trump and the American people.

| | | | | [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a821b6f02e0e400792e48d1cafd3a501&_e=-vN3agsBCJ-ZuFYIky-3z-K_SyQh6bDDsIfRfHks1CyAMosvTAoHUsHbrNhhetOjXaKl326xQEXYuxjmyJI5tCqna7juZd26i7UWUGfBsD-7Tp3NWxWa7qg2QrxoL_gypaSJDJ46RE0B6zQWAZfshLzWziVR6tMrRUk-1UQ7437nar0ibdnpIvmJyK3D-QmMEh5kCBdW5tdAqQ5oRx0fY74zOXUgEx5yuaF0n6HLRzN0PVeJMB7UxPwvGx7V342NYEDnpsAAOfaUaqWGTMxKxRN27WlQSkwE2NIVf8NlAn6GpqoQgOI19J871iXwARec)
---
| |
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a821b6f02e0e400792e48d1cafd3a501&_e=-vN3agsBCJ-ZuFYIky-3z-K_SyQh6bDDsIfRfHks1CyAMosvTAoHUsHbrNhhetOjXaKl326xQEXYuxjmyJI5tCqna7juZd26i7UWUGfBsD-7Tp3NWxWa7qg2QrxoL_gypaSJDJ46RE0B6zQWAZfshLzWziVR6tMrRUk-1UQ7436EIjzS-Vg05L76c_aQqhGOmg-A0Rq4fIS4CCq4UCim7LJFfONhZXTiNcOPTLHdD2iFxW5z7naRaqlMkD9skoXqj87T5M5IghucawXuNTjuZqvugDY9I4XqfB1EA1Anwr16kH3ggPwNGABkrqujvU7I)Dear Patriot,

New York City District Attorney Alvin Bragg has declared war on President Trump and the American people.

**Like I told you yesterday, this shocking indictment threatens the rule of law, honest elections, and the future of our country.**

What's more, what District Attorney Bragg has done is **ILLEGAL.**

So once again, Freedom Watch turns to its Citizens' Grand Jury. We're going to seek a criminal indictment against Alvin Bragg for his crime...and we're going to seek justice, peacefully and legally.

[ **Patriot, please help Freedom Watch fully fund this critically important effort with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY.** ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a821b6f02e0e400792e48d1cafd3a501&_e=-vN3agsBCJ-ZuFYIky-3z-K_SyQh6bDDsIfRfHks1CyAMosvTAoHUsHbrNhhetOjXaKl326xQEXYuxjmyJI5tCqna7juZd26i7UWUGfBsD-7Tp3NWxWa7qg2QrxoL_gypaSJDJ46RE0B6zQWAZfshLzWziVR6tMrRUk-1UQ74364020anjpGjus1IKY6RDBR7nv8hqFi-DyVhyQG3WGVaUgPnKwQkphKuFyNpAvfPmscWhQUcyh-bjPFWekOLwSdFba2uzhNUXfzFiYll3wWknro__68t007PhhygEj-Q_92z6LL9_MReXkki1gUnj_z)

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch. **

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years. You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I 'm the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime. And the only lawyer to enjoin the National Security Agency from conducting mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of American citizens. **

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and WIN.**

[ **The time to act is now. Please help us fully fund our fight against the injustice of Biden 's corrupt regime. ** ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a821b6f02e0e400792e48d1cafd3a501&_e=-vN3agsBCJ-ZuFYIky-3z-K_SyQh6bDDsIfRfHks1CyAMosvTAoHUsHbrNhhetOjXaKl326xQEXYuxjmyJI5tCqna7juZd26i7UWUGfBsD-7Tp3NWxWa7qg2QrxoL_gypaSJDJ46RE0B6zQWAZfshLzWziVR6tMrRUk-1UQ7436tV_5fS2ESeAGPEnyP70LpIRqPg9p_WkojztS3FXfd9yz2JUm9-Ltc96u3DKk7k7bCblbS6d26aTIsfvdliekK9KRiXNCCD1AF3SdesrMBmYX2hOXbUWyRLmtdtw_giSeJUuU7HVd240Y4a25QBnyB)

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, you and I can 't let George Soros-backed District Attorney Alvin Bragg get away with his illegal indictment of President Trump. **

[ **Please help Freedom Watch fight back peacefully and legally with your crucial gift of $25, $50, $100 or more right away.** ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a821b6f02e0e400792e48d1cafd3a501&_e=-vN3agsBCJ-ZuFYIky-3z-K_SyQh6bDDsIfRfHks1CyAMosvTAoHUsHbrNhhetOjXaKl326xQEXYuxjmyJI5tCqna7juZd26i7UWUGfBsD-7Tp3NWxWa7qg2QrxoL_gypaSJDJ46RE0B6zQWAZfshLzWziVR6tMrRUk-1UQ74375kKt3GxF5E9DdK9kipSp37aYaO47nU-AKIXPFV7oroz6NYYFA4mYpSmiIfD_l77uzTAJtjvQ2HuN1v-mD0s_023FgZDwCmjoIP_PuhBabNVITsy5CHLvUCLM6_mrtMhIBX9ZG4QKjgGmoATj-iBFq)

clean_body: New York City District Attorney Alvin Bragg has declared war on President Trump and the American people. | | | | | | | Patriot, New York City District Attorney Alvin Bragg has declared war on President Trump and the American people. Like I told you yesterday, this shocking indictment threatens the rule of law, honest elections, and the future of our country. What's more, what District Attorney Bragg has done is ILLEGAL. So once again, Freedom Watch turns to its Citizens' Grand Jury. We're going to seek a criminal indictment against Alvin Bragg for his crime...and we're going to seek justice, peacefully and legally. I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch. I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years. You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton. And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others. I 'm the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime. And the only lawyer to enjoin the National Security Agency from conducting mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of American citizens. I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and WIN. Sincerely, Larry Klayman Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc. P.S. Patriot, you and I can 't let George Soros-backed District Attorney Alvin Bragg get away with his illegal indictment of President Trump. Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

| Good afternoon,
On behalf of former U.S. Senator Kelly Loeffler, we are pleased to invite you to the first annual Greater Georgia Legislative Awards Ceremony.
Honored guests will include Governor Brian P. Kemp, First Lady Marty Kemp, Lt. Governor Burt Jones, and Speaker of the House Jon Burns, as well as legislative award recipients from the Georgia State House and State Senate.
Join us as we honor our conservative lawmakers and their historic efforts to promote economic prosperity, public safety, education, election integrity, and more in the 2023 legislative session.

name: Secure & Prosper

name: Sean Spicer
subject: I’m parting ways with Newsmax. Here’s what I’m up to now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR.

| |

---
| | | Hey - this is Sean Spicer:

With a heavy heart, I just announced I'm parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what's _really_ happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again.

_**[But with that in the rearview mirror, I'm thrilled at what's coming next...](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znoeh2drie5tu4gc52neib25lg86r38hnt4kepng_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpi66p32c1h2bs "But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next...")**_

---
| | | [READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z79ih5ddlmophbefpfhr305ljte259lbbg9tbat8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpi66p32c1h2bs "READ MY FULL STATEMENT")
---

The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It's an emergency situation and we're running dangerously short on time to change course.

We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024:

- Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency
- Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House
- Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement

**The Democrats aren 't going to give us an inch... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. **

Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can't outsmart us when we're the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda.

But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC.

_**[Look- if we want to win in 2024, it's going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zo875b70p0t11etfaib5lqvlsc0h7kkkjkdfo0to_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpi66p32c1h2bs "Look – if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.")**_

That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it'll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory.

We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you gave between $27 and $54, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts.

_In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we've ever seen before._

**But that 's a big "if" - it requires 100% participation. **

This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off.

So I'll cut to the chase.

_**[From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we'll make history.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zloetsmsm563ur12fbv64r10f3c67rn0t5bav9g0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpi66p32c1h2bs "From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.")**_

Are you in?

---
**[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zijdrvnrljn5da601ukftn5qovfoa287kc1i9ng0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpi66p32c1h2bs)[**YES >>**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zea3kauvcrls0de5rtpl4lisqfob8alh1dbb2teg_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpi66p32c1h2bs)_[**NO >>**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1kjpf3e41vvbnl49lgcmovdk0hvd359loj3ghf0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpi66p32c1h2bs)**
---

More from me soon,
Sean Spicer

---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3culfo4a0mph1rf5sumnj3bpsql1gs1rvjvdhao_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpi66p32c1h2bs "image")

name: Riley Gaines
subject: This left-wing intimidation campaign won’t work!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nine PAC
body:
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549698:J1Q-j4GoN:m:1:3365131770:802139EC8CEC3BA8857A854C3B687DEC:r)
---
Peter,

There is a disturbing trend on the left-- Transgender activists are increasingly emboldened to attack those who oppose them. Time after time, we watch the left enable the rhetoric and justify the violence-- **ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!** I was ambushed and assaulted by a transgender activist after speaking to a group of students at San Francisco State University. Students gathered wanting to hear the pro-woman side of the sports debate but were impeded by transgender activists, shouting, cursing, and threatening. This left-wing intimidation campaign won't work! This is only more evidence that I'm fighting the good fight, and proof that women need sex-protected spaces! I know what I'm doing is right. When they want you silent, speak louder. I'm on the frontlines fighting for women and girls and speaking TRUTH to all, even those who refuse to hear it. [**Will you step up and stand with me in this fight? body:
Thanks to all who joined us in calling for the DNC Convention to recognize the Midwest.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/c6J4HixN4iozuXCnY3yXT-8IHeTAFcYspuK5hwmfZTU=/vEsc_LxbsjtMYskdJ7zOj-uohehQVnrt6DFb0YzJcVs=?refcode=EM_FR_230411DNCChicago_TEAM_90DO_2_NG_B_Logo)
Fellow Democrats,

Exciting news! It was just announced that Chicago will host the 2024 Democratic National Convention. This is fantastic news for our state, our Party, and our nation.

The Midwest has long been vital to our Party, and this decision affirms the Midwest's importance in the 2024 elections. There is no road to keeping the Presidency, preserving our Senate majority, and taking back the House of Representatives without us, and this decision will boost our efforts to continue to build from the grassroots.

**[Now it's time to keep focused on strengthening the Democratic Party here in Illinois and across the Midwest. Will you chip in $10 or more today to help us expand the Blue Wall and show the nation why Illinois is THE cornerstone of our party's future?](https://act.myngp.com/el/c6J4HixN4iozuXCnY3yXT-8IHeTAFcYspuK5hwmfZTU=/vEsc_LxbsjtMYskdJ7zOj-uohehQVnrt6DFb0YzJcVs=?refcode=EM_FR_230411DNCChicago_TEAM_90DO_2_NG_B_L1&amount=10)**

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: I’m officially running for reelection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
I wanted to personally share the big news, friend: I’m officially launching my first reelection campaign for U.S. Senate here in Nevada!
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to split $25 between my campaign and Serve America today to become a Founding Donor and help fuel our grassroots movement to victory [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen] . But first, let me explain why your support – right now – is so important:
1.
Experts
at
FiveThirtyEight
say
that
Nevada
could
once
again
decide
Senate
control,
which
means
so
many
Democratic
priorities
hinge
on
whether
we’re
able
to
defend
this
crucial
battleground
seat.

2.
Races
in
Nevada
are
won
and
lost
by
razor-thin
margins.
The
last
Senate
race
here
came
down
to
just
7,928
votes
–
making
it
the
closest
in
the
entire
country.
Meanwhile,
we
lost
Nevada’s
governorship
by
only
1.5
points.

3.
The
Washington
Post
reports
that
I’m
one
of
the
most
vulnerable
senators
up
for
reelection
in
2024.
Now,
the
GOP
is
coming
after
me
as
a
TOP
target
for
defeat
–
and
national
Republicans
have
already
launched
their
first
wave
of
attack
ads
against
me.
With the GOP setting its sights on Nevada, we need to fight back as early as possible to win. And that means showing we have a strong team of grassroots supporters with us. That’s why we set a goal to reach 10,000 Reelection Founding Donors – and I’m counting on you to be one of them, friend:
So please, will you split $25 between my campaign and Serve America to become a Founding Donor of our first reelection campaign, win in Nevada, and defend the Senate for Democrats? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen]
Thank you so much, friend. Your support today is absolutely crucial. I’m grateful.
– Jacky Rosen

In a moment, I’m going to ask you to split $25 between my campaign and Serve America today to become a Founding Donor and help fuel our grassroots movement to victory [] . But first, let me explain why your support – right now – is so important: 1. Experts at FiveThirtyEight say that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, which means so many Democratic priorities hinge on whether we’re able to defend this crucial battleground seat. 2. Meanwhile, we lost Nevada’s governorship by only 1.5 points. 3. The Washington Post reports that I’m one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in 2024. Now, the GOP is coming after me as a TOP target for defeat – and national Republicans have already launched their first wave of attack ads against me. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: A big announcement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=147%2E35263%2EGBR7M5 ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Hi Peter — I have exciting news to share, and I wanted you to
hear it from me:

I’m officially running for reelection to the United States Senate.

I know the road ahead won’t always be easy — election experts are already
calling me one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats on the ballot next
year. But with you by my side, I know we can get this done and win big
next November.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-launch23.BP3f3F&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230412_AM1_V2_S1&t=1004&akid=147%2E35263%2EGBR7M5 ]Peter, will you help me start the first day of our reelection
in the strongest position by pitching in today?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-launch23.kLC5-H&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230412_AM1_V2_S1&t=1005&akid=147%2E35263%2EGBR7M5 ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2152?c0=tbe-em-launch23.l0WzBv&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230412_AM1_V2_S1&t=1006&akid=147%2E35263%2EGBR7M5 ]CHIP IN $25 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2153?c0=tbe-em-launch23.zrlp7O&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230412_AM1_V2_S1&t=1007&akid=147%2E35263%2EGBR7M5 ]CHIP IN $50 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2154?c0=tbe-em-launch23.xa76pe&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230412_AM1_V2_S1&t=1008&akid=147%2E35263%2EGBR7M5 ]CHIP IN $100 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2158?c0=tbe-em-launch23.Givb53&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230412_AM1_V2_S1&t=1009&akid=147%2E35263%2EGBR7M5 ]CHIP IN $250 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-launch23.BP3f3F&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230412_AM1_V2_S1&t=1010&akid=147%2E35263%2EGBR7M5 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

I’m so proud of the progress we’ve made in the Senate over the past few
years, Peter.
We’ve lowered the price of prescription drugs, addressed the climate
crisis with landmark investment in clean energy, expanded health care for
millions of our veterans, and so much more.

A highlight of my time in the Senate was when the Respect for Marriage
Act, my bipartisan bill to protect marriage equality, was signed into law
late last year. That’s a moment I will never forget.

But there’s a lot more to be done, and I’m not willing to give up the
fight to make things easier, better, safer, and stronger for hard-working
Wisconsinites.

We have to protect Social Security and Medicare for millions of
hard-working seniors who deserve the benefits they’ve spent their lives
working towards.

We need to defend voting rights and protect access to the ballot box —
we’ve seen the harmful impacts of right-wing extremists who try to deny
election results and take away Americans’ right to safely and securely
participate in elections.

And we need to re-establish protections for abortion access. After Roe v.
Wade was overturned, I was devastated and angry, and I’m sure you were
too. Wisconsin just took a huge first step in the right direction with our
Supreme Court race last week, but we still have a long way to go toward
making sure every woman has the freedom to make her own decisions no
matter what zip code she lives in.

I remain hopeful that we can do all of this — and more — together. But it
won’t be easy, especially if Republicans have it their way. Their views
are becoming more out-of-touch and dangerous by the day, and I know for
sure that they will come after my Senate seat with everything they’ve got.
They’re already spending big on misleading ads attacking my record.

But with you by my side, I know we can win. We’ve done it before,
together, and I wouldn’t want to have it any other way this time around.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-launch23.BP3f3F&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230412_AM1_V2_S1&t=1011&akid=147%2E35263%2EGBR7M5 ]Will you stand by me again and pitch in a contribution on Day One of
our campaign?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-launch23.kLC5-H&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230412_AM1_V2_S1&t=1012&akid=147%2E35263%2EGBR7M5 ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2152?c0=tbe-em-launch23.l0WzBv&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230412_AM1_V2_S1&t=1013&akid=147%2E35263%2EGBR7M5 ]CHIP IN $25 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2153?c0=tbe-em-launch23.zrlp7O&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230412_AM1_V2_S1&t=1014&akid=147%2E35263%2EGBR7M5 ]CHIP IN $50 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2154?c0=tbe-em-launch23.xa76pe&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230412_AM1_V2_S1&t=1015&akid=147%2E35263%2EGBR7M5 ]CHIP IN $100 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2158?c0=tbe-em-launch23.Givb53&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230412_AM1_V2_S1&t=1016&akid=147%2E35263%2EGBR7M5 ]CHIP IN $250 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-launch23.BP3f3F&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230412_AM1_V2_S1&t=1017&akid=147%2E35263%2EGBR7M5 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you so much, Peter. I can’t wait to see you on the
campaign trail, and I promise I’ll keep you updated on every step of this
journey. So excited for what’s in store for us.

I’m so glad to have you on this historic team.

Let’s do this.

— Tammy

P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1002&akid=147%2E35263%2EGBR7M5 ]www.tammybaldwin.com | [ mailto:INFO@tammybaldwin.com ]INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM | [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=1003&akid=147%2E35263%2EGBR7M5 ]Privacy Policy

Wisconsin just took a huge first step in the right direction with our Supreme Court race last week, but we still have a long way to go toward making sure every woman has the freedom to make her own decisions no matter what zip code she lives in. I remain hopeful that we can do all of this — and more — together. But it won’t be easy, especially if Republicans have it their way. Their views are becoming more out-of-touch and dangerous by the day, and I know for sure that they will come after my Senate seat with everything they’ve got. They’re already spending big on misleading ads attacking my record. But with you by my side, I know we can win. We’ve done it before, together, and I wouldn’t want to have it any other way this time around. [ ]Will you stand by me again and pitch in a contribution on Day One of our campaign? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]CHIP IN $10 NOW [ ]CHIP IN $25 NOW [ ]CHIP IN $50 NOW [ ]CHIP IN $100 NOW [ ]CHIP IN $250 NOW [ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT Thank you so much, Peter. I can’t wait to see you on the campaign trail, and I promise I’ll keep you updated on every step of this journey. So excited for what’s in store for us. I’m so glad to have you on this historic team. Let’s do this. — Tammy P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701 [ ]www.tammybaldwin.com | [ mailto:INFO@tammybaldwin.com ]INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM | [ ]Privacy Policy PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

Greetings!
Senator Amanda Chase will be hosting a Meet & Greet in Colonial Heights tomorrow evening, THURSDAY APRIL 13TH, at Colonial Italian Grill.
You still have time to RSVP to attend tomorrow's Meet & Greet in support of Senator Amanda Chase for re-election to the Virginia Senate. We encourage you to bring a friend.
If you'd like to financially support or help Senator Chase by pitching in to help pay for the event, you can serve as an event sponsor or purchase a ticket to the VIP Reception.
If you haven't had a chance to meet Senator Chase or funds are tight right now, attend the FREE event from 6:30-7:30pm that is open to the public. RSVP to Chris at chris@chaseforva.com. We look forward to seeing you tonight!

subject: Are you paying attention?

body:
One of the most critical deadlines of 2023 is here.

| |
---
| | | I'll be blunt.

One of the **_most critical_** deadlines of 2023 is here. If we miss this goal, you can say goodbye to our America First agenda and hello to 2 more years of Biden and Schumer's destructive plans.

**Here 's where we stand:**
\- Our border remains wide open.
\- Crime is rampant.
\- Inflation is devastating hard-working Americans.
\- Big Tech continues to censor our voices.
\- Democrats continue to assault election integrity voter laws.
\- Indoctrination in our education system remains unchecked.
\- and Pelosi just took Hakeem Jeffries on a national fundraising tour with the biggest liberal, megadonors in their elitist circles to __**DOUBLE DOWN**__ on their destructive agenda!

Are you paying attention? The cards are stacked against us, and our majority in the house is on thin ice. If Democrats keep fundraising at this pace, 2024 is already set in stone. name: BAN ASSAULT WEAPONS | Left Action
subject: Sign the petition: Demand Congress ban assault weapons IMMEDIATELY
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Sign your name: Demand Congress pass an assault weapons ban NOW >> ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T25d60c4d-aca6-4867-9df9-091708ee21cb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta7e37ece-ef6d-4b63-a236-2244f59cb62c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | In 2023, there have already been more mass shootings in this country than days this year. Time and again, our leaders fail to stand up and put a stop to these tragedies. Our country is in a constant state of mourning – enough is enough. [One meaningful way to tackle this crisis is with an assault weapons ban.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T883471cc-c531-41b7-86e5-1187f00113ed/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) The tragic shootings in recent years in Uvalde, Parkland, Las Vegas, San Bernardino, Sandy Hook, and so many more were carried out with an AR-15, a weapon designed to kill many people quickly. There is no reason for any civilian to have a weapon of war in their possession. Congress has done it before and they can do it again. The 1994 assault weapons ban passed with bipartisan support and helped prevent mass casualties until it expired ten years later. Since then, Congress has refused to act, but we can’t wait any longer. [Sign your name to demand Congress grow a spine and finally pass an assault weapons ban >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te1c5fde8-57d1-474f-8c56-d097bf11c330/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---

name: Trump News HQ

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61674370/400802913/823540626?refcode=ea.6af16aed-31d9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.6af16aed-31d9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWYxNmFlZC0zMWQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pCBVA8ARlK6QK7DsewuAgx28yUFsb7LnblNj89r8_IY=&emci=eac69ecc-f9d2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=6af16aed-31d9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
Peter — In the months since _Roe_ was overturned, election after election has made it clear that the American people SUPPORT a woman’s right to choose. **But now, abortion access is under greater threat than ever.** **A far-right federal judge recently ruled against the Food & Drug Administration's approval of the abortion pill mifepristone, a proven, safe and effective medication even when used in compliance with restrictive state laws.** **This could have devastating consequences for women across the nation.** _It’s never been more important for those of us who believe in reproductive freedom to remain united._ That’s why we’re checking in again with Team Cooper supporters to see where you stand: **[Are YOU a pro-choice voter, They’ve shown that they’ll put power ahead of morality, democracy, and the lives and wellbeing of their constituents.

| | Although it's been over one and half centuries since we paid off all our debt, in the last 50 years, the federal budget has run a surplus five times, most recently in 2001.
Today, without raising taxes on the ultra-wealthy and billionaires — or cutting defense, Veteran's benefits, Social Security, and Medicare — we would have to eliminate 85% to 100% of everything else to balance our federal checkbook. Combined with spending wisely, a good way forward is through tax reform. When the rich pay their fair share, we can raise enough revenue for the programs Americans want most. We must continue to support workers and their families and protect our national interests and security.
If our representatives listen to the American people and understand their budget priorities, these difficult decisions will become easier. As public servants, we must ascertain the people's desires and determine the best route to benefit the common good. name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16573%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Xl7Kfr%2fCnF8mnJT5DWJZkQ&sysid=1)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation’s mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16574%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=d36Uc2jmNrc8An1iU12DgQ&sysid=1)

**_Now I’ll share my story_ ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to \- is heartbreaking.

We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I’ve dealt with racism... _**I’ve even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16585%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4Im6HjvsoGqKmXZVoh1bUw&sysid=1)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I’m not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT’s efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16586%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aJGJBSeQ5KvI7IxNRRrDsA&sysid=1)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16587%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ljm1U9HyJhaJEG%2bmplQAoQ&sysid=1)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16588%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TJDa%2fE7P80RR%2bzhp0TTmQw&sysid=1)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16589%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mhzQ4Wc0SRzKKB85SZfcEg&sysid=1)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT’s events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16580%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tw3RqjbU5X9x4z9ttsm%2bwQ&sysid=1)

What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16581%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3aTrpd0UjyuhOlBD9depWA&sysid=1)

[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16596%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wQOxsIWBIMrnYxK99D7xTw&sysid=1)

[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16598%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=joTPY09%2ff4zdoYWkCVUlPg&sysid=1)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

clean_body: But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I’ll share my story ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to \- is heartbreaking. We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I’ve dealt with racism... I’ve even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I’m not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Your America News Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314 |

body:
Big problems require big solutions. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61696967/400880012/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ13B_EGR_E_20230412_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjI2MTA5NC01NmQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KUCeVcPtt8XP-YyebM7aJ0RVopYnSdXICy394jpKpsk=&emci=25261094-56d9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=26261094-56d9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)

I first ran for office because I’d studied how the system was rigged against hardworking people, and I wanted to do something about it. I’m running for re-election because while we’ve made tremendous progress together, we’ve still got some serious challenges ahead of us. The governor of Idaho just signed an extreme “abortion trafficking” bill into law — restricting residents from traveling for abortions in states where it's legal. Two Black lawmakers in Tennessee were expelled from the state House last week for peacefully protesting against gun violence following a horrific mass shooting in Nashville. Anti-LGBTQ+ legislation is popping up all over, threatening the right to health care, expression, and safety for trans, gender-nonconforming, and nonbinary people. Our judiciary system has been hijacked by the far-right, and these institutions continue to give the public more and more reason to lose trust. The latest example? I could bring up how a federal judge in Texas just ruled to reverse the FDA’s approval of mifepristone — one of the most common methods of abortion. Or, I could go with the recent revelation that Justice Clarence Thomas has been accepting undisclosed luxury trips from GOP megadonor Harlan Crow. _(Both of these examples occurred in the past week.)_ Look: I won’t sugarcoat what we’re up against. Our values and rights are under siege from powerful interests. The gun lobby. Anti-abortion radicals. Big Pharma. Fossil fuel giants. Right-wing extremists. All using their deep pockets to block change. All hoping that we’ll get so frustrated we just tune out. Yeah, right. [_**I’m going to keep doing everything in my power to stand up to these extremists and fight for the bold, systemic change we need to protect our democracy and our values. If you’re able to, please pitch in $3 **__**or anything you can to our re-election campaign to help continue this fight.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61696968/400880013/1737578033?amount=3&refcode=EMZ13B_EGR_E_20230412_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjI2MTA5NC01NmQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KUCeVcPtt8XP-YyebM7aJ0RVopYnSdXICy394jpKpsk=) | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

>
Big problems require big solutions, and I’m in this fight all the way.
We can end the filibuster, pass a national law protecting abortion rights across the country, and expand the Supreme Court to rebalance this hijacked institution and prevent more damage from being done.
We can pass my Judicial Ethics and Anti-Corruption Act to give Americans confidence that their judges are held to the highest ethical standards and are free from conflicts of interest.
We can continue mobilizing across the country and provide resources for critical local downballot races, ensuring that pro-democracy candidates are leading the charge to protect our rights and election integrity in the states.
Real change doesn't just happen because of decisions made in Washington. It happens because people all across the country get into the fight — pushing from the outside while elected officials work on the inside.
I'll keep up the fight in the Senate, but I'm counting on you to stay in the fight, too.
[_**If you believe that these are the types of fights our elected leaders should be taking on, please pitch in $3 **__**or anything you can to fuel this re-election campaign. I’m so grateful for your support.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61696981/400880026/1737578033?amount=3&refcode=EMZ13B_EGR_E_20230412_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjI2MTA5NC01NmQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KUCeVcPtt8XP-YyebM7aJ0RVopYnSdXICy394jpKpsk=)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

clean_body: Big problems require big solutions. | | | I first ran for office because I’d studied how the system was rigged against hardworking people, and I wanted to do something about it. I’m running for re-election because while we’ve made tremendous progress together, we’ve still got some serious challenges ahead of us. The governor of Idaho just signed an extreme “abortion trafficking” bill into law — restricting residents from traveling for abortions in states where it's legal. Two Black lawmakers in Tennessee were expelled from the state House last week for peacefully protesting against gun violence following a horrific mass shooting in Nashville. Anti-LGBTQ+ legislation is popping up all over, threatening the right to health care, expression, and safety for trans, gender-nonconforming, and nonbinary people. Our judiciary system has been hijacked by the far-right, and these institutions continue to give the public more and more reason to lose trust. The latest example? I could bring up how a federal judge in Texas just ruled to reverse the FDA’s approval of mifepristone — one of the most common methods of abortion. Or, I could go with the recent revelation that Justice Clarence Thomas has been accepting undisclosed luxury trips from GOP megadonor Harlan Crow. (Both of these examples occurred in the past week.) Look: I won’t sugarcoat what we’re up against. Our values and rights are under siege from powerful interests. The gun lobby. Anti-abortion radicals. Big Pharma. Fossil fuel giants. Right-wing extremists. All using their deep pockets to block change. All hoping that we’ll get so frustrated we just tune out. Yeah, right. = | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Big problems require big solutions, and I’m in this fight all the way. We can end the filibuster, pass a national law protecting abortion rights across the country, and expand the Supreme Court to rebalance this hijacked institution and prevent more damage from being done. We can pass my Judicial Ethics and Anti-Corruption Act to give Americans confidence that their judges are held to the highest ethical standards and are free from conflicts of interest. We can continue mobilizing across the country and provide resources for critical local downballot races, ensuring that pro-democracy candidates are leading the charge to protect our rights and election integrity in the states. Real change doesn't just happen because of decisions made in Washington. It happens because people all across the country get into the fight — pushing from the outside while elected officials work on the inside. I'll keep up the fight in the Senate, but I'm counting on you to stay in the fight, too. = Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for Senate All content © 2023 Warren for Senate, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Mark Lamb
subject: Life is short, that’s why I’m running the U.S. Senate [WATCH NOW]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549713:JMxE84GYN:m:1:3365131770:D7630C8C72D3EC1D9DFD0C1E427C31B7:r)
|
Peter,

My name is Mark Lamb - I'm a husband, father, God-fearing American, and proud Sheriff of Pinal County in the great state of Arizona.

**Washington needs a new Sheriff in town, which is why today I am announcing my candidacy for the United States Senate and[hope you will become one of my campaign's first official supporters.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549713:JMxE84GYN:m:1:3365131770:D7630C8C72D3EC1D9DFD0C1E427C31B7:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549713:JMxE84GYN:m:1:3365131770:D7630C8C72D3EC1D9DFD0C1E427C31B7:r)
[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549713:JMxE84GYN:m:1:3365131770:D7630C8C72D3EC1D9DFD0C1E427C31B7:r)

Our sliver of Arizona is home to more than 420,000 Americans spread out over 5,000+ square miles; the place we call home is a vast and arid sundrenched landscape that also happens to be on the frontlines of several conflicts. **Not only are we fighting a war on illegal narcotics, but we 're also simultaneously fighting an immigration battle.**

As the top law-enforcement officer in the area I'm responsible for the safety and wellbeing of every man, woman, and child who calls this place home. Unlike most of the career politicians in Washington, D.C., and in Phoenix, I know that in Pinal County, the buck stops with me - _**that 's why I take my job so seriously.**_

Like so many Americans, our family has experienced deep loss over the last couple of years. We lost our son and our one-year-old granddaughter eight days before Christmas. **There is simply no pain that compares to losing a child, let alone a grandbaby.** During my son's life, he struggled with drug addiction; he even spent time in my jail for using fentanyl.

As a result of my personal loss and the tragedy I see play out every day as Sheriff, I am hyper-aware that families across Arizona and America have been adversely affected by rising crime and drug use in our communities.

[**That is why today I 'm announcing my candidacy for the United States Senate to level up my fight for Arizona families and yours in our **nation 's Capital****.****](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549713:JMxE84GYN:m:1:3365131770:D7630C8C72D3EC1D9DFD0C1E427C31B7:r)****

[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549713:JMxE84GYN:m:1:3365131770:D7630C8C72D3EC1D9DFD0C1E427C31B7:r)

I can talk about personal responsibility all day long, but what's the point if I'm not willing to **step up and speak out** against the failure of career politicians in Washington who are too politically correct to protect us?

Not only did I have to witness my son's incarceration in one of my jails, but I have personally **carried dead bodies from our communities ' ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers.**

Each day that I get up and put my Sheriff's badge on, I remind myself that I'm no better than any man or woman who works for me; I have been - _and continue to be_ - on the front lines of the opioid epidemic and the border fight.

To find out more about my candidacy, **[sign up for our campaign emails here.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549713:JMxE84GYN:m:1:3365131770:D7630C8C72D3EC1D9DFD0C1E427C31B7:r)**

In my capacity as the Sheriff of Arizona's third most populous county, I demand excellence from myself and everyone under my command. It's our DUTY to provide protection to the people we serve, along with an unwavering commitment to the communities under our jurisdiction.

I may currently have a big job title, **but I have even more responsibility.**

**When cartel violence spills over the border into our communities, my team is responsible for holding the thugs perpetrating the crimes in our communities accountable.**

**And when domestic violence allegations are made, my team is responsible for bringing justice to the victims.**

I was raised with a deep sense of personal responsibility that has remained with me throughout my life. Today in the United States of America, it seems to me that personal responsibility has come to be seen by many as a liability rather than an asset.

**[I 'll stand up to the woke left and the weak political establishment in Washington.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549713:JMxE84GYN:m:1:3365131770:D7630C8C72D3EC1D9DFD0C1E427C31B7:r) **I'll work 24/7 to do everything in my purview to secure the southern border and provide our law enforcement officers with the resources they need to succeed as our first responders.

[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549713:JMxE84GYN:m:1:3365131770:D7630C8C72D3EC1D9DFD0C1E427C31B7:r)

As sheriff, I understand that the freedoms granted to us by the Constitution to make choices also mean the freedom to make bad choices. **That 's where personal responsibility is important.** There are times when I will have to intervene and voice objections to others in law enforcement who, despite their good intentions to control a situation or public behavior, are attempting to violate the Constitution and an individual's rights.

Benjamin Franklin famously said, _**" Those who would give up essential liberty to purchase a little temporary safety deserve neither liberty nor safety."**_

Pinal County, Arizona voters elected me to be their top enforcement official because they know that **[I'm tougher than a $2 dollar steak.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549713:JMxE84GYN:m:1:3365131770:D7630C8C72D3EC1D9DFD0C1E427C31B7:r)** Right now, Washington desperately needs someone who isn't afraid to tell it how it is or to get their hands dirty. I feel strongly that the Constitution must be protected**,a fight I will proudly continue as your next Senator in Washington.**

The voters who gave me the use of the sheriff's badge that I wear on my lapel know that the only interest I have in elected office is their safety. _**For me, my community and family are everything.**_

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549713:JMxE84GYN:m:1:3365131770:D7630C8C72D3EC1D9DFD0C1E427C31B7:r)
Sheriff Mark Lamb
Republican for U.S. Senate

[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549713:JMxE84GYN:m:1:3365131770:D7630C8C72D3EC1D9DFD0C1E427C31B7:r)

**Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549714:JMxE84GYN:m:1:3365131770:D7630C8C72D3EC1D9DFD0C1E427C31B7:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549715:JMxE84GYN:m:1:3365131770:D7630C8C72D3EC1D9DFD0C1E427C31B7:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549716:JMxE84GYN:m:1:3365131770:D7630C8C72D3EC1D9DFD0C1E427C31B7:r)

**
**

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experiences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

[ ** HELP ME FLIP ARIZONA'S SENATE SEAT RED**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549713:JMxE84GYN:m:1:3365131770:D7630C8C72D3EC1D9DFD0C1E427C31B7:r)

---

| Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
---

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: The rich and powerful don’t need more help (Los ricos y poderosos no necesitan más ayuda)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gallego for Arizona
body:
I am running for Senate because the rich and powerful don’t need more advocates in the Senate.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61680301/400816993/754863273?refcode=em_header&refcode2=e1a2f944-36d9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&contactdata=YrA0NvkUhq0ZAnkMdmNG4hvPofgvabAXSknYj1Qj6+zqfgJ1X22uugbVB1BCXyNxkDWfrbx5q0zw9kIAvWUPMw==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODQzNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWEyZjk0NC0zNmQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JC1OrCZ4sluW9uKCvQD_ySTyNtXlOrSYc43lS18wiKU=)
Peter -
I am running for Senate because the rich and powerful don’t need more advocates in the Senate.
Me postulo para el senado porque los ricos y poderosos no necesitan más personas que los defiendan en el senado.
It’s the people deciding between groceries and utilities who need help.
Son las personas que deciden entre comprar sus alimentos y pagar por servicios básicos las que necesitan ayuda.
We can argue about different ways to do the job as a Senator, but at the core of it all, if you are more likely to be meeting with the powerful than the powerless, you are doing the job wrong.
Podemos discutir sobre las diferentes formas de hacer el trabajo de senador, pero en el centro de todo, si te estas reuniendo con los ricos y poderosos en lugar de las personas que necesitan ayuda, está haciendo el trabajo mal.
I am sorry politicians like Senator Sinema have let you down.
Lamento que los políticos como la senadora Sinema los hayan defraudado.
I am going to change that.
Yo voy a cambiar eso.
But I cannot do it alone.
Pero no puedo hacerlo solo.
[**Can you please contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to my campaign for United States Senate? I would not ask if this were not so important.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61680302/400816994/-110998342?refcode2=e1a2f944-36d9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&refcode=em230412-1-ngp&contactdata=YrA0NvkUhq0ZAnkMdmNG4hvPofgvabAXSknYj1Qj6+zqfgJ1X22uugbVB1BCXyNxkDWfrbx5q0zw9kIAvWUPMw==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODQzNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWEyZjk0NC0zNmQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JC1OrCZ4sluW9uKCvQD_ySTyNtXlOrSYc43lS18wiKU=)

clean_body: I am running for Senate because the rich and powerful don’t need more advocates in the Senate. = Peter - I am running for Senate because the rich and powerful don’t need more advocates in the Senate. Me postulo para el senado porque los ricos y poderosos no necesitan más personas que los defiendan en el senado. It’s the people deciding between groceries and utilities who need help. Son las personas que deciden entre comprar sus alimentos y pagar por servicios básicos las que necesitan ayuda. We can argue about different ways to do the job as a Senator, but at the core of it all, if you are more likely to be meeting with the powerful than the powerless, you are doing the job wrong. Podemos discutir sobre las diferentes formas de hacer el trabajo de senador, pero en el centro de todo, si te estas reuniendo con los ricos y poderosos en lugar de las personas que necesitan ayuda, está haciendo el trabajo mal. I am sorry politicians like Senator Sinema have let you down. Lamento que los políticos como la senadora Sinema los hayan defraudado. I am going to change that. Yo voy a cambiar eso. But I cannot do it alone. name: Democracy Alert (via DLCC.org)
subject: Surprise, surprise
body:
Republicans are putting our democracy at risk. Again. | | |
---
| | Surprise, surprise: Republicans are putting our democracy at risk. _Again._ Their latest ploy is in Texas, where GOP state lawmakers proposed a bill that would allow the Republican secretary of state to overturn election results in _any_ county that has over a million residents. This bill targets heavily populated counties that lean Democratic and could blatantly disenfranchises voters who don’t support the Republican Party. **The GOP is putting our democracy at risk. clean_body: Republicans are putting our democracy at risk. Again. | | | | | Surprise, surprise: Republicans are putting our democracy at risk. Again. Their latest ploy is in Texas, where GOP state lawmakers proposed a bill that would allow the Republican secretary of state to overturn election results in any county that has over a million residents. This bill targets heavily populated counties that lean Democratic and could blatantly disenfranchises voters who don’t support the Republican Party. The GOP is putting our democracy at risk. They’re not interested in moving our nation forward, and that’s why we need to defeat them at the ballot box every chance we get. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | This GOP-led bill would affect six counties in Texas that President Joe Biden won in 2020 and could have serious consequences for the 2024 elections. name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: I’ll do this without apology
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
It’s time to stop complaining and actually fix the problem without apology.

| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z42v78ercl42mej0fsoi386k78896s4kqs8rvboo_rp22sh2s8i66o74cph60or2cjh2bs)
Fellow American -

Over the course of this election, I am laying my vision for an American national revival.

Here’s one promise for you: I will end the weaponization of police power in America.

Time to stop complaining and actually *fix* the problem without apology.
1. Shut down + replace the FBI
2. Shut down + replace the IRS
3. Pardon all federal defendants prosecuted based on political motives. This includes Douglass Mackey & nonviolent January 6 defendants denied due process
4. Hold Congress accountable for taxpayer $$ used as hush money for sexual harassment claims
5. Publish the Jeffrey Epstein client list: the police state can’t be weaponized to protect a select few.

Fellow American, if you agree, and want these policies debated on the main stage of the Republican Presidential Primary, then I need your help. **[Chip in $1 to build this movement toward our American revival.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zt2rh8aft7edcdvh6qjjp9fa3jipr6042i2n5qa0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cph60or2cjh2bs)**

Thanks,

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zq9qda06igotits00235efl89nh3a858hcknr8ng_rp22sh2s8i66o74cph60or2cjh2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** DONATE TODAY -> **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zoerht2bg4mt4uka9388pdtgcaml54p0n2j19eh8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cph60or2cjh2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zn9oi7g403fqvf31m7ntf5cmkf6o424ltt0aljgo_rp22sh2s8i66o74cph60or2cjh2bs)

clean_body: It’s time to stop complaining and actually fix the problem without apology. | Fellow American - Over the course of this election, I am laying my vision for an American national revival. Here’s one promise for you: I will end the weaponization of police power in America. Time to stop complaining and actually fix the problem without apology. 1. Shut down + replace the FBI 2. Shut down + replace the IRS 3. Pardon all federal defendants prosecuted based on political motives. This includes Douglass Mackey & nonviolent January 6 defendants denied due process 4. Hold Congress accountable for taxpayer $$ used as hush money for sexual harassment claims 5. Publish the Jeffrey Epstein client list: the police state can’t be weaponized to protect a select few. Fellow American, if you agree, and want these policies debated on the main stage of the Republican Presidential Primary, then I need your help. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: Tim Scott
subject: I’ve got some news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT PRESIDENTIAL EXPLORATORY COMMITTEE
body:
| |
---
| | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549016:J2Pgk4G3N:m:1:3391001263:0895746626B24D14506A57B8AEE4A1DA:r)
---
It's Tim Scott.

I'm really glad you chose to open this email so I'll cut right to the chase: **I just launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee.**
I believe in securing the border.
I believe in election integrity.
I believe in parental rights.
I believe in supporting our brave law enforcement.
**And I believe that with faith and conservative values, this country 's best days are ahead of us.**

---
| | | [SUPPORT TIM SCOTT HERE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549016:J2Pgk4G3N:m:1:3391001263:0895746626B24D14506A57B8AEE4A1DA:r "SUPPORT TIM SCOTT HERE")
---

Here's the deal, my faith is the central pillar of my life. It's what guides me through my day. Without God in my life, I would have no purpose and that's why I need your help to restore faith to our nation's values.

I can't stress enough that I can't do this alone. Polls show Americans are losing faith and if we don't take action right now, it could be gone forever. But I won't allow this and I certainly hope you will not either.

_**[So, if you agree with me that we can attain a better tomorrow and are determined to ensure the future of our country is rooted in conservative values, then I'm humbly asking you to be one of the first donors to my Presidential Exploratory Committee Fund. Can I count on you?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549016:J2Pgk4G3N:m:1:3391001263:0895746626B24D14506A57B8AEE4A1DA:r "So, if you agree with me that we can attain a better tomorrow and are determined to ensure the future of our country is rooted in conservative
values, then I’m humbly asking you to be one of the first donors to my Presidential Exploratory Committee Fund. Can I count on you?")**_

---
| | | [SUPPORT TIM SCOTT HERE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549016:J2Pgk4G3N:m:1:3391001263:0895746626B24D14506A57B8AEE4A1DA:r "SUPPORT TIM SCOTT HERE")
---

I hope to see you're with me.

God Bless,
Tim Scott

---
| | | [SUPPORT TIM SCOTT HERE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549016:J2Pgk4G3N:m:1:3391001263:0895746626B24D14506A57B8AEE4A1DA:r "SUPPORT TIM SCOTT HERE")
---

---
* * *
---
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549015:J2Pgk4G3N:m:1:3391001263:0895746626B24D14506A57B8AEE4A1DA:r)
---

I just launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee, and I couldn't be more excited to hit the ground and listen to more Americans about their concerns, worries, fears, and priorities.

But the truth is, accomplishing our goal isn't cheap. _**[So today, I'm humbly asking if you could please chip in anything you can afford to help my team and I keep trying to restore FAITH in America.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549015:J2Pgk4G3N:m:1:3391001263:0895746626B24D14506A57B8AEE4A1DA:r "So today,
I’m humbly asking if you could please chip in anything you can afford to help my team and I keep trying to restore FAITH in America.")**_ I believe our best days are ahead of us, but I can't do this alone. Are you with me?
---
| | [I'M WITH TIM SCOTT](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549014:J2Pgk4G3N:m:1:3391001263:0895746626B24D14506A57B8AEE4A1DA:r "JOIN MY TEAM")
---

I was raised in a single-parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13. **I understand the value of a dollar.**

I don't take asking for money lightly. I know that every donation made is a sacrifice, and I am forever grateful for each and every gift.

_**[I know we have been asking a lot lately, but it would mean so much if you could help us restore faith in America.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549014:J2Pgk4G3N:m:1:3391001263:0895746626B24D14506A57B8AEE4A1DA:r "I know we have been asking a lot lately, but it would mean so much if you could help us
restore faith in America.")**_

Of course, Democrats are fighting us on this. | | | | | | | Let’s Fly!John James | Use of John James’ military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. | | | | Paid for by John James for Michigan, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by John James for Congress, Inc., Mission First People Always, and the NRCC. | | | | | ICYMI News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

| | Friend,
My daughter Isabel is a gifted athlete with a lot of heart. I commend students for the time they dedicate to sports in addition to their studies—and I believe they should be celebrated. But what happens when the radical Left flips the script and allows biological men to compete against women? We all know they have a natural advantage that robs women of well-deserved victories. This isn’t rocket science; it’s a simple fact. **That’s why I’m doubling down on my stance when it comes to this issue.**
---
[](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=6d3ad1b268b145189f67ad2d49920d2f&_e=ngBh67AdmHfzYHm9UVcKwT_Xafw_sf7EwL6N9KJlFe2l8TXab4wpWzkIdJBKAhj1bSNKSN0eQi4e5CNLXJdHDvWnjUV1OVdPhwFvPQYv_FJhsYr2w93g2zI38HqNTj-2bQZ3_QBlrmuOfFYv0NlnpuWcQ2sdExiWY8AZd5dcUJQl6hG4mC-KZZ_5NQfSAg_Mv07mxAqbpmOH3bTpbQa0-9eSvsu3OekcZVnn759Z9r7zGiQ6pQ9I-7KFYU31QNcB6-ircx1U9T3tvGf3QdQ92iknk4fZt5tuxH_GhV5HUB-RsCc5s810xRaAbPaTlhwp-InzpAKm5WV6HvecmKRWKQ%3D%3D)

I want my daughter and every other young woman across the country to know that hard work does pay off. I won’t let the foolish leftist agenda seep into every corner of our nation’s workings, especially when it comes to our daughters. A bill designed to keep biological men out of girls’ and women’s sports is [headed for a House vote next week](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=6d3ad1b268b145189f67ad2d49920d2f&_e=ngBh67AdmHfzYHm9UVcKwVPPVqcACV10VxAcoSjwd7Y3lpxFkg0RF61tpPZOJMZePHzYpTPYk8j_d3bk6AdFHwCVHXAMkQ6OvMGDvEIv-VqG89cGE5GhviV0xwowp8py7OzAN3-wDowtdmP4eahaXd7CqR_8JSR_EQVRrrmtk1VPH30rhJ3xl83MSn5mPplxot5x4MHmOFE0c4GyrKrPGAwOY1DXfPfk3T7d79mjXJZ1Ha7jmbNeNv5Wo2hIg1ghOGdR7WQ9a0O4G5GHMqA18TpuGyuoF1AmygaTzfV3NCNNNb_bRTn4Tu6SB4OIdC7R). Peter, sorry to bother you again, but it looks like you still haven’t responded to my April Priorities Survey, **and I’m planning to follow up with the results of this survey in the next couple of days.**
When I first called on this powerful community to help guide my work in the months ahead, the initial response was overwhelming. **That’s why we’ve decided to re-open this survey to give you one more chance to make your voice heard – but the survey will only remain open until 11:59 p.m. tonight.**
Peter, I vow to do whatever it takes to fight for the safety and security of you and your loved ones, but I can only do this if I know where your priorities lie.
**So please, will you take 60 seconds now to respond to my April Priorities Survey? Here’s the best link to access the form:****[https://surveys.signforgood.com/LJ4NY23-priorities-0223](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61684181/400832018/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1047-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODU2ZTgwMS0zYmQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nv_GxGDqNyMaCWZeXHQQ6Zf5ad7bUZTUNjADVYpkLa8=&emci=450e1d66-76d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1856e801-3bd9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
