Peter, in a moment, I’m going to ask you to [**take my April 2023 Priorities Survey**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61684182/400832030/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1047-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODU2ZTgwMS0zYmQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nv_GxGDqNyMaCWZeXHQQ6Zf5ad7bUZTUNjADVYpkLa8=&emci=450e1d66-76d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1856e801-3bd9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504) – but first, I wanted to explain why I value your opinion so much.

I didn’t grow up with any real power or privilege. While New York’s elites catered directly to the powerful and wealthy, families like my own in Brooklyn were left out of any and all decisions.

So, when this team made history in 2018 by helping me become the first Black lawmaker ever to serve as New York’s attorney general, I vowed to never let another person feel the same way.

I created my priorities survey to connect with my base and give folks like you a platform to use your voice – **but it looks like you STILL haven’t updated your priorities with my team.**

**With the fundamental rights of millions being attacked from all sides, it is _vital_ that I know what matters most to supporters like you, Peter. That’s why I’m counting on 1,000 fearless fighters to complete my priorities survey so I know which fights are most important to the people I represent in this new political landscape.

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:

Hoosier Republican, We wanted you to be one of the first to know about our upcoming municipal candidate training — **IN IT TO WIN: Victory in Indiana's Cities & Towns **— to be held on **Saturday, June 10, 2023** , at the University of Indianapolis. We're fielding candidates across Indiana's cities and towns who will work to deliver results for Hoosiers like you. And to help them get across the finish line first on election night, we're helping skill them up with this one-day training session on all things grassroots, finance, and communications. **Be on the lookout for more details!** — Indiana Republican Party HQ

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I’m officially running for reelection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Like 133 million Americans, I know what it's like to have the label "pre-existing condition" attached to my care
#
Hi Peter — Tammy Baldwin here with some big news: **I’m officially running for reelection to the US Senate.** If you have a minute or two today, I wanted to take a moment to tell you a little more about myself, why I’m running, and why our campaign in Wisconsin is so important.
When I was a child, I was diagnosed with a serious illness and spent three months in the hospital. When I got better, my grandparents who raised me began to look for an insurance policy that would cover me in the future.
However, because of my previous illness, they couldn’t find such a policy. Not from _any_ insurer. Not at _any_ price. They had to pay for my health care out of pocket — and they had to make enormous sacrifices to do so — all because I was a child who had been labeled with those words: **“pre-existing condition.”**
Peter, I got into public service because I saw my grandparents stay up late at night, worried sick that I would fall ill again and they wouldn't be able to afford my care. No one should ever have to go through that.
**Like 133 million Americans, I know what it's like to have the label "pre-existing condition" attached to my care — and before the _Affordable Care Act_ was passed, many of us could be denied coverage.**
Today, insurance companies can no longer discriminate against someone based on their pre-existing condition. I championed that health reform and fought to allow young people to stay on their parent’s insurance plans up to age 26. These policy changes have led to millions more Americans getting the health insurance they need.
So, you can imagine my frustration whenever Republicans launch a new attack on our health care or threaten protections for folks with pre-existing conditions. **And if Mitch McConnell and his Republican mega-donors flip my seat in Wisconsin and take hold of the Senate majority next election, countless Americans could find themselves in a place where insurance companies, once again, write all the rules.**
I’ll never back down, Peter, but we’ve got a tough fight ahead of us to protect this seat, so I’ll need your support every step of the way.
**[Will you split a donation today between my reelection campaign in Wisconsin and Senator Durbin's campaign? I’ll never stop fighting to ensure every American has access to quality, affordable health care — regardless of whether or not they have a pre-existing condition — and it’d mean a lot to me to have your support in that fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61685224/400836542/-123309401?refcode=dd_em_230412_1_t1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDFiYzNiNC0zY2Q5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zfkZGCO7ySJyiYLCaKr7v97Ql4p68MCBkRDGAq-8nx4=)**

clean_body: Like 133 million Americans, I know what it's like to have the label "pre-existing condition" attached to my care Hi Peter — Tammy Baldwin here with some big news: I’m officially running for reelection to the US Senate. If you have a minute or two today, I wanted to take a moment to tell you a little more about myself, why I’m running, and why our campaign in Wisconsin is so important. When I was a child, I was diagnosed with a serious illness and spent three months in the hospital. When I got better, my grandparents who raised me began to look for an insurance policy that would cover me in the future. However, because of my previous illness, they couldn’t find such a policy. Not from any insurer. Not at any price. They had to pay for my health care out of pocket — and they had to make enormous sacrifices to do so — all because I was a child who had been labeled with those words: “pre-existing condition.” Peter, I got into public service because I saw my grandparents stay up late at night, worried sick that I would fall ill again and they wouldn't be able to afford my care. No one should ever have to go through that. Like 133 million Americans, I know what it's like to have the label "pre-existing condition" attached to my care — and before the Affordable Care Act was passed, many of us could be denied coverage. Today, insurance companies can no longer discriminate against someone based on their pre-existing condition. I championed that health reform and fought to allow young people to stay on their parent’s insurance plans up to age 26. These policy changes have led to millions more Americans getting the health insurance they need. So, you can imagine my frustration whenever Republicans launch a new attack on our health care or threaten protections for folks with pre-existing conditions. And if Mitch McConnell and his Republican mega-donors flip my seat in Wisconsin and take hold of the Senate majority next election, countless Americans could find themselves in a place where insurance companies, once again, write all the rules. I’ll never back down, Peter, but we’ve got a tough fight ahead of us to protect this seat, so I’ll need your support every step of the way. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically split between Tammy Baldwin and Dick Durbin: = = = = = = I am not going to let anyone make me forget where I came from or why I got into public service in the first place. My own personal experience has always inspired my work to do everything I can to make sure that every American has quality, affordable health care coverage, and stand up against those who want to take it away. Thank you for reading, and thanks for your support today. — Tammy ** ****=**** Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

Mike Lawler is a Republican running for reelection in New York’s 17th Congressional District. clean_body: | | | | Take our survey. | Hi there Peter, As part of my work representing the people of this area, I am conducting a survey to better understand how to shape the future of our nation. Your feedback is incredibly valuable to me and will help inform my plans for shaping the future of our country. | Sincerely, Mike Lawler Congressman (NY-17) | | Mike Lawler is a Republican running for reelection in New York’s 17th Congressional District. He is passionate about standing with law enforcement and making our communities more safe, protecting Social Security and Medicare, fixing our crumbling roads and bridges, and restoring the SALT deduction to lower taxes and make New York more affordable. | | USE THE ADDRESS BELOW TO CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK LAWLER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 87 SOUTH SALEM, NY 10590 GET YOUR MIKE LAWLER, NO CUOMO MERCH No New Yorker wants to call our Tappan Zee Bridge the “Governor Mario M. Cuomo Bridge”. Proudly send the message that you want the bridge restored as the Tappan Zee. | Are you interested in staying up-to-date on Mike Lawler's reelection battle? Don't miss out on the latest news and updates from his campaign! By texting "Lawler" to 85007, you can receive regular updates on Mike's campaign, upcoming events, and important news about the race. Text "Lawler" to 85007 today and join the fight for a brighter future for New York!_ Do you know someone who would be interested in supporting Mike Lawler’s reelection campaign for Congress? Don't keep it to yourself! Spread the word and remind your friends and family to join the fight for America’s future. Simply forward this message to five of your friends or family members who you think would be interested in staying up-to-date with Mike's campaign. FORWARD THIS EMAIL As we get closer to the 2024 election, Mike Lawler is more motivated than ever to continue our journey toward a better future for all New Yorkers. To stay up-to-date with our latest news and events, we encourage you to text "Lawler" to 85007 and follow us on social media, where we share updates, thoughts, and news about our progress. You can also opt others in by providing their email address and we will send them regular updates and important news about the campaign. | go.txting.io/7jAGfc Let's work together to ensure that Mike Lawler has the support he needs to make a real difference for New York! | | | | | Lawler For Congress | PO Box 87, South Salem, NY 10590 \- =

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: How we’re taking on Fox News and Tucker Carlson
body:
It’s time for a new plan.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=844%2E120351%2ENZ0Bxr)
Peter — America is stuck in a dangerous information crisis.
**Fox News. Breitbart. Tucker Carlson.** Powerful right-wing engines of misinformation are endlessly spreading lies and hate.
**Here at Courier Newsroom, we’re fighting back by** **building the largest left-leaning network of local newsrooms in America.**
[**But to go toe to toe with the likes of Fox News, we need your help. Right now, we’re working to raise $9,000 by April 15 to power our newsrooms and ramp up our fight against bad information. So we’re asking: will you chip in $5 now?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3658?refcode=em-20230412&t=2&akid=844%2E120351%2ENZ0Bxr)
So, why is our media landscape so broken?
First, quality local newsrooms are disappearing.
Second, powerful right-wing interests are running mass disinformation campaigns 24/7 across every platform possible — sowing doubt, inflaming divisions, and causing political violence like we saw on January 6th.
If you feel like we’re at a perilous crossroads, you’re not alone.
**On cable news, social media, and even the dark web, right-wing bad actors keep doubling down on propaganda and lies.** Without viable alternatives, millions of Americans find themselves trapped in an echo chamber of bad information and fake news.
**That’s where we come in.**
At Courier Newsroom, we neutralize bad information by reporting factual, relevant local news stories, delivered directly to those who need it most.
We already have local newsrooms in 8 battleground states staffed by real journalists who live in the communities we serve, and we’re ready to expand our network.
To do that, we need your help to spread the word about the great reporting published by our talented team of journalists every day. **We know that the best antidote to disinformation is more good information** , and that’s what our newsrooms take pride in delivering at Courier Newsroom.
**Now, here’s where you come in.** We’re only able to offer free, accessible local news because grassroots supporters like you chip in what they can, when they can.
[**We’ve set a mid-month goal of raising $9,000 to grow our network of left-leaning local newsrooms and fight back against dangerous lies and disinformation. We’re running short on time though, so can we count on your $5 now to get us there?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3658?refcode=em-20230412&t=3&akid=844%2E120351%2ENZ0Bxr)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3658?refcode=em-20230412&t=4&akid=844%2E120351%2ENZ0Bxr)**
Thank you,
The Courier Newsroom Team

**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=844_120351_NZ0Bxr&akid=844%2E120351%2ENZ0Bxr)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=844%2E120351%2ENZ0Bxr)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

body:
Joe Biden’s Green New Deal initiative only works if you’re feeling pain at the pump.

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zeip5etmphehvjjskns8ja1dhbrdv8g7lsuf0muo_rp22sh2s8i66o74cph6ap34cth2bs)
---
Co-Pilot, _**YOUR pain**_**is Joe Biden’s plan.** Joe Biden’s Green New Deal initiative only works if you’re feeling pain at the pump.
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zov0ug07f3ioa0os0vfsa8mn5r8jaif2i0hnhlqo_rp22sh2s8i66o74cph6ap34cth2bs)
---
[**WATCH THE INTERVIEW**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmq8t7s6514o5smfspjjht10c8u5bl04f94cieh8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cph6ap34cth2bs)
---
He’s laser-focused on the Green New Deal because he cares more about retaining power than lowering prices to help you and your family. _**_[I AGREE >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6ckuao8b67dud227jmibip8sihfki1immq4m6kg_rp22sh2s8i66o74cph6ap34cth2bs)_**_ And while Joe Biden depletes our strategic oil reserve, China’s _continually_ building theirs up.
---
[**PROTECT AMERICA’S INTERESTS**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrj327qf4mm8tb1pa2r882rvl9ctmq171o344ggg_rp22sh2s8i66o74cph6ap34cth2bs)
---
**Co-Pilot, on the national security front, one of the first things we need to do is change China’s status as a “third-world country” to prevent them from receiving trade and tax benefits. Then, we need to bring our critical mineral supply chain back home to America.** **_Of course, Democrats are fighting us on this._** _**_[Chip in now to show Joe Biden and the Democrats you want to strengthen America’s national security efforts, hold China accountable, and protect our critical mineral supply chain.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zav50te4lmnhvr6re257fu6cc7jccecbcbh5imm8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cph6ap34cth2bs)_**_

body:
| | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549092:JvN2r4G0N:m:1:3331421248:5B66A611D20B3259C5F15A018FB47EF7:r)

| | We are heartbroken to announce that** Sgt. Daniel Perry has been found guilty**, leaving his family and all of us in shock. Despite this devastating news, we refuse to give up. We believe in Daniel's innocence and are determined to fight for justice. A strong appeal can turn the tide in his favor, but we need your help. Your generous support will not only fund Daniel's legal appeal but also help us raise awareness about his case. Together, we can make a difference in his fight for justice. **As Tucker notes in his segment, the Austin Police concluded it was a justified act of self-defense!** Please join us in supporting Daniel and his family during this challenging time. Pray for them and consider making a contribution to the cause. Don't wait - every dollar and prayer counts. Dig deep for Daniel and stand with us in the fight for justice. **Don 't Let Black Lives Matter Murder This Soldier!** In July, 2020 in Austin, Texas, a Black Lives Matter maniac started to point his AK-47 rifle at Army Sergeant Daniel Perry. **Sergeant Perry responded immediately, firing in self-defense with his legally carried revolver, and stopped his attacker.** Then another member of the rabid BLM mob tried to murder Perry, firing four times at him, striking his car with three bullets. But a George Soros-backed district attorney targeted Daniel - and now the verdict :( **Please don 't let that leftist prosecutor finish the job that Black Lives Matter started -- save Sergeant Perry's life by fully funding his critically important legal defense with your crucial gift of any amount NOW!**

|

Peter,

From the Russia Hoax to multiple failed investigations and impeachments, to the latest legal actions from NYC, the left has been trying to destroy Donald Trump every day since 2015.

**But today, the stakes just got higher ... **

That's because the same District Attorney who is using his prosecutorial power to destroy Joe Biden's likely opponent **HAS JUST SUED ME!**

**He wants to intimidate us!**

That's right - instead of fighting actual crime in New York City, **Alvin Bragg appears to be using federal tax dollars to target Trump.** And now he's targeting me!

But what Bragg or other Soros-backed liberals might not know about me: I've squared off against MUCH bigger and tougher opponents in my career. I didn't back down then...and I'm not backing down now!

[**HELP ME FIGHT THE LEFT'S POLITICAL TARGETING
CHIP IN A COUPLE DOLLARS TODAY»» **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62551245:JbiOr4GAN:m:1:3365131770:90767915501384222C98AE4BC1BBF862:r)
This lawsuit shows me one thing: **Alvin Bragg doesn 't think the Constitution applies to those who use their position to target political opponents on the right!**

He's wrong! And **[with your help](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62551245:JbiOr4GAN:m:1:3365131770:90767915501384222C98AE4BC1BBF862:r)** , I'll fight his bogus lawsuit with everything I've got!

[**LET ME KNOW YOU'RE WITH ME » »**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62551245:JbiOr4GAN:m:1:3365131770:90767915501384222C98AE4BC1BBF862:r)

We will not be intimidated. We will not be deterred. We will not be stopped from doing our job on behalf of the American people, **no matter what.**

God Bless,
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62551245:JbiOr4GAN:m:1:3365131770:90767915501384222C98AE4BC1BBF862:r)
Jim Jordan

P.S. Our legal battle could become extremely costly, draining the resources we have earmarked toward helping us hold onto our majority in next year's election, which is why I'm asking for your financial support today. **[Will you kindly chip-in right now to help ensure we're able to mount the best possible defense against this purely political lawsuit?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62551245:JbiOr4GAN:m:1:3365131770:90767915501384222C98AE4BC1BBF862:r)**

**About Jim Jordan:** | Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: I wanted you to be one of the first to hear, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Hi friend,
This morning, I announced that I'm once again running to represent Arizona's sixth district in Congress!
I'm in this race to stand up for our rights, our environment, and our working families. We lost by a razor-thin margin last year, but this fight isn't over.
Will you become a Founding Donor and help me build a winning campaign by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_041223_FoundingDonor]
Become a Founding Donor [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_041223_FoundingDonor]
I got started in public service after volunteering at my daughter's school. I saw first-hand how the state legislature's decision to cut public school funding risked our children's future. It made me angry — so I took action.
I spent years in the Arizona state legislature fighting for education funding, environmental regulations, women's rights, and more. I'm proud of the work I got done, but I knew there was more to do.
I ran for Congress last term to help build a better Arizona. Our campaign outperformed all expectations, and we lost by one of the smallest margins in the country.
Now, it's time to get back to work.
Republicans like Juan Ciscomani are focused on rolling back women’s rights, ignoring climate change, and putting big corporations ahead of working families.
I'm going to focus on common-sense solutions that actually help folks back in Arizona.
I know that together, we can win this race in 2024. Will you help us by becoming a Founding Donor? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_041223_FoundingDonor]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=X_041223_FoundingDonor_25]
Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=X_041223_FoundingDonor_100]
Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=X_041223_FoundingDonor_250]
Donate $1500 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?express_lane=true&amount=1500&refcode=X_041223_FoundingDonor_1500]
Donate other [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?express_lane_other=true&refcode=X_041223_FoundingDonor_other]
Thank you!
— Kirsten
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_041223_FoundingDonor [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_041223_FoundingDonor]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_041223_FoundingDonor [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_041223_FoundingDonor] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer.
She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_041223_FoundingDonor]

name: Bill Spadea
subject: Woke corporations are a JOKE
body:
It stifles free speech and encourages self-censorship out of fear...and IT HAS TO STOP.
|
---
| We live in a world where biological males are being given corporate sponsorships to promote menstrual products. And sports bras. Where's the common sense? Bill Spadea here, and if you're as disturbed by the far left's twisted assault on reality, I URGE YOU to join me in the battle to restore rationality to our state and nation. **[Today, we've opened up some additional spots in our Common Sense Club for those who are sick and tired of the woke culture being constantly forced upon us. These spots are for those who want stand up and defend the principles that America was built on.](https://xtz223.keap-link017.com/v2/click/b35bd084b80015691eff2b58e08c600f/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnMWPtSj2FiIhVoeocyw65ZauyzpmH_jfWys6FXSded5neOcOhEooSnLgcKEbYyE4YDCTWqKiqFYksueWjUdBGDhQSnWam7rVwO9fwx9gGE8nNkJXjZbYrGdRmqzmu0WySi2ohbEn_tJM_PCjiZezZAF9_9OLlaT4bNUNcDItDn1yaTvR1pSWL4h0wz2v6zr3WEtFBe7loSDms9DN6srDSsjSioTWqPL3D1K8vnT9A4piZLQ=)**
---
| **ENOUGH IS ENOUGH.** Woke capitalism is all about pushing the far left's propaganda in an attempt to be trendy and make a quick buck. **It's dangerous because at it's core, anything woke is NOT about being open-minded; it's about forcing everyone to think the same way.** And when people stop thinking for themselves, well, that's when we lose what makes us great. We believe in a society built on merit, where individuals are judged by their abilities, work ethic, and contributions, rather than superficial identity markers. Together, we can stand against the dangers of woke culture and woke capitalism. We can preserve the values that have made our nation great and ensure that future generations inherit a country where the principles of freedom, opportunity, and unity continue to flourish.

# [Join the Common Sense Club today, and make your stance known.](https://xtz223.keap-link017.com/v2/click/ef5e420ea90915053711ec49dcfb70ae/eJyNkMsOgkAMRf-layIy-GRHCCEEdGF0bSZQZRSGyVBFJfy74yOuNHHbnnua2w4IJZcU5-DBhW6MuWCBxkwogZKCWhLPnls2HjmuY0Ep5DHS9UmB130Nf4DHeDaZW0BXhYZYr_wgiZfRNo2XiQEV1-bEX5rp0P1owoUfp9D3P71YCQrPRt2AR_qEjz65MJ1oo0vDF0Sq8Wy7bdvBoRaSCtyJfUFsyNxBVlc2VlyURsSVQpm_f5Dg9aXr75AfZLs=)
**There are millions Americans that will not conform, are you one of them?** Bill Spadea

| Peter,

Yesterday, we officially launched our campaign for Congress.

I’m so grateful for all of the support and words of encouragement we’ve already received–but the work has only just begun.

[_**If you haven’t seen it yet, will you watch my campaign’s launch video and chip in whatever you can today to ensure our campaign gets off to a strong start?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61688584/400849207/1270207298?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20230412-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzcwOGI3ZS00M2Q5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M6PDAQ1G6EzSa-uEt1qduVOaJw2Gm-CJD_kh5yxnwmY=)

Politics-as-usual isn’t working. We need change–new leadership and new voices in Congress. We need a politics that prioritizes everyday people over corporate profits.

But House Republicans like Marc Molinaro already ripped away a woman’s right to make her own healthcare decisions, and now they’re threatening to rip away seniors’ right to retire with dignity. Upstate New York deserves better, and I’m ready to deliver.

This campaign won’t be easy. Last year, Republican Super PACs spent over $6 million in negative attack ads against me, and you can bet they’re going to do the same this time around.

Peter, I don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, so I’m relying on committed supporters like you to help power this campaign and fight back against the attacks sure to come our way.

[_**Will you watch our launch video and contribute any amount today? The funds we raise early on will send a strong message about the strength of our campaign, so let’s make a loud statement here.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61688587/400849210/1270207298?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20230412-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzcwOGI3ZS00M2Q5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M6PDAQ1G6EzSa-uEt1qduVOaJw2Gm-CJD_kh5yxnwmY=)

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: We’re leading boldly
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BUILDING BRIDGES PAC Building Bridges PAC
body:
And we’re not stopping our progress now. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61688758/400849922/-2128640666?refcode=EM_FR_230412elle_N_GW_90DO_6_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzcvMS85MDA5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODM4OWU5MS00M2Q5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eXSBbNImM5gHHP8vbKT151E8X6t6qRYNdGBONMtD4Wg=)
---
I’ve led our state through tough times – the pandemic, climate emergencies, the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ , and more. And one thing I’ve learned is that smart, determined leadership matters. That’s why we’re wasting no time passing good legislation that will help the people of Michigan.

We flipped both chambers – it’s only happened four times in 130 years in Michigan. And with that comes an immense responsibility to show that when Democrats lead, we make people’s lives better.

Just this year, we’ve been able to cut costs for hard-working Michiganders and put money back into their pockets, reaffirm and defend the right to abortion, expand worker’s rights and LGBTQ+ rights, make progress on gun safety legislation, and so much more.

**_We’ve done all of this with your support, and we’re not stopping our progress now._**

**[If you’re ready to help keep our progress going and move Michigan forward, I’m asking you to pitch in $5 today to defend and expand our majorities in the House and Senate. Together, we can keep getting things name: Coach Tuberville
subject: My response to Chuck Schumer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
This is a fight for what’s right and just. Read more >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/2c660766b6b06e7c/0ed53f1561a74ad1c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Peter,

You’ve likely seen the headlines. Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer has gone on the attack in recent weeks, coming after me for taking a stand for life and the rule of law.

For me, this fight is about principle. It’s not about politics.

**When the Biden administration moved to expand taxpayer-funded abortion in our U.S. military, beyond what is allowed under federal law, I was compelled to take action and speak out for what’s right and just.** For months, our questions went unanswered. Putting a hold on the confirmation of Pentagon nominations and promotions has been necessary to bring attention to this important issue.

We’ve done just that. The American people are speaking out.

_I’m calling on Chuck Schumer to come to the table and I WILL NOT LET UP._

As much as Chuck Schumer wants to lambast me, I have not met or spoken with him once on this issue. This is a guy who likes to talk the talk about cooperation – but he refuses to discuss this with us. He’s decided to grandstand to his pro-abortion far-left base rather than hear me out and understand where we’re coming from.

**My door is open, Senator Schumer. Swing by and hear why this issue is so important.**

I’m grateful for all the support we’ve received in recent weeks. It’s been a huge help in our efforts to set the record straight on this issue.

[**I hope you’ll consider helping too, by making a secure contribution to stand with me.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/2c660766b6b06e7c/9f043138e127ad75c3d6b838967d376c/33013)

Sincerely,
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/2c660766b6b06e7c/2e634d66d1b2b72cc3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Coach Tommy Tuberville
United States Senator – Alabama

| | | | | Peter, **Clarence Thomas is morally, intellectually and emotionally unfit to be a Supreme Court Justice.** __It's long been clear, from accusations of sexual harassment during and since Anita Hill to his cozy retreats with the Kochs, lack of understanding of our Constitution, statements to clerks that his mission was to "make liberals miserable" and refusal to recuse from cases involving sedition by his wife, Ginni.__ _Yet, it gets...worse. _**Harlan Crow, Texas billionaire who finances Republicans, has been taking Clarence & Ginni on extravagant yacht excursions and ultra-luxurious trips for years. One trip to Indonesia--one trip!--cost Crow $500,000! None of this was EVER reported in Thomas' financial disclosures, while Crow and affiliated orgs have had cases before the Supreme Court.** **_Also, I almost forgot, Crow has a Hitler fetish.__He owns two of The Fuhrer's paintings, a signed copy of Mein Kampf, Hitler's teapot with his engraved initials and a set of Nazi table linen. Crow proudly shows off these items._** _So, to be clear,_** Thomas has taken millions of dollars in undisclosed trips from a Nazi lover who has business before his court. Ya know, normal stuff!** **_Thomas must be impeached._**_ But, we don't have the numbers in Congress right now._ [**_So, Demand Justice is fighting to add members to The Court to dilute his power._** **_Will you join us in fighting a corrupt extremist bought & paid for by a Hitler fetishist by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Demand Justice?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcca74dec-555c-4f07-9b90-bf5ead88af7e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for fighting to take corruption and hate out of our courts._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Bob Casey
subject: These are more than words to me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Once again I am asking for the honor of your trust. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61689740/400853519/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzIyYTM3MC00NWQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CVzwlbW8EXd14TrELTXWDhlxnSZc8_AXvPv-3R0U6Ls=&emci=d4895a9b-a7d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=5722a370-45d9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=8943725) _**"All public service is a trust, given in faith and accepted in honor.” **_ Peter, those are the words inscribed over the front door of the Finance Building in Harrisburg, where I began my public service as PA’s Auditor General. **But they’re so much more than words to me. ** One thing you might not know about me is that my wife, Terese, and I raised our four daughters in the same community where I grew up — my hometown of Scranton, PA. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61689741/400853520/1741763270?refcode=em20230412-1-ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzIyYTM3MC00NWQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CVzwlbW8EXd14TrELTXWDhlxnSZc8_AXvPv-3R0U6Ls=) _Our family at home in Scranton (2003)_ Pennsylvania has been and always will be my home. If there is anything I've learned from serving my home state, it’s that PA’s hardworking people need an actual champion in Washington — which brings me back to those words. _**All public service is a trust, given in faith.**_ As your Senator, I am reminded every day that you have put your trust in me to fight for what’s right. _**And accepted in honor.**_ I work to earn that trust by standing up for you and your families: against Republican attacks on Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid; against tax cuts for the ultra-rich; against countries like China that threaten our jobs with unfair trade practices; and against big health care companies raising costs for the middle class. Peter, my record as Senator makes it clear who I’m fighting for in Washington. But there’s still more work to cut through the gridlock, stand up to powerful special interests, and make the lives of hardworking Pennsylvanians a little bit easier. And the stakes are too high to sit out this election. That’s why I am once again asking for the honor of your trust: **[I’m running for re-election because I want to continue to fight for you and your family in the Senate. Our 2024 re-election fight promises to be among the most expensive and competitive Senate races in the country. I will do whatever it takes to defend this seat and our Democratic Majority — and I’m asking you to make your first founding donation to fuel the fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61689742/400853521/1741763270?refcode=em20230412-1-ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzIyYTM3MC00NWQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CVzwlbW8EXd14TrELTXWDhlxnSZc8_AXvPv-3R0U6Ls=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, we'll process your donation to Bob Casey immediately:_ | | [**$5**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61689743/400853522/1741763270?refcode=em20230412-1-ngp&express_lane=true&amount=5&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzIyYTM3MC00NWQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CVzwlbW8EXd14TrELTXWDhlxnSZc8_AXvPv-3R0U6Ls=)

clean_body: Once again I am asking for the honor of your trust. "All public service is a trust, given in faith and accepted in honor.” Peter, those are the words inscribed over the front door of the Finance Building in Harrisburg, where I began my public service as PA’s Auditor General. But they’re so much more than words to me. One thing you might not know about me is that my wife, Terese, and I raised our four daughters in the same community where I grew up — my hometown of Scranton, PA. = Our family at home in Scranton (2003) Pennsylvania has been and always will be my home. If there is anything I've learned from serving my home state, it’s that PA’s hardworking people need an actual champion in Washington — which brings me back to those words. All public service is a trust, given in faith. As your Senator, I am reminded every day that you have put your trust in me to fight for what’s right. And accepted in honor. I work to earn that trust by standing up for you and your families: against Republican attacks on Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid; against tax cuts for the ultra-rich; against countries like China that threaten our jobs with unfair trade practices; and against big health care companies raising costs for the middle class. Peter, my record as Senator makes it clear who I’m fighting for in Washington. But there’s still more work to cut through the gridlock, stand up to powerful special interests, and make the lives of hardworking Pennsylvanians a little bit easier. And the stakes are too high to sit out this election. That’s why I am once again asking for the honor of your trust: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, we'll process your donation to Bob Casey immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for being part of our team. With gratitude, Bob Casey PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC. Bob Casey for Senate PO Box 58746 Philadelphia, PA 19102 United States

---

I just launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee, and I couldn't be more excited to hit the ground and listen to more Americans about their concerns, worries, fears, and priorities.

But the truth is, accomplishing our goal isn't cheap. _**[So today, I'm humbly asking if you could please chip in anything you can afford to help my team and I keep trying to restore FAITH in America.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549275:6QKwm4GpN:m:1:3365131770:B0557372E8067BE2F91A268D1A2E638F:r "So today,
I’m humbly asking if you could please chip in anything you can afford to help my team and I keep trying to restore FAITH in America.")**_ I believe our best days are ahead of us, but I can't do this alone. Are you with me?
---
| | [I'M WITH TIM SCOTT](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549274:6QKwm4GpN:m:1:3365131770:B0557372E8067BE2F91A268D1A2E638F:r "JOIN MY TEAM")
---

I was raised in a single-parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13. **I understand the value of a dollar.**

I don't take asking for money lightly. I know that every donation made is a sacrifice, and I am forever grateful for each and every gift.

_**[I know we have been asking a lot lately, but it would mean so much if you could help us restore faith in America.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549274:6QKwm4GpN:m:1:3365131770:B0557372E8067BE2F91A268D1A2E638F:r "I know we have been asking a lot lately, but it would mean so much if you could help us
restore faith in America.")**_

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8598?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230412_FR_Nashville_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Nashville&t=1009&akid=4193%2E5885482%2Ehd-ZTq ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

You’ve likely only heard of Rep. Justin
Jones recently for being one of the Tennessee Three, targeted by the right
wing for standing with the people to demand basic gun reform, but Our
Revolution has been with him from the beginning.

In the Washington Post image above, you'll find Justin Jones right next to
Our Revolution Nashville Leader Brenda Ross and Our Revolution-endorsed
Nashville Metro Council member Zulfat Suara — who just voted to reinstate
Justin Jones to the Tennessee legislature!

Justin went from a community activist speaking at our 2020 Nashville
training to a national hero, and Our Revolution is doing everything in our
power to invest in the kind of organizing that enables and empowers more
heroes like Justin Jones in cities across America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8599?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230412_FR_Nashville_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Nashville&t=1010&akid=4193%2E5885482%2Ehd-ZTq ]Republicans are testing their worst authoritarian instincts on the city
and state levels, and Our Revolution is building a bench of strong leaders
like Justin Jones to fight back. Chip in here to help us elect a new
generation of progressive leaders from coast to coast!

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to
Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8598?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230412_FR_Nashville_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Nashville&t=1017&akid=4193%2E5885482%2Ehd-ZTq ][IMG]

Our Revolution delivered the organizing and messaging support to help
progressives score huge wins over the establishment in Chicago and St.
Louis last week, and that's only the beginning. We are now taking that
momentum to Philly, Pittsburgh, and beyond.

Zulfa Suara wasn't the only Nashville Metro Council member we elected who
was able to counter Republican extremism and restore Justin Jones to the
House. We also helped elect Nashville Metro Council members Emily Benedict
and Delishia Porterfield, who joined us on Monday's national live
organizing call.

On the call, Delishia laid out the stakes and the work ahead, saying,
"Today was a really good day for democracy in Tennessee, but the fight is
not over. Watch what's happening in Tennessee; if it's happening here,
it's coming to your state. We're asking people to invest in organizing
infrastructure, support the good candidates, the nonprofits, and activists
doing this work because without us working together, they're going to try
to take over our state, and I'll be damned if it happens on my watch."

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8599?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230412_FR_Nashville_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Nashville&t=1018&akid=4193%2E5885482%2Ehd-ZTq ]Please help us build progressive power across America before it's too

organizing and stick together, we're going to win!

When we organize, we win.
Our Revolution

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I'm officially running for reelection -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi there — Senator Tammy Baldwin here! **[In a moment, I’m going to ask you to split a donation between my campaign for Senate in 2024 and the DSCC.](https://go.dscc.org/go/12735?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230412-TammyBaldwin-BaldwinTandem1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230412-TammyBaldwin-BaldwinTandem1-Pros-sl1&akid=10440%2E9716520%2ECKHKRG)** But first, I hope you will give me a chance to explain the stakes of my race and the fight for the Senate, and why your support is so important, especially right now.

Winning in Wisconsin isn’t easy.

As you may remember, our state gave Donald Trump the final electoral votes he needed to secure the presidency in 2016. He won by less than _one point._ Then in 2020, President Biden won our state by just 0.6%. And last November, Republican Senator Ron Johnson won by just 1%.

So it comes as no surprise that political pundits and pollsters are forecasting that our Senate race in 2024 will be one of the most competitive in the nation. **In fact,_The Hill_ has already named me one of the most vulnerable Senate incumbents in 2024. **

So as Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans begin plotting their path to flip the Senate majority, rest assured that my seat will be one of their top targets. And with the White House also on the ballot, you can bet dollars to doughnuts that the GOP and their mega-donors will spend whatever it takes to try and flip our state red.

We’ve got a tough fight ahead of us, and it will take a lot of time and resources to build the campaign we’ll need to win. I know this team has what it takes to beat right-wing mega-donors at their own game _(we’ve done it before!)_ but it’s going to take all of us working together, which is why I’m asking:

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I’m running for reelection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaul for Attorney General
body:
| | Hi Peter — I have exciting news to share: I’m officially running for reelection to the United States Senate.

I know the road ahead won’t always be easy — election experts have identified me as one of the vulnerable Senate Democrats on the ballot next year. But with you by my side, I know we can get this done and win big next November.

_**[Peter, will you split a donation between my campaign and Josh Kaul’s campaign committee today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61690428/400856144/1980492815?refcode=toplink&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mjk3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGE2MmU0Yy00N2Q5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6pkDCFcefq5rL0jPzkMQBl0W_-lUKZPoWtq2xT0z54w=)**_
| [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61690430/400856146/1980492815?refcode=230412bttn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mjk3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGE2MmU0Yy00N2Q5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6pkDCFcefq5rL0jPzkMQBl0W_-lUKZPoWtq2xT0z54w=)
---

I’m so proud of the progress we’ve made in the Senate over the past few years, Peter. We’ve lowered the price of prescription drugs, addressed the climate crisis with landmark investment in clean energy, expanded health care for millions of our veterans, and so much more.

A highlight of my time in the Senate was when the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , my bipartisan bill to protect marriage equality, was signed into law late last year. That’s a moment I will never forget.

But there’s a lot more to be done, and I’m not willing to give up the fight to make things easier, better, safer, and stronger for hard-working Wisconsinites.

We have to protect Social Security and Medicare for millions of hard-working seniors who deserve the benefits they’ve spent their lives working towards.

We need to defend voting rights and protect access to the ballot box — we’ve seen the harmful impacts of right-wing extremists who try to deny election results and undermine Americans’ right to safely and securely participate in elections.

And we need to re-establish protections for abortion access. After _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned, I was devastated and angry, as so many people were. Wisconsin just took a huge step in the right direction with our supreme court election last week, but we still have a long way to go. Every woman should have the freedom to make her own reproductive healthcare decisions, no matter what zip code she lives in.

I remain hopeful that we can do all of this — and more — together. But it won’t be easy. Republicans’ views have become more out-of-touch and dangerous, and they’re going to try to flip my Senate seat from blue to red. They’ve already spent money on misleading ads attacking my record.

But with you by my side, I know we can win. We’ve won with strong grassroots support before, and I wouldn’t want to have it any other way this time around.

**_[Will you split a contribution between my reelection campaign and Josh Kaul’s campaign committee today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61690431/400856149/1980492815?refcode=toplink&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mjk3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGE2MmU0Yy00N2Q5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6pkDCFcefq5rL0jPzkMQBl0W_-lUKZPoWtq2xT0z54w=)_**

clean_body: | | Hi Peter — I have exciting news to share: I’m officially running for reelection to the United States Senate. I know the road ahead won’t always be easy — election experts have identified me as one of the vulnerable Senate Democrats on the ballot next year. But with you by my side, I know we can get this done and win big next November. = | = I’m so proud of the progress we’ve made in the Senate over the past few years, Peter. We’ve lowered the price of prescription drugs, addressed the climate crisis with landmark investment in clean energy, expanded health care for millions of our veterans, and so much more. A highlight of my time in the Senate was when the Respect for Marriage Act , my bipartisan bill to protect marriage equality, was signed into law late last year. That’s a moment I will never forget. But there’s a lot more to be done, and I’m not willing to give up the fight to make things easier, better, safer, and stronger for hard-working Wisconsinites. We have to protect Social Security and Medicare for millions of hard-working seniors who deserve the benefits they’ve spent their lives working towards. We need to defend voting rights and protect access to the ballot box — we’ve seen the harmful impacts of right-wing extremists who try to deny election results and undermine Americans’ right to safely and securely participate in elections. And we need to re-establish protections for abortion access. After Roe v. Wade was overturned, I was devastated and angry, as so many people were. Wisconsin just took a huge step in the right direction with our supreme court election last week, but we still have a long way to go. Every woman should have the freedom to make her own reproductive healthcare decisions, no matter what zip code she lives in. I remain hopeful that we can do all of this — and more — together. But it won’t be easy. Republicans’ views have become more out-of-touch and dangerous, and they’re going to try to flip my Senate seat from blue to red. They’ve already spent money on misleading ads attacking my record. But with you by my side, I know we can win. We’ve won with strong grassroots support before, and I wouldn’t want to have it any other way this time around. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Josh Kaul and Tammy Baldwin and processed immediately. = = = = = Thank you so much, Peter. I’m so excited for what’s in store for us as we move forward with this campaign. Let’s do this. — Tammy = * | | Paid for by Kaul for Attorney General | Kaul for Attorney General PO Box 5522 Madison, WI 53705 United States | If you would like to no longer receive campaign updates, click here to .

* Engel is running for one reason and one reason only – because she wants Democrats to have total control of Washington, D.C. again. She will be a rubber stamp on the Biden administration.

Engel is going to be bankrolled with MILLIONS from national Democrats. We know their lies and attack ads are coming, and we cannot sit back.

[Please – we need your help to fight back. $20, $50, even $250. Every contribution will make a

Join our fight to preserve the American Dream and keep this seat. 🇺🇸

Your friend,
Juan

2023 is a critical year for America's future, as we have limited time to correct course and take back our country from the radical Left.

That's why we've **extended the deadline to activate your membership with The Heritage Foundation.**

**You can use this secure link to activate your membership right now:[https://secured.heritage.org/activate/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b1bd41ceeeb843599f93a67d52cfb5be&_e=ACfx-_t_WR9pYI8VwWqdxTHh0k2h_twObuSis-UQwJ0j_7JhUCGWAAERZdhoNIGE-Ah1-jxdpEeUCHWyUTwi1BmPNGFNMqzMeWnAMBB6KMUeHiHtbkwGu0H5gbzgrp2__GVmBbz9L0-GtXMmtzVhOnBPbprU42Ziv5n6gJvELsfufGRpIf_fj68vtpAJWRpdavgTwhyqr7lfNx-mY6mgkYPjCGLwSygLqB6BXluPWJo_qSBP1MPhW3yDZYVXrZXtXblVCmhYkJQV3rSlYavuNLgPgXs_Barli6YB5N6JBSyJfJoRvhs4SaTEVcLnvqtkElZRRn0IkiraGHtyziSHqQ%3D%3D) **

By becoming a Heritage member, you will join the ranks of half a million card-carrying constitutionalists who believe in our mission to go on offense against the radical Left, _**and win.**_

**But we cannot do this without your help.**

By activating your membership today, you will ensure Heritage has the resources to advance conservative policy solutions across the country while providing aggressive and meaningful oversight and accountability to the Biden administration and leaders of the leftist regime.

**Join us today by clicking this secure link before the deadline:[https://secured.heritage.org/activate/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b1bd41ceeeb843599f93a67d52cfb5be&_e=ACfx-_t_WR9pYI8VwWqdxTHh0k2h_twObuSis-UQwJ0j_7JhUCGWAAERZdhoNIGE-Ah1-jxdpEeUCHWyUTwi1BmPNGFNMqzMeWnAMBB6KMUeHiHtbkwGu0H5gbzgrp2__GVmBbz9L0-GtXMmtzVhOnBPbprU42Ziv5n6gJvELsfufGRpIf_fj68vtpAJWRpdzxaANrMeXkMFCm8dI4EgkBgB25p7A9jpoJioi64nhOzHxhr4fjzw8k_IALaVxEO5K88aNNVwX7QHj2-xXTcIZvhApz50arwMzTfwSnhnigHxTvjjX8-j4ige_SgXz5W7HsWak6ALSqox4DWniK9AUA%3D%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration. I hope to stand alongside you in the fight to defeat the radical Left - _there is no time to waste! _

Best,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.

That's why we've extended the deadline to activate your membership with The Heritage Foundation. body:
I am the first North Dakota Republican to hold my seat in my lifetime... | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=51e2858302634cab8deafde1b87a7acb&_e=1eoycuruIIKGO4pTgMgcqu10Nzkg6VyGiEKK5ljggs6W3Tody7gCrdIglJAAx8ENsVBilB62x1NGIlyvyICMm76OgwRxJLiTwT5t6Q0FHRgxkkeSv564EvGCzV03P4Y-WFPMqkJn-KcQrpe6h9xiOkPpEC1ExjnWhIroKS3NGXA8jhjEcDNYPY3X0CDXp_ppncxPapCKHFEF--wd9BPM4en79p4pu-b6mRdFyV7qvl3a4MANdqwxDpoyIy25Srz4u008kF-b9aquNn9op0ynSogrPO0B_NIYAk5iv0cY9xWEVydr5188CePR8NxDpjeRINVwLrZE4xHKh3TfHeSbvFvceyykNaczJ9wLJf0zd8XLFgMCnaUEEujU5UZ_jWcT)

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Kevin Cramer. I am an America First Republican and **conservative warrior who flipped a critical Senate seat from the Democrats in 2018** -**_becoming the first Republican to hold this North Dakota seat in my lifetime._**

The Democrats will stop at nothing to force their socialist agenda on America and try to unseat any steadfast conservative who stands in their way. **And since I took this seat from the radical Left...**

**I am the Democrats’ TOP TARGET in 2024.**
[**STAND WITH KEVIN**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=51e2858302634cab8deafde1b87a7acb&_e=1eoycuruIIKGO4pTgMgcqu10Nzkg6VyGiEKK5ljggs6W3Tody7gCrdIglJAAx8ENsVBilB62x1NGIlyvyICMm76OgwRxJLiTwT5t6Q0FHRgxkkeSv564EvGCzV03P4Y-WFPMqkJn-KcQrpe6h9xiOkPpEC1ExjnWhIroKS3NGXA8jhjEcDNYPY3X0CDXp_ppncxPapCKHFEF--wd9BPM4en79p4pu-b6mRdFyV7qvl0XrLGM4aIfwaWhZVHdZboE5fYA03-xpPWsiHbiQe3RsXfyYXzFyFZK6P0JmRANV07sOIkUP_7xESyBCHQzKAzc_3pfTqO49cjVVkeWVCyix8_oB5uPSqxRDCyNyLcseQhZPl1FzGzPcenKMyIxkccN)
[**RESTORE A GOP MAJORITY**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=51e2858302634cab8deafde1b87a7acb&_e=1eoycuruIIKGO4pTgMgcqu10Nzkg6VyGiEKK5ljggs6W3Tody7gCrdIglJAAx8ENsVBilB62x1NGIlyvyICMm76OgwRxJLiTwT5t6Q0FHRgxkkeSv564EvGCzV03P4Y-WFPMqkJn-KcQrpe6h9xiOkPpEC1ExjnWhIroKS3NGXA8jhjEcDNYPY3X0CDXp_ppncxPapCKHFEF--wd9BPM4en79p4pu-b6mRdFyV7qvl2WH7g1ZBs0i1wUwJ0o0KWUCfaQ3cCIvIttTUUIixF5rO2j_LZUlxN5mkN_dzvQpTS20zwti3i1JLYVOQSb71_N743QEuUwlqDayjSvFFcBhZPRCk4uwoAUDNs7dlyptr89Qh2zoCG7VAgThuI-73vP)
This pivotal **2024 Election** for control of the U.S. Senate is about a future **that preserves our American traditions of freedom and prosperity** _and honors our history and our North Dakota way of life._

For me, that life began in Rolla and then on to Kindred, North Dakota, where I was raised and started my education, which I continued at Concordia College in Minnesota and the University of Mary in Bismarck, where my family and I now call home.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=51e2858302634cab8deafde1b87a7acb&_e=1eoycuruIIKGO4pTgMgcqu10Nzkg6VyGiEKK5ljggs6W3Tody7gCrdIglJAAx8ENsVBilB62x1NGIlyvyICMm76OgwRxJLiTwT5t6Q0FHRgxkkeSv564EvGCzV03P4Y-WFPMqkJn-KcQrpe6h9xiOkPpEC1ExjnWhIroKS3NGXA8jhjEcDNYPY3X0CDXp_ppncxPapCKHFEF--wd9BPM4en79p4pu-b6mRdFyV7qvl3o5NUk6u6z5SZ2tIZnr92on0SZNCN7eq2g6pwwIv7jxQI7G2FjJXfQKXOEam_av28mxSKxITqpsDwlI7huz7vYmnT8QLgQPhAOaLJ9tiEZdMaEKz7ufclq_FHhqRQyK5uAaKtGfur1MYNiLzK1XZYg)

I began serving North Dakota, working my way up to becoming a North Dakota Public Service Commissioner, _**helping oversee the most dynamic energy industry in the nation**_ , leading with free market and limited government principles and commonsense energy policies that benefit our people, **and ensure our energy independence.**

In 2012, I was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives, where I stood up for the right to life, energy independence, the Second Amendment, commonsense healthcare, and federal assistance reform. **I vigorously supported President Donald J. Trump’s America First agenda.**

[**STAND WITH KEVIN**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=51e2858302634cab8deafde1b87a7acb&_e=1eoycuruIIKGO4pTgMgcqu10Nzkg6VyGiEKK5ljggs6W3Tody7gCrdIglJAAx8ENsVBilB62x1NGIlyvyICMm76OgwRxJLiTwT5t6Q0FHRgxkkeSv564EvGCzV03P4Y-WFPMqkJn-KcQrpe6h9xiOkPpEC1ExjnWhIroKS3NGXA8jhjEcDNYPY3X0CDXp_ppncxPapCKHFEF--wd9BPM4en79p4pu-b6mRdFyV7qvl2JN-GJDknrbaEjxfmHAKNynB_gPVO-8_Y0VYE8PbruzgQwampljtaXGbeXe6umgnny8gN0mj7-bDOcjK7g-cr2EA6t62PZlYtcJEiR3YbKwhjSb12F8dl7mrgC1gYW6ane9Fj9ND7IaXUJLj9vxa8b)
[**RESTORE A GOP MAJORITY**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=51e2858302634cab8deafde1b87a7acb&_e=1eoycuruIIKGO4pTgMgcqu10Nzkg6VyGiEKK5ljggs6W3Tody7gCrdIglJAAx8ENsVBilB62x1NGIlyvyICMm76OgwRxJLiTwT5t6Q0FHRgxkkeSv564EvGCzV03P4Y-WFPMqkJn-KcQrpe6h9xiOkPpEC1ExjnWhIroKS3NGXA8jhjEcDNYPY3X0CDXp_ppncxPapCKHFEF--wd9BPM4en79p4pu-b6mRdFyV7qvl1FUHZhqT2OfXPLxCzbKpkw-WNRw9sF9PgDeG2xxAODUyvduVdDQx2rUAoMi7wt2Uq4aj7jh_PYd_rNUU1GrEtgcTvaqMIUKZKYAiJYQCoVj8bVCJAJjwkmNNFgB3BMTJBC1tl-AGRqeaUfJAnncjWD)
In 2018, I defeated Democrat incumbent Heidi Heitkamp to become _**the first North Dakota Republican to hold my seat in my lifetime**_ \-- and continued fighting for our conservative principles -- first in support of President Trump and, after 2020, **to resist the Biden Democrats’ disastrous agenda of spending, taxes, inflation, failure to protect our border and chaos overseas.**

**And that brings us to today -- the start of the 2024 Senate election cycle-- and our incredible opportunity to win a new GOP Majority in the U.S. Senate that will bring the leftist Democrats’ destructive schemes to a screeching halt.**

[**STAND WITH KEVIN**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=51e2858302634cab8deafde1b87a7acb&_e=1eoycuruIIKGO4pTgMgcqu10Nzkg6VyGiEKK5ljggs6W3Tody7gCrdIglJAAx8ENsVBilB62x1NGIlyvyICMm76OgwRxJLiTwT5t6Q0FHRgxkkeSv564EvGCzV03P4Y-WFPMqkJn-KcQrpe6h9xiOkPpEC1ExjnWhIroKS3NGXA8jhjEcDNYPY3X0CDXp_ppncxPapCKHFEF--wd9BPM4en79p4pu-b6mRdFyV7qvl36IdCsJ22QtMXuKxCh9pRmLHzMYjZyGdWZ8RX-kjhaCfmcEvccAGwIUTkL2kBKqgh9Zkw2JMEfdFOduEEBlfvivhjfY3RN2GsQ993H7oDZrrHasrBJiAdWRExoGBQ-HNnd_KBdlMQxus6w0fffjwJG)
[**RESTORE A GOP MAJORITY**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=51e2858302634cab8deafde1b87a7acb&_e=1eoycuruIIKGO4pTgMgcqu10Nzkg6VyGiEKK5ljggs6W3Tody7gCrdIglJAAx8ENsVBilB62x1NGIlyvyICMm76OgwRxJLiTwT5t6Q0FHRgxkkeSv564EvGCzV03P4Y-WFPMqkJn-KcQrpe6h9xiOkPpEC1ExjnWhIroKS3NGXA8jhjEcDNYPY3X0CDXp_ppncxPapCKHFEF--wd9BPM4en79p4pu-b6mRdFyV7qvl0WyzJQOCRDFf8aQxpJeQetSwUbTQzls5Eyq2MYrCPDrU10BURUlBqJ7iYfdpPhhpXzminGu4xhfmy97MWLmi9X57uX9JXay_YtDe_TA-lLsXyXcbxvEeoisubEFHfn4ICxpxlOkDDg8kOrB_iZOKM-)
Fellow Conservative, I’m doing everything I can to support the election of common sense conservatives in key U.S. Senate races across the country who will honor our past as we work to save the future -- **[and I need your immediate and indispensable help.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=51e2858302634cab8deafde1b87a7acb&_e=1eoycuruIIKGO4pTgMgcqu10Nzkg6VyGiEKK5ljggs6W3Tody7gCrdIglJAAx8ENsVBilB62x1NGIlyvyICMm76OgwRxJLiTwT5t6Q0FHRgxkkeSv564EvGCzV03P4Y-WFPMqkJn-KcQrpe6h9xiOkPpEC1ExjnWhIroKS3NGXA8jhjEcDNYPY3X0CDXp_ppncxPapCKHFEF--wd9BPM4en79p4pu-b6mRdFyV7qvl0anDcHmHwPk2l_Rpypi6RvgrkLJ56rmVMKDR3F9hrXNtD6_Cm6QSmpcW09GdzLaUZrSRCIAw1UDLhFhPc_OtOvk4zHoUcaDD6uSksBWxt1VV9N6dWtWFAbLIkPhWp3hgB5JAC9V_TLwbYCGfOZ2KMI)**

The Democrats are gearing up to go on the offense, **and they have their sights set on my seat, and we cannot afford to give up a single seat to the radical left. **

**[Can I count on your grassroots support in this fight today](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=51e2858302634cab8deafde1b87a7acb&_e=1eoycuruIIKGO4pTgMgcqu10Nzkg6VyGiEKK5ljggs6W3Tody7gCrdIglJAAx8ENsVBilB62x1NGIlyvyICMm76OgwRxJLiTwT5t6Q0FHRgxkkeSv564EvGCzV03P4Y-WFPMqkJn-KcQrpe6h9xiOkPpEC1ExjnWhIroKS3NGXA8jhjEcDNYPY3X0CDXp_ppncxPapCKHFEF--wd9BPM4en79p4pu-b6mRdFyV7qvl1spPWSm15GkVrCgmMAUatLKarvxHbiR4oYi93NiPIpT5PtiXLfoAOE3eepbneMS4Davkf3Y9CZa4aXxQpxH-wWnr7cd54tf5_z7gtwU9qmyBvH2Ya-awNHl-tGfLEFWfT7rxZzH8ezJ5NBzOYDbG46)** that will help me secure a victory in this critical U.S. Senate Election **[with your contribution of $25, $50, $75, $100, or even more, Fellow Conservative?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=51e2858302634cab8deafde1b87a7acb&_e=1eoycuruIIKGO4pTgMgcqu10Nzkg6VyGiEKK5ljggs6W3Tody7gCrdIglJAAx8ENsVBilB62x1NGIlyvyICMm76OgwRxJLiTwT5t6Q0FHRgxkkeSv564EvGCzV03P4Y-WFPMqkJn-KcQrpe6h9xiOkPpEC1ExjnWhIroKS3NGXA8jhjEcDNYPY3X0CDXp_ppncxPapCKHFEF--wd9BPM4en79p4pu-b6mRdFyV7qvl1I-UXIRlYMFLmIE0xGiqXilekD4OzShLYiReJgibksxcgIL1z8Fvx3U-p2BQFcCX-exkI-PsCwJiMzxarNwN_tBumo7ESvcOougvVMcdrECVHFiSE-bIkfop1dGQJVzRpdVwz1cIaBiqj4ZIM8NFF4)**

[**STAND WITH KEVIN**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=51e2858302634cab8deafde1b87a7acb&_e=1eoycuruIIKGO4pTgMgcqu10Nzkg6VyGiEKK5ljggs6W3Tody7gCrdIglJAAx8ENsVBilB62x1NGIlyvyICMm76OgwRxJLiTwT5t6Q0FHRgxkkeSv564EvGCzV03P4Y-WFPMqkJn-KcQrpe6h9xiOkPpEC1ExjnWhIroKS3NGXA8jhjEcDNYPY3X0CDXp_ppncxPapCKHFEF--wd9BPM4en79p4pu-b6mRdFyV7qvl3O__R-1nPtHDVauH648p6vnUo_h5Wz1PAfsgq0rG9-Zww9ZrkJAmilnUxm7WyXBX1gsfBhNPa35pzD5lOx-heivA1VR8R330wioA3PkbmUlReIReUHAa7lehGVTENAoBnxbRTxeavkpa0MGgeobzbx)

_Thank you_ \-- **[I hope to hear from you today!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=51e2858302634cab8deafde1b87a7acb&_e=1eoycuruIIKGO4pTgMgcqu10Nzkg6VyGiEKK5ljggs6W3Tody7gCrdIglJAAx8ENsVBilB62x1NGIlyvyICMm76OgwRxJLiTwT5t6Q0FHRgxkkeSv564EvGCzV03P4Y-WFPMqkJn-KcQrpe6h9xiOkPpEC1ExjnWhIroKS3NGXA8jhjEcDNYPY3X0CDXp_ppncxPapCKHFEF--wd9BPM4en79p4pu-b6mRdFyV7qvl3gp4aJ0mxIVmIJu9vYHldJfNz_BkVUAaRNY7EfhiEexWvwXGGT5Ua-duu0o6zAh_P_SbdS5U5AQX_dsga8U-vUROysgnAkI_6dlbrDy299zpQNq6_-eNxnPGy7FaDPEolovD_x0DAHpqVAJuuOYOtH)**

clean_body: I am the first North Dakota Republican to hold my seat in my lifetime... | Fellow Conservative, My name is Kevin Cramer. I am an America First Republican and conservative warrior who flipped a critical Senate seat from the Democrats in 2018 -becoming the first Republican to hold this North Dakota seat in my lifetime. The Democrats will stop at nothing to force their socialist agenda on America and try to unseat any steadfast conservative who stands in their way. And since I took this seat from the radical Left... I am the Democrats’ TOP TARGET in 2024. This pivotal 2024 Election for control of the U.S. Senate is about a future that preserves our American traditions of freedom and prosperity and honors our history and our North Dakota way of life. For me, that life began in Rolla and then on to Kindred, North Dakota, where I was raised and started my education, which I continued at Concordia College in Minnesota and the University of Mary in Bismarck, where my family and I now call home. I began serving North Dakota, working my way up to becoming a North Dakota Public Service Commissioner, helping oversee the most dynamic energy industry in the nation , leading with free market and limited government principles and commonsense energy policies that benefit our people, and ensure our energy independence. In 2012, I was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives, where I stood up for the right to life, energy independence, the Second Amendment, commonsense healthcare, and federal assistance reform. I vigorously supported President Donald J. Trump’s America First agenda. In 2018, I defeated Democrat incumbent Heidi Heitkamp to become the first North Dakota Republican to hold my seat in my lifetime \-- and continued fighting for our conservative principles -- first in support of President Trump and, after 2020, to resist the Biden Democrats’ disastrous agenda of spending, taxes, inflation, failure to protect our border and chaos overseas. And that brings us to today -- the start of the 2024 Senate election cycle-- and our incredible opportunity to win a new GOP Majority in the U.S. Senate that will bring the leftist Democrats’ destructive schemes to a screeching halt. - Fellow Conservative, I’m doing everything I can to support the election of common sense conservatives in key U.S. Senate races across the country who will honor our past as we work to save the future -- The Democrats are gearing up to go on the offense, and they have their sights set on my seat, and we cannot afford to give up a single seat to the radical left. that will help me secure a victory in this critical U.S. Senate Election we can defeat the Democrats and demand policies that serve the best interests of our people \-- and ensure that liberty and the American Dream don’t disappear. Thank you \-- Sincerely, Kevin Cramer | | Paid for by Cramer for Senate Don't want to receive our emails?

April 12, 2023
Dear friend,
Today, the Shelby County Commission will vote whether or not to reappoint Representative Justin J. Pearson and he needs our support . If you support his re-appointment and would like to reach out to the Shelby County Commission, please click here [https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Factionnetwork.org%2Fletters%2Frestore-representation-for-district-86%2F%3Flink_id%3D2%26can_id%3D14cef862edb96c44724ed3dd15d01f16%26source%3Demail-it-aint-over-yet-take-action-for-house-district-86%26email_referrer%3Demail_1874009%26email_subject%3Dit-aint-over-yet-take-action-for-house-district-86%26fbclid%3DIwAR34ZhZhnFVi7XyixB5yaNaUlYyCWcfWnAnpYszUuCcdrTSyUTx7efzarGk&h=AT2UR2ELmHiA1TBCSWgC8DTeYPCivgGa-YbN8z2h75KkHV2ZUmTyXMujYxl_vcjXnyP4PCt2RrkjYcvc0-m-i1BkmKkvj2FIt_V37HrkNY6p_GZR1TKfOUQEqN7qksBo6Y4ty-E&__tn__=R]-R&c[0]=AT3jkloV0GiNFpQjpEdu646sA9MUsY6qmgiOgFObjCCXKqWlmVr2AtQFpx5sBrB9FobTXsnpSQ2uyhqV_ieVeKf58saePFptYW22J7lWM4nvv0I0ZASuLYFt7z56OPiMF-Vb9YTqxS10SD0AB7VexNEOBlycIRRLOg_e4esHltO81DY] .
We also want you all to know that TVP's fight for democracy in Tennessee will continue long past today.
If you want to join us in the long-term to fight Republicans hell bent on tearing down our democracy, please consider contributing what you can to TVP to support this work [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1] .
JOIN TVP IN THE FIGHT FOR OUR DEMOCRACY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1]
Here's why we're asking for your support:
Your contribution helps TVP support progressives across Tennessee and help them win against their Republican opponents.
Your contribution helps TVP register and turn out younger voters who are on the frontlines for our democracy right now.
Your contribution helps TVP continue to drive the conversation in municipal elections about supporting working families, expanding public transit, and investment in education.
Can you use this link to support Tennessee Voter Project's work to support progressive candidates all across Tennessee today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1]
Thanks for your support,
Tennessee Voter Project Staff

name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: please, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
Peter, I’m outraged. [**FIRST:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61692004/400861714/-1810142053?refcode=20230412_em_fr_b1_raja_30&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzE0YTYwZi00YmQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=soHThpw5g4r_g0_QRidFAmQrRZla2cY0_vaT0-5s9lQ=) I watched Nashville become the latest victim of America’s mass shooting epidemic. [**THEN:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61692005/400861715/-1810142053?refcode=20230412_em_fr_b1_raja_30&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzE0YTYwZi00YmQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=soHThpw5g4r_g0_QRidFAmQrRZla2cY0_vaT0-5s9lQ=) I watched Republicans bluntly admit they will NEVER act to stop gun violence. [**NOW:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61692008/400861716/-1810142053?refcode=20230412_em_fr_b1_raja_30&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzE0YTYwZi00YmQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=soHThpw5g4r_g0_QRidFAmQrRZla2cY0_vaT0-5s9lQ=) I’m fighting tirelessly to take on the NRA, pass gun safety laws, and keep our communities safe - but I can’t do it alone. [_**Peter, I will never back down from this fight. But National Republicans and their NRA allies will stop at nothing to protect their fragile Majority, keep vital gun safety bills from becoming law, and defeat strong Democrats like me. I need all hands on deck to take back our House Majority and END gun violence once and for all. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I’m officially running for reelection to the United States Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
#
Hi there — I have exciting news to share, and I wanted you to hear it from me:
**I’m officially running for reelection to the United States Senate.**
I know the road ahead won’t always be easy — election experts are _already_ calling me one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats on the ballot next year. But with you by my side, I know we can get this done and win big next November.
[**So, will you help me start the first day of our reelection in the strongest position by splitting a donation between my campaign in Wisconsin and The Long Run today?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-baldwin-split.kt1qkh&refcode=em230412-1-t1&t=1&akid=4356%2E196590%2E6i0BPc)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be evenly split between Tammy Baldwin and the Long Run PAC:_
[Express Donate: $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/2924?c0=longrunpac-em-baldwin-split.z3W_0q&refcode=em230412-1-t1&t=20&akid=4356%2E196590%2E6i0BPc)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-baldwin-split.ynuvNe&refcode=em230412-1-t1&t=21&akid=4356%2E196590%2E6i0BPc)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-baldwin-split.qJsKrg&refcode=em230412-1-t1&t=22&akid=4356%2E196590%2E6i0BPc)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-baldwin-split.EG5DJA&refcode=em230412-1-t1&t=23&akid=4356%2E196590%2E6i0BPc)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-baldwin-split.ZhwC4S&refcode=em230412-1-t1&t=24&akid=4356%2E196590%2E6i0BPc)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-baldwin-split.kt1qkh&refcode=em230412-1-t1&t=25&akid=4356%2E196590%2E6i0BPc)
I’m so proud of the progress we’ve made in the Senate over the past few years. We’ve lowered the price of prescription drugs, addressed the climate crisis with landmark investment in clean energy, expanded health care for millions of our veterans, and so much more.
A highlight of my time in the Senate was when the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , my bipartisan bill to protect marriage equality, was signed into law late last year. That’s a moment I will never forget.
But there’s a lot more to be done, and I’m not willing to give up the fight to make things easier, better, safer, and stronger for hard-working Wisconsinites.
We have to protect Social Security and Medicare for millions of hard-working seniors who deserve the benefits they’ve spent their lives working towards.
We need to defend voting rights and protect access to the ballot box — we’ve seen the harmful impacts of right-wing extremists who try to deny election results and take away Americans’ right to safely and securely participate in elections.
And we need to re-establish protections for abortion access. After _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned, I was devastated and angry, and I’m sure you were too. Wisconsin just took a huge first step in the right direction with our Supreme Court race last week, but we still have a long way to go toward making sure every woman has the freedom to make her own decisions no matter what zip code she lives in.
I remain hopeful that we can do all of this — and more — together. But it won’t be easy, especially if Republicans have it their way. Their views are becoming more out-of-touch and dangerous by the day, and I know for sure that they will come after my Senate seat with everything they’ve got. They’re _already_ spending big on misleading ads attacking my record.
**But with you by my side, I know we can win. We’ve done it before, together, and I wouldn’t want to have it any other way this time around.**
[**Will you stand by me again and split a contribution between my reelection campaign and The Long Run? It’d mean the world to me to have you with me from Day One.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-baldwin-split.kt1qkh&refcode=em230412-1-t1&t=26&akid=4356%2E196590%2E6i0BPc)
Thank you so much, folks. I can’t wait to see you on the campaign trail, and I promise I’ll keep you updated on every step of this journey. So excited for what’s in store for us.
I’m so glad to have you on this historic team.
Let’s do this.
— Tammy
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-baldwin-split.kt1qkh&refcode=em230412-1-t1&t=27&akid=4356%2E196590%2E6i0BPc)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=4356%2E196590%2E6i0BPc). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=29&akid=4356%2E196590%2E6i0BPc)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=30&refcode2=4356_196590_6i0BPc&akid=4356%2E196590%2E6i0BPc)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=31&akid=4356%2E196590%2E6i0BPc)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC
P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201
