body:
Early months of the off-year are almost always slow for fundraising — and for politicians like Josh Hawley, that’s ok. But not for our campaign.
#
Here’s the truth, Peter.
These early months of the off-year are almost always slow for fundraising — and for politicians like Josh Hawley, that’s ok.
They know that whenever they need it, GOP insiders and corporate elites will swoop in and spend anything it takes to maintain their corrupt status quo.
But since Lucas is committed to funding this campaign with help from real people like you, not shady mega-donors or corporate PACs, we _really_ can’t afford to have too many slow months.
**That’s why today, we’re setting a goal of raising 1,500 donations by April 15** — and why we’re reaching out to see if you’ll make your very first donation of absolutely any amount to our campaign so we can stay on track and prepare for the fight ahead.

name: Tim Scott
subject: Here’s my life story
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT PRESIDENTIAL EXPLORATORY COMMITTEE
body:
I just launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee and I want to tell you a quick story...

| |
---
| | | I just launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee and I want to tell you a quick story...

I was just going through some old photos before this massive decision, and it made me realize how fortunate I am to be where I am today.

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665519%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=72Rt8umopyrPb05UH5oC8A&sysid=1)
---

That photo was taken when I was a young boy, growing up in North Charleston, South Carolina. Back then, I had no idea I would one day consider running for President of the United States.

When I was young, my grandparents took my mother, brother, and me into their home shortly after my parents split. After that, my mother had to work long and hard hours just to put food on the table and a roof over our heads.

With the guidance that came from my mother and both of my grandparents, I was taught the importance of a good education - despite the fact that my grandfather never even knew how to read. Yet, they knew that education was the closest thing to magic in America and the ticket to fulfilling the American Dream.

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665510%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LtgSZS9l5KRPUyTdlNd5fQ&sysid=1)
---

Here’s a photo of me in high school when I was on the football team. Back then, it was my dream to play for the Dallas Cowboys when I was old enough. With a job like that, I would be able to repay my mom for all of the sacrifices she made for my brother and me - and not have to worry about keeping a roof over her head.

**Simply put: football was an escape. It was my ticket out of poverty, and to give back. **

But as life often does, it took an unexpected turn - one day I fell asleep behind the wheel of my mom’s car, flipping it and almost dying in the process. I thank my lucky stars that God had more of a plan in store for me, because the story didn’t end there.

During college, I dedicated my life to Christ and meaningful service, and long story short, I was able to live out my mother’s American Dream!

With the help of some key mentors along the way, I was able to find success in business - and used it to improve the lives of others.

After my time in business, I decided that I wanted to run for public office and work to better the lives of people in my community. So, I chose to run in the Charleston area **_- as a Republican. _**

Since then, I have become the first black man elected to the U.S. Senate from a Southern State since Reconstruction. And now, I’m exploring a run for President of the United States. **You really could only do this in America.**

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665511%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mzE6ENSaL%2fKBqhME%2bJ7Unw&sysid=1)
---

What I have learned along the way is this: **Every American is capable of achieving their own American Dream when given an equal playing field, especially if the government gets out of their way when doing it.**

That’s why I’m exploring a run for President. We need to restore faith in America and protect the American Dream for all. It’s a lot of hard work, but I have only been able to make it this far with the help of my supporters.

Just like others on my team, I know you’re reading this email to do the same thing - to join me in standing up for all Americans. So now, I have a short and humble request for you: **_[will you chip in $20, $35 or even more now to help me save the American Dream?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665512%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pZaoWcBYeVEIt4%2fHDjlH9Q&sysid=1 "will you chip in $20, $35
or even more now to help me save the American Dream?")_**

---
| | | [HELP TIM SAVE THE AMERICAN DREAM](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665513%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rwDZJ%2bpF%2bqZBvG2qLyjU3A&sysid=1 "HELP TIM SAVE THE AMERICAN DREAM")
---

Thank you, and God bless you,

---
| | | [HELP TIM SAVE THE AMERICAN DREAM](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665513%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rwDZJ%2bpF%2bqZBvG2qLyjU3A&sysid=1 "HELP TIM SAVE THE AMERICAN DREAM")
---

---
* * *
---
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665514%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0cdO1bh%2bgxsb7adgkaVbig&sysid=1)
---

I just launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee, and I couldn’t be more excited to hit the ground and listen to more Americans about their concerns, worries, fears, and priorities.

But the truth is, accomplishing our goal isn’t cheap. _**[So today, I’m humbly asking if you could please chip in $5, $10, $25, or anything you can afford to help my team and I keep trying to restore FAITH in America.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665525%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oTqFyAhHFx8zsVze7L6Dfg&sysid=1 "So today, I’m humbly
asking if you could please chip in $5, $10, $25, or anything you can afford to
help my team and I keep trying to restore FAITH in America.")**_ I believe our best days are ahead of us, but I can’t do this alone. Are you with me?
---
| | [I’M WITH TIM SCOTT](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665526%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=R09vqwAr4%2fe1DaSj05lTmQ&sysid=1 "JOIN MY TEAM")
---

I was raised in a single-parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13. **I understand the value of a dollar.**

I don’t take asking for money lightly. I know that every donation made is a sacrifice, and I am forever grateful for each and every gift.

_**[I know we have been asking a lot lately, but it would mean so much if you could give $5 to help us restore faith in America.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665527%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VAKdi%2bXETOC6oZfXzITwnA&sysid=1 "I know we have been asking
a lot lately, but it would mean so much if you could give $5 to help us restore
faith in America.")**_
---
| | [I’M WITH TIM SCOTT](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665526%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=R09vqwAr4%2fe1DaSj05lTmQ&sysid=1 "JOIN MY TEAM")
---
| PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT PRESIDENTIAL EXPLORATORY COMMITTEE
---

CHARLESTON, SC 29407

_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665529%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=a0SHqotRNad0nJ9NUm2nqA&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665520%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4RIcSmNk8AhjL%2fd2JCbPEg&sysid=1)_
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1988%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=L5G9n8CzjUDWH3LWkec22Q&sysid=1)

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61693652/400868357/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230412_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWQ2M2RmMi00ZWQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dlfZ8YO4fXLm2JTWrI3B9OOgmosJKO4QzxuvX6xWOxA=&emci=56ee33bb-49d9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=05d63df2-4ed9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)

Hi there — I have exciting news to share, and I wanted you to hear it from me: **I’m officially running for reelection to the United States Senate.** I know the road ahead won’t always be easy — election experts are already calling me one the most vulnerable Senate Democrats on the ballot next year. But with you by my side, I know we can get this done and win big next November. **So, will you help me start the first day of our reelection in the strongest position by splitting a donation between my campaign in Wisconsin and Martin Heinrich’s in New Mexico today?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will immediately be split between Tammy Baldwin and Martin Heinrich:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61693656/400868360/-1694976873?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230412_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWQ2M2RmMi00ZWQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dlfZ8YO4fXLm2JTWrI3B9OOgmosJKO4QzxuvX6xWOxA=)

---
I’m so proud of the progress we’ve made in the Senate over the past few years. We’ve lowered the price of prescription drugs, addressed the climate crisis with landmark investment in clean energy, expanded health care for millions of our veterans, and so much more.
A highlight of my time in the Senate was when the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , my bipartisan bill to protect marriage equality, was signed into law late last year. That’s a moment I will never forget.
But there’s a lot more to be done, and I’m not willing to give up the fight to make things easier, better, safer, and stronger for hard-working Wisconsities.
We have to protect Social Security and Medicare for millions of hard-working seniors who deserve the benefits they’ve spent their lives working towards.
We need to defend voting rights and protect access to the ballot box — we’ve seen the harmful impacts of right-wing extremists who try to deny election results and take away Americans’ right to safely and securely participate in elections.
And we need to re-establish protections for abortion access. After _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned, I was devastated and angry, and I’m sure you were too. Wisconsin just took a huge first step in the right direction with our Supreme Court race last week, but we still have a long way to go toward making sure every woman has the freedom to make her own decisions no matter what zip code she lives in.
I remain hopeful that we can do all of this — and more — together. But it won’t be easy, especially if Republicans have it their way. Their views are becoming more out-of-touch and dangerous by the day, and I know for sure that they will come after my Senate seat with everything they’ve got. They’re already spending big on misleading ads attacking my record.
**But with you by my side, I know we can win. We’ve done it before, together, and I wouldn’t want to have it any other way this time around.**
**[Will you stand by me again and split a contribution between my reelection campaign and Martin Heinrich’s? It’d mean the world to be to have you with me from Day One.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61693667/400868374/-1694976873?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230412_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWQ2M2RmMi00ZWQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dlfZ8YO4fXLm2JTWrI3B9OOgmosJKO4QzxuvX6xWOxA=)**
Thank you so much, folks. I can’t wait to see you on the campaign trail, and I promise I’ll keep you updated on every step of this journey. So excited for what’s in store for us.
I’m so glad to have you on this historic team.
Let’s do this.
— Tammy
| Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
---
Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. name: 2024 Presidential Alerts
subject: Nikki Haley outraises Trump by $2.5M in first six weeks of presidential campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SFA Fund, Inc
body:
Support from grassroots donors is giving her an edge in the race
| |
---
| | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549561:J0p5Y4G8N:m:1:3365131770:6F181FED66ED0FB2A13904A41A94D5C7:r "headline")
---
USA Today | April 5, 2023 From the packed events in Iowa and New Hampshire to the growing number of grassroots conservatives joining Team Haley every day, the energy behind Nikki's campaign has been amazing.

But campaigns can't measure success on rally attendance alone. Where the rubber meets the road is when the first fundraising report is released and the number of grassroots donors becomes public. That happened just this week, and now everyone knows Nikki has a MASSIVE base of grassroots donors behind her.

Even the media is buzzing about the proven strength and momentum of Nikki's campaign. She is in this race to WIN it and Team Haley is just getting started.

**[If you're ready to support a winner and conservative fighter who will bring a new generation of leadership to Washington, join Team Haley today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549561:J0p5Y4G8N:m:1:3365131770:6F181FED66ED0FB2A13904A41A94D5C7:r "If you're ready to support a winner and conservative fighter who will bring a new generation
of leadership to Washington, join Team Haley today.")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Matthew=20Frohlich?=
subject: Join the fight! Become a 2023 Sustaining Member Today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
What are you waiting for?

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .

Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party

clean_body: What are you waiting for? Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd! With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms. We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! () State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. () Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press: “We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions. “Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative." Read the full statement. () Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here () . Contact: Steve Johnson Communications Director Washington State Republican Party (425) 460-0570 steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org) ============================================================

body:
Did you hear? The 2024 Democratic National Convention will be held in Chicago next August, and you (and a friend!) can enter to win a chance to join Democrats from across the country in the Windy City. | |
---
Did you hear, Derek? **The 2024 Democratic National Convention will be held in Chicago next August, and you can enter to win a chance to join Democrats from across the country in the Windy City.** The winner will get two tickets to the convention (bring a friend or loved one, Derek!), travel to and from Chicago, and a fully covered hotel stay. Grassroots supporters like you are the heart of our party. In appreciation of all you do, we want every Democrat to have the chance to witness this historic moment in person! [All you have to do to be automatically entered for a chance to win flights, a hotel stay, and convention admission is show your support for Democrats nationwide with a $7 donation today. The 2024 Democratic National Convention will be held in Chicago next August, and you (and a friend!) can enter to win a chance to join Democrats from across the country in the Windy City. | | Did you hear, Derek? The 2024 Democratic National Convention will be held in Chicago next August, and you can enter to win a chance to join Democrats from across the country in the Windy City. The winner will get two tickets to the convention (bring a friend or loved one, Derek!), travel to and from Chicago, and a fully covered hotel stay. Grassroots supporters like you are the heart of our party. In appreciation of all you do, we want every Democrat to have the chance to witness this historic moment in person! We hope we'll see you there! name: Rebekah, Team Haley
subject: what working for Nikki Haley is like
body:
it's pretty amazing
| |
---
| | | | Peter,

It's Rebekah from Team Haley.

By now, you've probably gotten a couple of emails from me. I wanted to reach out and let you know a little bit more about what happens on this side of the email.

I started working for Nikki just over two years ago. To be honest, it's still a bit surreal. I first heard about Nikki Haley when I was in college and saw videos circulating of a governor who was unafraid to speak the truth, no matter whether it was popular or not. Then, I started to watch her a bit closer. From the other side of the television screen, I started to follow Nikki's path as she went from governor, to UN ambassador, and onward. Only in my wildest dreams would I ever get the opportunity to work for Nikki. But two years ago, I was thrilled to get that chance.

When I started working for Nikki, I had no idea what to expect. So many times, the people you see on tv aren't the same person behind the scenes. But with Nikki, she's the same through and through.

She's genuine. She cares deeply about each and every person. Not just everyone on our team, but everyone we interact with. She cares about you, and every other person on the other side of this email. She emails me to ask about your opinions and your feedback. She is excited when I send her your responses so she can see what you have to say.

She's running for president so she can fight for policies that lift up everyone. She did it as governor and I know she'll do it as our next president.

**I 'm grateful to work for a bold and courageous leader.** Someone who's willing to speak the hard truths. Someone who genuinely cares about every person on the other side of this email. Someone who wants everyone to be treated with respect, no matter if they have nothing to give or everything to give.

That's why working for Nikki Haley is pretty amazing. She's bold, genuine, and fights for every American. Nikki's vision for America is filled with hope and strength. It's what I hope the future of our country looks like. With Nikki in the White House, I know it will.

That's why today I'm asking you to chip in any amount you can. Nikki's message is the right one, and I know she's exactly who our country needs.

_**[So if you can, will you pitch in to support Nikki Haley for president today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549537:6yCEb4GNg:m:1:3331421248:A84EB079A2800F662387891E3EE28BF4:r "So if you can, will you pitch in to support Nikki Haley for President today?")**_

Thank you,
Rebekah

**GET YOUR NIKKI HALEY FOR PRESIDENT MERCH**
A great way to show off your support for Nikki Haley is by getting your own Nikki Haley for President gear! All of our merchandise is made in America. **[Contribute now to support Nikki Haley and claim your Nikki Haley for President mug today.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549538:6yCEb4GNg:m:1:3331421248:A84EB079A2800F662387891E3EE28BF4:r "Contribute now to
support Nikki Haley and claim your Nikki Haley for President shirt today. >>")**

---
| |
**JOIN NIKKI 'S TEAM**
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549539:6yCEb4GNg:m:1:3331421248:A84EB079A2800F662387891E3EE28BF4:r "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
Nikki Haley is the daughter of Indian immigrants, a proud military wife, and the mom of two amazing children. She's served as governor of the great state of South Carolina and as America's ambassador to the United Nations...and she's a grateful citizen who knows our best days are yet to come, if we unite and fight to save our country.

Nikki Haley is running for President because our country is on a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction, and we need a leader who has proven time and again that she can rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and focus on serving the people.

**[In order to build momentum and get Nikki's message out, we need you on her side. Will you join Nikki's team and pitch in a donation today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549539:6yCEb4GNg:m:1:3331421248:A84EB079A2800F662387891E3EE28BF4:r "In order to build momentum and get Nikki’s message out, we need you on her side. Will you join Nikki’s team and pitch in a donation
today? ")**

Thank you in advance for your support.

Thank you,

Team Haley

P.S. If you don't have $1 or more to spare, all we ask is that you take one minute of your time to share this with 5 friends today.

---

name: Team Baldwin
subject: Did you hear the news?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=151%2E35263%2ElQpBLi ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Did you hear the news,
Peter? Tammy Baldwin is officially
running for reelection!

Tammy has dedicated her life to public service. Throughout her entire
career, she has fought long and hard to take on the big corporations and
special interests on behalf of working families in Wisconsin and across
the country.

With so many important fights still ahead of us — from restoring the right
to choose to fighting back against right-wing extremism — we need fighters
like Tammy in the Senate. She will do whatever it takes to deliver real,
meaningful change for all of us.

That’s why Tammy is running, to fight for us. But winning this election
won’t be easy.

Election experts are already naming Tammy as one of the most vulnerable
Senators in the next election — and the Washington Post said holding
Tammy’s seat is central to saving the Democratic majority in the Senate.

Last year, Democrats lost the Senate race in Wisconsin by one point.
Republicans are dead set on flipping Tammy’s seat and have already started
launching attacks on our campaign. We can’t give Republicans any chance to
flip this seat — so we are counting on you to help us fight back.

We’ve said it before and we’ll say it again: our grassroots movement is
only great because we can count on you to propel us in the path ahead. We
know this team will reelect Tammy next November, and together we’ll send a
big signal to Republicans and their big-money allies that we’re ready for
whatever they throw our way.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-launch23.BP3f3F&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230412_AM2_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=151%2E35263%2ElQpBLi ]Peter, if you’re with us from the start, please extend a
donation of any amount to support Tammy’s reelection campaign on Day One.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-launch23.kLC5-H&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230412_AM2_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=151%2E35263%2ElQpBLi ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

Peter, thank you as always for your support. The fight ahead

Fellow American -

Over the course of this election, I am laying my vision for an American national revival.

Here’s one promise for you: I will end the weaponization of police power in America.

Time to stop complaining and actually *fix* the problem without apology.
1. Shut down + replace the FBI
2. Shut down + replace the IRS
3. Pardon all federal defendants prosecuted based on political motives. This includes Douglass Mackey & nonviolent January 6 defendants denied due process
4. Hold Congress accountable for taxpayer $$ used as hush money for sexual harassment claims
5. Publish the Jeffrey Epstein client list: the police state can’t be weaponized to protect a select few.

Fellow American, if you agree, and want these policies debated on the main stage of the Republican Presidential Primary, then I need your help. **[Chip in $1 to build this movement toward our American revival.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=04ad37985f9645c08002714ca06fb8b0&_e=7xQkiBXDPTPY5MLYYGCofL-xWOFWxUw91MkHgFGPGezfSIAz8HbUeOVVh832JP__xs2SPIoNw1nU4f3YhI-OoAPjc5G-cUwovjwwka-8W89tWSVJKyGR7FR3z7JbM0b9bjjZO-T_kZLUoLrhcGVYU9NEm0pujepfdDvW1cdCFK3s1EkTkeX_kLePjxspLN4QVGHZ6dTGT1POf7j_fFn96yALim5A5CL8rAmqFqeiI-YzoONZ1WhPdusmaqfkzmj7TxHtkScQ5MI-lkAnUib27C9UZYDeirR1w38RN1JexlkyyAG6oXxU-12bAaTTEzZj4DVpi-D4OQMeeVXwtosGvYP9idIUQ00IIQhaqyxXe34wkqfUuZQQe1PrZOxcW9Cn)**

---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: It’s time to stop complaining and actually fix the problem without apology. | | Fellow American - Over the course of this election, I am laying my vision for an American national revival. Here’s one promise for you: I will end the weaponization of police power in America. Time to stop complaining and actually fix the problem without apology. 1. Shut down + replace the FBI 2. Shut down + replace the IRS 3. Pardon all federal defendants prosecuted based on political motives. This includes Douglass Mackey & nonviolent January 6 defendants denied due process 4. Hold Congress accountable for taxpayer $$ used as hush money for sexual harassment claims 5. Publish the Jeffrey Epstein client list: the police state can’t be weaponized to protect a select few. Fellow American, if you agree, and want these policies debated on the main stage of the Republican Presidential Primary, then I need your help. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. name: Cori Bush HQ
subject: Check out Cori's profile in The Root
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Shaking the table and upending the status quo.
#
**In case you missed it, Peter:**
Last month, The Root published a profile of Cori as a part of its ongoing series on the next generation of Black congresswomen.
[](https://act.coribush.org/go/1137?t=1&akid=2496%2E1082990%2Eo9qrx6)
Raised around politics her entire life, Cori's journey to Congress began on the streets of Ferguson, Missouri in 2014 with the formation of the Movement for Black Lives.
Cori knows that in order to make a difference and achieve change, we need to transform our politics and replace elected officials who have failed to use their power to advocate for their communities.
As the first Black woman to represent Missouri in Congress, Cori has brought her years of organizing and activism to Congress. Cori's background and story is one that many people share. **As Cori continues to shake the table and upend the status quo, our movement for a better future must continue to grow to amplify our collective voice.**
[**We rely on contributions from folks like you to power our movement. Will you chip in today to keep this movement strong?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230412.PYukoT&amount=5&refcode=em20230412-2496&t=2&akid=2496%2E1082990%2Eo9qrx6)
**[Donate $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230412.PYukoT&amount=5&refcode=em20230412-2496&t=21&akid=2496%2E1082990%2Eo9qrx6)**
In solidarity,
Cori Bush HQ
P.S. If you want to read the whole article from The Root, click [here.](https://act.coribush.org/go/1138?t=22&akid=2496%2E1082990%2Eo9qrx6)

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230412?refcode=em20230412-2496-footer&t=23&refcode2=2496_1082990_o9qrx6&akid=2496%2E1082990%2Eo9qrx6) **
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.

name: Working Families Party
subject: Join us as we rally for abortion freedom this weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
Let’s break down the ruling as it stands and what's next in the fight for abortion freedom. | | | Peter, On Friday, a Trump-appointed, far-right judge in Texas issued a ruling that could severely limit access to Mifepristone — a pill commonly used in conjunction with Misoprostol for medication abortions — in all 50 states. **[We’re joining abortion justice groups across the country this weekend. Will you join us at a rally near you? RSVP here.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXY18nPY5VSudLEkl6QKnEiYkdnZ2oTD63Ea0J9fPZJxlRDKYj2nijWXJ1notfcAs4w7UWsS5V_ms91c2t9fFCcP951gYYuXLBqqnJkRkutWTZ7N53e2LRbc_0b3teN4hmxOwdBNgizQ33uMTIpxb-Xvp1UhwOJ1Xjqg8k42dYwfVE-2EJulSMGwRpEO_rgl-zunmHGJ616KY4g7jCAGPAo7mamjABpbaN4v2vAwUuuKGU6mT2CoN4QvkS-1Hor1oVLeJ84ylkD-tOMLUwihZhIyFq-Zy4526RK9iPOs9GxADV5W6qi41csSgHFCVw6DZBM7yTXodmQrzRdlVx4QTIv0/3va/yJyWy_hCTXedutteb4YVUQ/h0/-oKZAq9Eys57cv-hg98xKqD7NSe1S6y_BiTiJ1Yx1K0)** **[Find a local rally](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXY18nPY5VSudLEkl6QKnEiYkdnZ2oTD63Ea0J9fPZJxlZp9n97Ea_c_PzWoDfbSKGIdRwAPwYnd31L7v8mPeTe0cJNjgZScoJoWbxvCRw8qLbnOmRXkQ4qyZEKzgZ4uO-6lZwzyGjRNpiPgc8uEUvKgU3MkRqyftd--wp69fQMNsFh1l0NKhy6ETXdEMed2bMx9aB89_OpJZbhkmsEtTcqXEJqh_tpBRDclwVhyySGdgCWjT0ANTo7QOz4zRqQQxkQeBIvKelVcM35ewDLSYONXTXJmkBch0JZouXyLUsB0upTDMEb_FMfwt2GeThC9Bj6SAQE-RxWMJsv0Q6QhndhY/3va/yJyWy_hCTXedutteb4YVUQ/h1/UbPa3l8glXATTDtrH8FKgIDOz8flhxtrQtKX8pqxK0s)** Let’s break down the ruling as it stands and what's next in the fight for abortion freedom. In a coordinated attack on nationwide abortion access, **Judge Matthew Kacsmaryk ruled in favor of anti-abortion groups and suspended the FDA approval of Mifepristone.** It’s important to note that Mifepristone remains available right now since Judge Kacsmaryk stayed his own ruling for seven days, until this Friday. Misoprostol, the second drug used in standard medication abortions, is also still available and is unlikely to face a ban due to its other uses. **In states that have not banned abortion, abortion is still legal, and safe medication abortions will continue to be available with Misoprostol only if the Department of Justice’s appeal fails.** Let's be clear — abortions with Misoprostol only are safe and effective, full stop. And still, Judge Kacsmaryk’s ruling is not only outrageous and founded on easily disproven claims, it’s also unprecedented. Courts have never before revoked a decision made by the FDA based on science,1 and setting this legal precedent could lead to similar partisan decisions on contraceptives and vaccines. And with a different judge in Washington state issuing a contradictory ruling that same night, requiring the FDA to maintain access to Mifepristone in 17 states and the District of Columbia, this matter will most likely be decided by the Supreme Court.2 **Amidst this uncertainty, we need to take action to support those providing abortion access and ensure that our voices continue to be heard by all decision makers.** **[Can we count on you to join a local rally this weekend?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXY18nPY5VSudLEkl6QKnEiYkdnZ2oTD63Ea0J9fPZJxlyeLJdMaS2wJ6N6d73qNPVQfG628AYk0zmtoPvJeLS8opSB1pZMRBet9M78RG6gD0GaMcAfv2Cvgs40Ug6j0b75Eefvq2TJWCTOv6LH3kcxNtN-GMW-mF6HqxGn-sOetY89HvUo4QuAJYbeCiALAZd7RN-jJGhSjkaCHXssAO4S4NWaD50Voj5sBcziOndqwPJrcaJ1esw2sEWh8Nx0GkbuhOpU0296vDfRucgnt1sVB2JmLa3_rqXi3XX8cVKHFxSlDqHioHbdJpDNYyALLq-i4mpsgZThYifQpq8mIMKXM/3va/yJyWy_hCTXedutteb4YVUQ/h2/EPL5_vBIXpVGzhancesuWg7K0unlge0RSZJzZAFsc7I)** **[Find a local rally](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXY18nPY5VSudLEkl6QKnEiYkdnZ2oTD63Ea0J9fPZJxlb5oZkHmJmLVbdIue0yOFMQKC3MkFUa4DxrL80aTY1CotUZq9Ia_3dVne7g0pgYV_6NeBwQ2nidwMJKPs5LYZ1H0IzFfh7kaOm9DiF8QxGxAfh1Mg9rzDNJFC2w5H8MGhVynNqHu1IlM8A8rUiNS9QLcZtLDZ5PQTqf5x3Ykl6E7qce8DVaOXHOxcKpHMXQ_iUqfnJPhumBQl7qwx4Oe2BaYRKbrTF0t3jr-eJG5YTOTirlBf8bpx2ZxD_yY9mrAaaReORVun-Gcj_0FAA8FP8htGn47Ua-FyAR6Kx5h0sKg/3va/yJyWy_hCTXedutteb4YVUQ/h3/WjQrds3qcfvVM0nbdwzcwm7re6_cT_hVKgfNYpr7Wu0)** In solidarity, Working Families Party Source:

clean_body: Let’s break down the ruling as it stands and what's next in the fight for abortion freedom. | | | Peter, On Friday, a Trump-appointed, far-right judge in Texas issued a ruling that could severely limit access to Mifepristone — a pill commonly used in conjunction with Misoprostol for medication abortions — in all 50 states. Let’s break down the ruling as it stands and what's next in the fight for abortion freedom. In a coordinated attack on nationwide abortion access, Judge Matthew Kacsmaryk ruled in favor of anti-abortion groups and suspended the FDA approval of Mifepristone. It’s important to note that Mifepristone remains available right now since Judge Kacsmaryk stayed his own ruling for seven days, until this Friday. Misoprostol, the second drug used in standard medication abortions, is also still available and is unlikely to face a ban due to its other uses. In states that have not banned abortion, abortion is still legal, and safe medication abortions will continue to be available with Misoprostol only if the Department of Justice’s appeal fails. Let's be clear — abortions with Misoprostol only are safe and effective, full stop. And still, Judge Kacsmaryk’s ruling is not only outrageous and founded on easily disproven claims, it’s also unprecedented. Courts have never before revoked a decision made by the FDA based on science,1 and setting this legal precedent could lead to similar partisan decisions on contraceptives and vaccines. And with a different judge in Washington state issuing a contradictory ruling that same night, requiring the FDA to maintain access to Mifepristone in 17 states and the District of Columbia, this matter will most likely be decided by the Supreme Court.2 Amidst this uncertainty, we need to take action to support those providing abortion access and ensure that our voices continue to be heard by all decision makers. In solidarity, Working Families Party Source: 1\. , NBC News, April 7, 2023 2\. , New York Times, April 7, 2023 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families, please .

Hello,

Well, it didn’t take long. **The same day I announced that I was running again in a rematch against Lauren Boebert, the smear campaign from her national Republican allies began.**

It’s no mystery why: Last year, I lost to Boebert by only 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. And unless they lie about me and smear my name on every TV across the district, they know we’re going to win in 2024.

Here’s the thing, though. I’m not running to represent myself like Boebert. I’m not going to be a part of the circus in Washington. I’m running because the people of Western and Southern Colorado deserve someone in Congress who will wake up every day ready to work for them and their families – not corporate PAC donors.

I’m ready to put forward a positive vision for our district and our country, but I need your help to make sure we don’t get drowned out by Boebert’s lies.
**We’ve set a goal of getting 50,000 Founding Donors to our campaign so we have the resources we need to win, but right now we’re still short. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so I’m counting on you to chip in now:**

I am honored to receive the endorsement of my friend and fellow Christian Patriot, David Botkins. My wife, Tracy, and I had the honor of touring Israel for ten days with David and 56 other members of our Church. Together, we will bring people together in ten counties and win the nomination May 6!

-David Botkins

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I'm officially running for reelection to the United States Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Hi Derek -- I have exciting news to share, and I wanted you to hear it from me:
**I'm officially running for reelection to the United States Senate.**
I know the road ahead won't always be easy -- election experts are already calling me one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats on the ballot next year. But with you by my side, I know we can get this done and win big next November.
**[Derek, will you help me start the first day of our reelection in the strongest position by splitting a donation between my campaign in Wisconsin and John Fetterman today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230412-1?refcode=em20230412-1-8331&refcode2=8331_434096_3rGebR&akid=8331%2E434096%2E3rGebR)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230412-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230412-8331&refcode2=8331_434096_3rGebR&akid=8331%2E434096%2E3rGebR)**
I'm so proud of the progress we've made in the Senate over the past few years, Derek. We've lowered the price of prescription drugs, addressed the climate crisis with landmark investment in clean energy, expanded health care for millions of our veterans, and so much more.
A highlight of my time in the Senate was when the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , my bipartisan bill to protect marriage equality, was signed into law late last year. That's a moment I will never forget.
But there's a lot more to be done, and I'm not willing to give up the fight to make things easier, better, safer, and stronger for hard-working Wisconsinites.
We have to protect Social Security and Medicare for millions of hard-working seniors who deserve the benefits they've spent their lives working towards.
We need to defend voting rights and protect access to the ballot box -- we've seen the harmful impacts of right-wing extremists who try to deny election results and take away Americans' right to safely and securely participate in elections.
And we need to re-establish protections for abortion access. After Roe v. Wade was overturned, I was devastated and angry, and I'm sure you were too. Wisconsin just took a huge first step in the right direction with our Supreme Court race last week, but we still have a long way to go toward making sure every woman has the freedom to make her own decisions no matter what zip code she lives in.
I remain hopeful that we can do all of this -- and more -- together. But it won't be easy, especially if Republicans have it their way. Their views are becoming more out-of-touch and dangerous by the day, and I know for sure that they will come after my Senate seat with everything they've got. They're already spending big on misleading ads attacking my record.
**But with you by my side, I know we can win. We've done it before, together, and I wouldn't want to have it any other way this time around.**
**[Will you stand by me again and split a contribution between my reelection campaign and John Fetterman? It'd mean the world to me to have you with me from Day One.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230412-1?refcode=em20230412-1-8331&refcode2=8331_434096_3rGebR&akid=8331%2E434096%2E3rGebR)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230412-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230412-8331&refcode2=8331_434096_3rGebR&akid=8331%2E434096%2E3rGebR)**
Thank you so much, Derek. I can't wait to see you on the campaign trail, and I promise I'll keep you updated on every step of this journey. So excited for what's in store for us.
I'm so glad to have you on this historic team.
Let's do this.
-- Tammy
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230412-1?refcode=em20230412-1-8331&refcode2=8331_434096_3rGebR&akid=8331%2E434096%2E3rGebR)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230412-8331-footer&t=1&refcode2=8331_434096_3rGebR&akid=8331%2E434096%2E3rGebR)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8331%2E434096%2E3rGebR)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8331%2E434096%2E3rGebR)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.
clean_body: Hi Derek -- I have exciting news to share, and I wanted you to hear it from me: I'm officially running for reelection to the United States Senate. I know the road ahead won't always be easy -- election experts are already calling me one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats on the ballot next year. But with you by my side, I know we can get this done and win big next November. I'm so proud of the progress we've made in the Senate over the past few years, Derek. We've lowered the price of prescription drugs, addressed the climate crisis with landmark investment in clean energy, expanded health care for millions of our veterans, and so much more. A highlight of my time in the Senate was when the Respect for Marriage Act , my bipartisan bill to protect marriage equality, was signed into law late last year. That's a moment I will never forget. But there's a lot more to be done, and I'm not willing to give up the fight to make things easier, better, safer, and stronger for hard-working Wisconsinites. We have to protect Social Security and Medicare for millions of hard-working seniors who deserve the benefits they've spent their lives working towards. We need to defend voting rights and protect access to the ballot box -- we've seen the harmful impacts of right-wing extremists who try to deny election results and take away Americans' right to safely and securely participate in elections. And we need to re-establish protections for abortion access. After Roe v. Wade was overturned, I was devastated and angry, and I'm sure you were too. Wisconsin just took a huge first step in the right direction with our Supreme Court race last week, but we still have a long way to go toward making sure every woman has the freedom to make her own decisions no matter what zip code she lives in. I remain hopeful that we can do all of this -- and more -- together. But it won't be easy, especially if Republicans have it their way. Their views are becoming more out-of-touch and dangerous by the day, and I know for sure that they will come after my Senate seat with everything they've got. They're already spending big on misleading ads attacking my record. But with you by my side, I know we can win. We've done it before, together, and I wouldn't want to have it any other way this time around. Thank you so much, Derek. I can't wait to see you on the campaign trail, and I promise I'll keep you updated on every step of this journey. So excited for what's in store for us. I'm so glad to have you on this historic team. Let's do this. -- Tammy | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

Only a few delegates and senators who have previously been in office are we endorsing...

It's never been understood as the 30 year corrupt enterprise it is - except for those on both sides of the aisle who designed it that way.

So for Virginians For Children First to endorse someone seeking reelection or to run for a Senate seat as a delegate ...

It means they were humble enough to listen, absorb and commit to doing things differently.

None of us are perfect, but the time has come for our elected officials to stand out and stand alone if they have to to do WHAT IS RIGHT for our children

So we proudly endorse John McGuire for the new Senate District 10

We can only save the children of the Commonwealth and thus the fate of the nation if we get "the right" RIGHT!

body:
New York City District Attorney Alvin Bragg has declared war on President Trump and the American people.

New York City District Attorney Alvin Bragg has declared war on President Trump and the American people. | | | | | [ ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c0539778f3264d66b55bc2825947829e&_e=IHO9cnobRAjHYwgLP7lzc-NmHerKwm3qex94r7feZTOELiGVIMsQslkyflRTwpRUqb66yteoYAzijDdUesd4CzA-GQeQkS3OAGNJVlCtOFQx5Y9F_91iJR5Ylr384wfCq5uCjxkU8IMJFUDC_wNodPi9wWgeOKUj_4fOsRG-ZxRAjIVbiezxpi822Vhx8m-kjtQ30cQp6lrxFxg9PQYY6O-iGrsooa2-ztCSe9g6EF5M2QkJW6xniOUmktMr8q8qLyIs9XdisMROxU97ey88KTKAfYtl4c-GPn0IEB0Bs4pBnujZ4Ww48gpPucUrVGkC)

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c0539778f3264d66b55bc2825947829e&_e=IHO9cnobRAjHYwgLP7lzc-NmHerKwm3qex94r7feZTOELiGVIMsQslkyflRTwpRUqb66yteoYAzijDdUesd4CzA-GQeQkS3OAGNJVlCtOFQx5Y9F_91iJR5Ylr384wfCq5uCjxkU8IMJFUDC_wNodPi9wWgeOKUj_4fOsRG-ZxQY96MZe6q3abqXWXRGZrkHXX6m932sQzfzB5X6rmTqDRA3m6klGCvBabzNb2Pwwn2E3DL29vjNkaxDHWgztyFxRGUH17GM4MyhRk-oox1nYoZBS-7TVvDYaqZ4JpHhf5Ur44ZnECwpmH5Xlj9sVzc6)Dear Patriot,

New York City District Attorney Alvin Bragg has declared war on President Trump and the American people.

**Like I told you yesterday, this shocking indictment threatens the rule of law, honest elections, and the future of our country.**

What's more, what District Attorney Bragg has done is **ILLEGAL.**

So once again, Freedom Watch turns to its Citizens' Grand Jury. We're going to seek a criminal indictment against Alvin Bragg for his crime...and we're going to seek justice, peacefully and legally.

[ **Patriot, please help Freedom Watch fully fund this critically important effort with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY.** ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c0539778f3264d66b55bc2825947829e&_e=IHO9cnobRAjHYwgLP7lzc-NmHerKwm3qex94r7feZTOELiGVIMsQslkyflRTwpRUqb66yteoYAzijDdUesd4CzA-GQeQkS3OAGNJVlCtOFQx5Y9F_91iJR5Ylr384wfCq5uCjxkU8IMJFUDC_wNodPi9wWgeOKUj_4fOsRG-ZxTSZ_1ASmZ0jL9piTB_xun2XjVMlgNhXj0aUZFhVfERBLCPtQKrq1Vb84Je4BsHZI_LcCdkiCBRHGHQlsCugu0bz4n-K9O5cFgKLMyOcPioJUxk4XhYP9pJUzssTA44QG1qbYT-e7pdhw77fll6B6U-)

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch. **

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years. You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I 'm the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime. And the only lawyer to enjoin the National Security Agency from conducting mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of American citizens. **

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and WIN.**

[ **The time to act is now. Please help us fully fund our fight against the injustice of Biden 's corrupt regime. ** ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c0539778f3264d66b55bc2825947829e&_e=IHO9cnobRAjHYwgLP7lzc-NmHerKwm3qex94r7feZTOELiGVIMsQslkyflRTwpRUqb66yteoYAzijDdUesd4CzA-GQeQkS3OAGNJVlCtOFQx5Y9F_91iJR5Ylr384wfCq5uCjxkU8IMJFUDC_wNodPi9wWgeOKUj_4fOsRG-ZxS3yuQBZ3DFPNSBCLiGG9asjQAJQYtBXMEIRODqBju-ps1lsTfwihqLtgiqvWYKO_CV0-QHKXSmWOFHpLZmw04jW2cCRJbm-y6AGDBeX_YlNdCC9YYGo_aLCY3HQhsOK352d_RxdNgzsiP82Mb8ITGf)

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. With the help of you and this grassroots team, we made history last November – flipping four chambers, adding three new Democratic trifectas, and defending every single majority. **But we can’t take our foot off the gas now – the stakes are too high.**
State Democrats are facing a slew of special elections over the next month – and the Virginia House and Senate are in play this November.
**Electing Democratic leaders who will support President Biden’s agenda in statehouses across the country is _critical_ to building a better future in your state. But it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to own a piece of this fight and give state Democrats the resources they need to go toe-to-toe against their Republican opponents. **
As an official member, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight to defeat extremist state Republicans, helping elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future in your state. **So can we count you in?**

name: Brittany Pettersen
subject: The egregious court ruling on abortion pills
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brittany Pettersen for Colorado
body:
I’m going to be candid about this, Team. The decision by a Texas judge to revoke access to abortion pills is a disaster for women.

I’m going to be candid about this, Team. The decision by a Texas judge to revoke access to abortion pills is a disaster for women. As of right now, this ruling has not yet taken effect, and you can still access mifepristone if you need to. But if this ruling holds, it will mean thousands of women — in states across the nation — will lose access to an extremely safe form of abortion care. Fundamentally, it will mean more women lose access to the basic right to decide what they do with their own bodies. **Let me be very clear about this: rulings like this are only possible because we lost elections that paved the way for the appointment of far-right, extremist judges to the bench. If we’re going to un-rig our judiciary — and pass legislation to reinstate the right to choose — then we need to win the next election, Team. That is the simple reality of the situation we’re in.** **[So that’s why I’m coming to you right now, Team. I am asking for your help to protect this seat, retake our Democratic majority in the House, and undo this dangerous assault on the right to safe reproductive health care. Will you stand with me today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61698322/400882150/533534233?refcode=email_041223_txabortionruling&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjJhM2EyYS01OWQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mGObHSTIrIzlUth-bk6-zqYxC4vu2Cjl75dyKXvRkK4=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61698323/400882151/533534233?refcode=email_041223_txabortionruling&express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjJhM2EyYS01OWQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mGObHSTIrIzlUth-bk6-zqYxC4vu2Cjl75dyKXvRkK4=)

When I was elected to Congress, I promised I would do everything within my power to defend every American’s basic rights, including the right to choose.
I am going to continue to do exactly that. I will continue fighting to prevent this outrageous, and legally meritless, ruling from taking effect, and I will continue fighting to restore the basic right to abortion that the Supreme Court took away last year.
We’ve got a long way to go, but we know the vast majority of the American people are on our side. If we work together, we will succeed.
Thank you for keeping up the fight,
Brittany

Fundamentally, it will mean more women lose access to the basic right to decide what they do with their own bodies. Let me be very clear about this: rulings like this are only possible because we lost elections that paved the way for the appointment of far-right, extremist judges to the bench. If we’re going to un-rig our judiciary — and pass legislation to reinstate the right to choose — then we need to win the next election, Team. That is the simple reality of the situation we’re in. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = When I was elected to Congress, I promised I would do everything within my power to defend every American’s basic rights, including the right to choose. I am going to continue to do exactly that. I will continue fighting to prevent this outrageous, and legally meritless, ruling from taking effect, and I will continue fighting to restore the basic right to abortion that the Supreme Court took away last year. We’ve got a long way to go, but we know the vast majority of the American people are on our side. If we work together, we will succeed. Thank you for keeping up the fight, Brittany | Email is a great way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to . Paid for by Brittany Pettersen for Colorado. Brittany Pettersen for Colorado P.O. Box 150887 Lakewood, CO 80215 United States

name: Tammy Duckworth
subject: The stakes are high, friends
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association
body:
We must fight for the social safety net millions of Americans depend upon.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/3g-FnSozsD9tnut2i9jl7e69V7Acb608-ceKc1EmAJU=/eM6eOq_MKMSqEJxyAIh6MnwO9fbceM5MtZisTzbSkHI=?refcode=EM_FR_230412Duckworth_SD_full_6_NG_N_Logo)
Friends,

Growing up, my family relied on the social safety net that Republicans across the country are trying to eliminate.

You may already know my story. My father lost his job in his 50s, and we survived with the help of food stamps and the generosity of others, but there were still months when the food stamps ran out early and we didn't have enough to eat. This was a tough time for our family, but we managed to survive.

Then, when I was 16, I became the only member of my immediate family with a job. By selling roses on the side of the road for 25 cents each and taking on other odd jobs, I helped pull my family out of poverty -- and developed a deep-seated appreciation both for the social safety net that helped keep my family afloat and for just how hard so many Americans have to work to survive, pay their rent, and put food on the table.

**[Now, the very social safety net that kept my family above water is at risk because extremists in the House GOP are willing to take our nation to the brink of economic collapse to force a standoff over drastic cuts. Will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and the IDCCA to fuel my efforts in Washington, elect Democrats up and down the ballot in Illinois, and protect our nation from the GOP's extremist agenda?](https://act.myngp.com/el/3g-FnSozsD9tnut2i9jl7e69V7Acb608-ceKc1EmAJU=/eM6eOq_MKMSqEJxyAIh6MnwO9fbceM5MtZisTzbSkHI=?refcode=EM_FR_230412Duckworth_SD_full_6_NG_N_L1&amount=10)**

_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Senator Tammy Duckworth and the IDCCA will go through immediately._ [**$5**](https://act.myngp.com/el/3g-FnSozsD9tnut2i9jl7e69V7Acb608-ceKc1EmAJU=/eM6eOq_MKMSqEJxyAIh6MnwO9fbceM5MtZisTzbSkHI=?refcode=EM_FR_230412Duckworth_SD_full_6_NG_N_B1&express_lane=true&amount=5) [**$10**](https://act.myngp.com/el/3g-FnSozsD9tnut2i9jl7e69V7Acb608-ceKc1EmAJU=/eM6eOq_MKMSqEJxyAIh6MnwO9fbceM5MtZisTzbSkHI=?refcode=EM_FR_230412Duckworth_SD_full_6_NG_N_B2&express_lane=true&amount=10) [**$25**](https://act.myngp.com/el/3g-FnSozsD9tnut2i9jl7e69V7Acb608-ceKc1EmAJU=/eM6eOq_MKMSqEJxyAIh6MnwO9fbceM5MtZisTzbSkHI=?refcode=EM_FR_230412Duckworth_SD_full_6_NG_N_B3&express_lane=true&amount=25) [**$50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/3g-FnSozsD9tnut2i9jl7e69V7Acb608-ceKc1EmAJU=/eM6eOq_MKMSqEJxyAIh6MnwO9fbceM5MtZisTzbSkHI=?refcode=EM_FR_230412Duckworth_SD_full_6_NG_N_B4&express_lane=true&amount=50) [**$102**](https://act.myngp.com/el/3g-FnSozsD9tnut2i9jl7e69V7Acb608-ceKc1EmAJU=/eM6eOq_MKMSqEJxyAIh6MnwO9fbceM5MtZisTzbSkHI=?refcode=EM_FR_230412Duckworth_SD_full_6_NG_N_B5&express_lane=true&amount=102) [**CHIP IN**](https://act.myngp.com/el/3g-FnSozsD9tnut2i9jl7e69V7Acb608-ceKc1EmAJU=/eM6eOq_MKMSqEJxyAIh6MnwO9fbceM5MtZisTzbSkHI=?refcode=EM_FR_230412Duckworth_SD_full_6_NG_N_B6&amount=other) What Republicans are doing is not limited to Washington. Throughout Illinois, local Republicans have pushed to reduce or eliminate social safety nets that are designed to help our most vulnerable. That's why the work of the IDCCA and our local County Chairs is vitally important. Just look at our recent municipal elections, where fringe groups and their candidates pushed their agenda of intolerance.

**[Since my first term in Congress, the IDCCA has been right there beside me-- supporting me and my fellow Democrats. The IDCCA is instrumental in electing Democrats up and down the ballot in Illinois. If you're ready to keep working in Illinois and Washington, please split a donation between my grassroots campaign and the IDCCA today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/3g-FnSozsD9tnut2i9jl7e69V7Acb608-ceKc1EmAJU=/eM6eOq_MKMSqEJxyAIh6MnwO9fbceM5MtZisTzbSkHI=?refcode=EM_FR_230412Duckworth_SD_full_6_NG_N_L2)**

Thank you,

Sen. Tammy Duckworth

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: TikTok
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
You’ve probably heard rumblings about the possibility of a nation-wide ban on TikTok.
Alexandria recently shared her thoughts on data privacy and why she does not believe that TikTok should be banned.
[Before we share her reasons below, do you agree that TikTok should _not_ be banned? Take our short poll here to share your thoughts. ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/tik-tok-poll/?source=em20230412-4120-P_ENG_SUR_MIS&t=1&akid=4120%2E2526796%2ERbWPEV)
**[Take our TikTok Poll →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/tik-tok-poll/?source=em20230412-4120-P_ENG_SUR_MIS&t=2&akid=4120%2E2526796%2ERbWPEV)**
**Here’s a quick recap of why Alexandria believes that TikTok should NOT be banned.**
1. **It would be unprecedented:** The United States has never before banned a social media company from operating in its borders. This app has over _150 million_ Americans on it.

2. **A ban does not address the core issue:** Some of the arguments about banning TikTok are around Chinese surveillance and the utilization of data that is tracked on U.S. citizens. They say because of this data harvesting, we should ban the app. However, major social media companies like Facebook are allowed to collect troves of deeply personal data about you that you don’t know about — without any significant regulation once so ever. The U.S. is the only developed nation in the world that has no significant data or privacy protection laws on the books.

3. **We need real protection:** The solution is not to ban a specific company, but to actually protect Americans from this kind of egregious data harvesting by companies without your ability to say no.

4. **Putting the cart before the horse:** Congress has not received a classified briefing around the allegations of the national security risks regarding TikTok. Why would we be proposing a ban around such a significant issue without being clued in on this at all?

5. **This case needs to be made to the public:** We are a government for and by the people. If we want to make a decision as significant as banning TikTok and someone believes that there’s information about why such a decision would be justified, that information should be shared with the public as well.

No matter what, our first priority should be protecting your ability to exist without social media companies harvesting and commodifying every single piece of data about you without your consent.
[**We want to know if you agree with Alexandria. Please take our short TikTok poll here to share your thoughts so we can get a pulse on how our movement feels on this topic.**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/tik-tok-poll/?source=em20230412-4120-P_ENG_SUR_MIS&t=3&akid=4120%2E2526796%2ERbWPEV)
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20230412-4120-P_ENG_SUR_MIS&t=4&refcode2=4120_2526796_RbWPEV&akid=4120%2E2526796%2ERbWPEV)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230412-4120-P_ENG_SUR_MIS&t=5&akid=4120%2E2526796%2ERbWPEV)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=6&akid=4120%2E2526796%2ERbWPEV) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=7&akid=4120%2E2526796%2ERbWPEV) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=8&akid=4120%2E2526796%2ERbWPEV)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=9&akid=4120%2E2526796%2ERbWPEV)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=4120%2E2526796%2ERbWPEV)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Katie Porter
subject: Clarence Thomas and those yacht trips
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
There are things we can do to clean up corruption.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=21057%2E3422442%2E1DEOPD)
Right now, our Supreme Court doesn’t just lean conservative, it’s straight up corrupt.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230412-1?refcode=EMAG12_1_CLA_20230412_V1_F&refcode2=21057_3422442_1DEOPD&akid=21057%2E3422442%2E1DEOPD)
Justice Thomas should be held accountable for breaking disclosure laws, but the court needs serious reforms so that justices aren’t taking donor-funded yacht trips in the first place.
**We should implement term limits, work to get politics out of our judicial system, and implement a judicial code of ethics—it’s appalling that we don’t already have one!**
I’m running for Senate because those in power need to be held accountable to the people they’re supposed to serve. Whether it’s Members of Congress trading stocks based on information we learn in private briefings, or lobbyists swaying votes with their checkbook, I’m fighting to clean up corruption through real, substantive legislation.
[**Can you join our fight? We’re running a people powered campaign, and our average donation is $36—can you chip in $36 or whatever makes sense for you today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230412-1?amount=36&refcode=EMAG12_1_CLA_20230412_V1_F&refcode2=21057_3422442_1DEOPD&akid=21057%2E3422442%2E1DEOPD)
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230412-1?refcode=EMAG12_1_CLA_20230412_V1_F&refcode2=21057_3422442_1DEOPD&akid=21057%2E3422442%2E1DEOPD)**
Onward!
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. clean_body: There are things we can do to clean up corruption. Right now, our Supreme Court doesn’t just lean conservative, it’s straight up corrupt. Justice Thomas should be held accountable for breaking disclosure laws, but the court needs serious reforms so that justices aren’t taking donor-funded yacht trips in the first place. We should implement term limits, work to get politics out of our judicial system, and implement a judicial code of ethics—it’s appalling that we don’t already have one! I’m running for Senate because those in power need to be held accountable to the people they’re supposed to serve. Whether it’s Members of Congress trading stocks based on information we learn in private briefings, or lobbyists swaying votes with their checkbook, I’m fighting to clean up corruption through real, substantive legislation. Onward! Katie Porter Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma.

| | We are heartbroken to announce that** Sgt. Daniel Perry has been found guilty**, leaving his family and all of us in shock. Despite this devastating news, we refuse to give up. We believe in Daniel's innocence and are determined to fight for justice. A strong appeal can turn the tide in his favor, but we need your help. Your generous support will not only fund Daniel's legal appeal but also help us raise awareness about his case. Together, we can make a difference in his fight for justice. **As Tucker notes in his segment, the Austin Police concluded it was a justified act of self-defense!** Please join us in supporting Daniel and his family during this challenging time. Pray for them and consider making a contribution to the cause. Don't wait - every dollar and prayer counts. Dig deep for Daniel and stand with us in the fight for justice. **Don 't Let Black Lives Matter Murder This Soldier!** In July, 2020 in Austin, Texas, a Black Lives Matter maniac started to point his AK-47 rifle at Army Sergeant Daniel Perry. **Sergeant Perry responded immediately, firing in self-defense with his legally carried revolver, and stopped his attacker.** Then another member of the rabid BLM mob tried to murder Perry, firing four times at him, striking his car with three bullets. But a George Soros-backed district attorney targeted Daniel - and now the verdict :( **Please don 't let that leftist prosecutor finish the job that Black Lives Matter started -- save Sergeant Perry's life by fully funding his critically important legal defense with your crucial gift of any amount NOW!**

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: End the weaponization of police power in America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
It's time to stop complaining and actually fix the problem without apology.

| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=99367d8cbcce4e0ca39dbc351d952b77&_e=BdcvdmlRt-NFavU7uBdSqZkaUuq1CWR2PGmb6ZP_AYKayt6lQDRUE2M1z1-sM7fn8BasPnMKhjgjqf8UrrKJ2n45nwbWn6ErJgVM8WhEKRKwzBHQJhTSH_-7fNlFvVPbou_tDpPrDV_0Xsb7KtgqH_quYAJ8pT-lqQlyv3--XBL8a3-CN4H5I9WHPfB0uVkkB8v2PBqO_jLq-rK6CCMtjcSchsyewiPM_9rul5pWOts9QixAflQpezwnFknaXIGEJ9Qme9rhWFdqg8_obfewD7FKIgoYQ2hQLQrUMG0ScGREN-xG0e0Be17ySZ3LALXsTGekxlUTkpYC8_4lAglCLUlyQm0rYDrXEuAlF6w1iPvIise67aupwgILNYogWgfF)
Fellow American -

Over the course of this election, I am laying my vision for an American national revival.

Here's one promise for you: I will end the weaponization of police power in America.

Time to stop complaining and actually *fix* the problem without apology.
1. Shut down + replace the FBI
2. Shut down + replace the IRS
3. Pardon all federal defendants prosecuted based on political motives. This includes Douglass Mackey & nonviolent January 6 defendants denied due process
4. Hold Congress accountable for taxpayer $$ used as hush money for sexual harassment claims
5. Publish the Jeffrey Epstein client list: the police state can't be weaponized to protect a select few.

Fellow American, if you agree, and want these policies debated on the main stage of the Republican Presidential Primary, then I need your help. **[Chip in $1 to build this movement toward our American revival.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=99367d8cbcce4e0ca39dbc351d952b77&_e=BdcvdmlRt-NFavU7uBdSqZkaUuq1CWR2PGmb6ZP_AYKayt6lQDRUE2M1z1-sM7fn8BasPnMKhjgjqf8UrrKJ2n45nwbWn6ErJgVM8WhEKRKwzBHQJhTSH_-7fNlFvVPbou_tDpPrDV_0Xsb7KtgqH_quYAJ8pT-lqQlyv3--XBL8a3-CN4H5I9WHPfB0uVkkB8v2PBqO_jLq-rK6CCMtjTkY3KImELaahpdjX5s0k6c0Crt3AheWkkH7sXJ1r6T9GdGDujLUG9CYY3oV3Qm-OUE6g566ziYDih1hbvgx8ZA2dBJt_7tXbl9ZuskQ5kC4vIP9bPRRlI6KA2kmt5DsaGUECvXdphLFGi83H2RzEwX2UOrv8oDh9M_bfbOYKudI)**
