---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=99367d8cbcce4e0ca39dbc351d952b77&_e=BdcvdmlRt-NFavU7uBdSqZkaUuq1CWR2PGmb6ZP_AYKayt6lQDRUE2M1z1-sM7fn8BasPnMKhjgjqf8UrrKJ2n45nwbWn6ErJgVM8WhEKRKwzBHQJhTSH_-7fNlFvVPbou_tDpPrDV_0Xsb7KtgqH_quYAJ8pT-lqQlyv3--XBL8a3-CN4H5I9WHPfB0uVkkB8v2PBqO_jLq-rK6CCMtjd0mIc2EmpP4JhY3vlHq5i9K7vaIGyiLA4PlEo-ODOW7ktfzFFFFGnvaflGzhZHLnror1fYbeoOx40Ua5Yfb97UHRrm76oT69cFbt1_UPCuwUXvHZWnvvRQPmKUWeCy1TbBARm0xky3yhJgevdIEEypJbhsSl3-twFCPI5lgKlGd)

body:
What should we discuss at my next town hall event? |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61702221/400886237/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWNmNjdkNC01YmQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SFn9a1S-3XkWEcEH7fMiQDZJoUgZktHLc7F4IODSJWA=)
Folks — On Monday night, I had the opportunity to host a town hall with my colleague, Representative Brittany Pettersen. Throughout my time in Congress, I've made it my priority to pass legislation that helps working Coloradans — so it was a pleasure to hear from everyone who joined us about the issues that matter most to them. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61702222/400886254/-574737188?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWNmNjdkNC01YmQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SFn9a1S-3XkWEcEH7fMiQDZJoUgZktHLc7F4IODSJWA=&emci=f60c407d-a3d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=d5cf67d4-5bd9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1295540) We covered a wide range of topics — from the bipartisan legislation that will rebuild our state's infrastructure to holding Big Tech accountable to positioning Colorado as a leader in the fight against climate change. [**However, we weren't able to cover everything. That's why I want to hear from you about what we should cover at our next town hall. Can you take a moment to fill out this survey so I can address your questions next time?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61702223/400886255/-574737188?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWNmNjdkNC01YmQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SFn9a1S-3XkWEcEH7fMiQDZJoUgZktHLc7F4IODSJWA=&emci=f60c407d-a3d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=d5cf67d4-5bd9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1295540) | **[COMPLETE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61702227/400886256/-574737188?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWNmNjdkNC01YmQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SFn9a1S-3XkWEcEH7fMiQDZJoUgZktHLc7F4IODSJWA=&emci=f60c407d-a3d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=d5cf67d4-5bd9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1295540)**

I do everything I can to carry Colorado voices to Washington and deliver real change for working families in our state; I want to make sure the issues you care about the most are at the top of my list.
Your feedback in this survey will help me and my team plan our next town hall.

Throughout my time in Congress, I've made it my priority to pass legislation that helps working Coloradans — so it was a pleasure to hear from everyone who joined us about the issues that matter most to them. We covered a wide range of topics — from the bipartisan legislation that will rebuild our state's infrastructure to holding Big Tech accountable to positioning Colorado as a leader in the fight against climate change. | I do everything I can to carry Colorado voices to Washington and deliver real change for working families in our state; I want to make sure the issues you care about the most are at the top of my list. | | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGPmzAQhX-NuYHM2Bhz4LCpy6GpeqnUzS0yHpPMChsEZtH--4oo2ev3nkbv09gwjzR8taw-MYA74coAmHhjAGd5uvxR5_ezyd_-BZ8bVcn9SOEHA0hfs_-uPq8UPlgaD1qbDFtwGpzLfFsqXQqAWlfZveUNr_qm17KXvWoGXqOWTV9ZVK5BxTGjFjgILksoNVcABeeDQ5S17Wuue4tM8p1igVO0I36kZQtz4aaQje09pXl9TOoYdKt32-KLneLi8WgczH763Aa_kLP5x0Qx5cMWcbG0UrzlbgqBUvKeQRfd6HQ18NKLUqCuHG-Y6LYUrsEjbYEJ8_RVB1ynbXGeCePoap_M2TBbukUmzMvplUwx-ZiYMFpVnIG6xpGQCfPrdEndpfn5-fcBHx8R5ret6rvR8j1bWpx3GkdaVc0kvx0LDrf_AQAA__-TJo0H)

Friend,
I will not let the Biden Administration slander me – especially on a matter as important as our national security and the defense of our men and women in uniform.
As your former Commander-in-Chief, I’m going to tell you the TRUTH about Afghanistan...
_**Joe Biden is SOLELY responsible for the grossly incompetent Afghanistan surrender.**_
I watched the disaster unfold just like you did. We all saw Biden pull out the military _BEFORE_ civilians, leave $85 BILLION in military equipment for the Taliban, and allow American soldiers to be killed.
Now, Putin has invaded Ukraine, Kim Jong-Un has restarted missile launches in North Korea, and Xi Jinping is plotting the invasion of Taiwan and sending Chinese spy balloons to collect intelligence from US military sites...
_...and it’s all because Biden showed the world he’s WEAK and INCOMPETENT!_
But as usual, the Hopeless Joe is blaming someone else for his mistakes and blunders - of which there are many!
**I want YOU to weigh in and tell the world which President you trust to keep America safe.**
**_POLL: Who do you trust to defend America?_** |

The world has become a much more dangerous place because of Joe Biden’s spineless “leadership” – _no matter how much he tries to cover it up by slandering me._
When I was President, our enemies feared us and our allies respected us.

Hi there — I have exciting news to share, and I wanted you to hear it from me:
**I’m officially running for reelection to the United States Senate.**

I’m so proud of the progress we’ve made in the Senate over the past few years, friend. We’ve lowered the price of prescription drugs, addressed the climate crisis with landmark investment in clean energy, expanded health care for millions of our veterans, and so much more.
A highlight of my time in the Senate was when the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , my bipartisan bill to protect marriage equality, was signed into law late last year. That’s a moment I will never forget. But there’s a lot more to be done, and I’m not willing to give up the fight to make things easier, better, safer, and stronger for hard-working Wisconsinites. We have to protect Social Security and Medicare for millions of hard-working seniors who deserve the benefits they’ve spent their lives working towards. We need to defend voting rights and protect access to the ballot box — we’ve seen the harmful impacts of right-wing extremists who try to deny election results and take away Americans’ right to safely and securely participate in elections. And we need to re-establish protections for abortion access. After _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned, I was devastated and angry, and I’m sure you were too. Wisconsin just took a huge first step in the right direction with our Supreme Court race last week, but we still have a long way to go toward making sure every woman has the freedom to make her own decisions no matter what zip code she lives in. I remain hopeful that we can do all of this — and more — together. But it won’t be easy, especially if Republicans have it their way. Their views are becoming more out-of-touch and dangerous by the day, and I know for sure that they will come after my Senate seat with everything they’ve got. They’re _already_ spending big on misleading ads attacking my record.
**Folks****, I’m no stranger to hard fights.** I’ve been standing up for Pennsylvania’s working families and communities for my whole career, and I won’t stop now. There’s still more work to do to cut through the gridlock, take on the powerful special interests, and deliver real results for working families and children across our commonwealth.
**But with you by my side, I know we can win. We’ve done it before, together, and I wouldn’t want to have it any other way this time around.**

body:
Senator Tammy Baldwin here!| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61704701/400889021/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Yzc5Zjc5NS01ZGQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=80kTQ0K2qZq_nN79vZObuCarxZwwuM4P-Ql7VTxfmyM=&emci=1713de7c-5dd9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=8c79f795-5dd9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1486204)

| | Hi Peter — Senator Tammy Baldwin here! **In a moment, I’m going to ask you to split a donation between my campaign for Senate in 2024 and Gwen Moore**. But first, I hope you will give me a chance to explain the stakes of this race, and why your support is so important, especially right now. Winning in Wisconsin isn’t easy. As you may remember, our state gave Donald Trump the final electoral votes he needed to secure the presidency in 2016. He won by less than _one point._ Then in 2020, President Biden won our state by just 0.6%. And last November, Republican Senator Ron Johnson won by just 1%. So it comes as no surprise that political pundits and pollsters are forecasting that our Senate race in 2024 will be one of the most competitive in the nation.**In fact,****_The Hill_****has already named me one of the most vulnerable Senate incumbents in 2024. ** So as Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans begin plotting their path to flip the Senate majority, rest assured that my seat will be one of their top targets. And with the White House also on the ballot, you can bet dollars to doughnuts that the GOP and their mega-donors will spend whatever it takes to try and flip our state red. We’ve got a tough fight ahead of us, and it will take a lot of time and resources to build the campaign we’ll need to win. I know this team has what it takes to beat right-wing mega-donors at their own game _(we’ve done it before!)_ but it’s going to take all of us working together, which is why I’m asking: [**Can you split a donation of $10 or more between my reelection campaign and Gwen Moore? It’d mean the world to us to have your support on Day One.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61704702/400889022/1470800948?refcode=041223&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Yzc5Zjc5NS01ZGQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=80kTQ0K2qZq_nN79vZObuCarxZwwuM4P-Ql7VTxfmyM=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61704703/400889023/1470800948?refcode=041223&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Yzc5Zjc5NS01ZGQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=80kTQ0K2qZq_nN79vZObuCarxZwwuM4P-Ql7VTxfmyM=)
---
Thank you so much for your continued support. Let’s do this! — Tammy
---
| | |
---
The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

clean_body: Senator Tammy Baldwin here!| | | | | Hi Peter — Senator Tammy Baldwin here! In a moment, I’m going to ask you to split a donation between my campaign for Senate in 2024 and Gwen Moore. But first, I hope you will give me a chance to explain the stakes of this race, and why your support is so important, especially right now. Winning in Wisconsin isn’t easy. As you may remember, our state gave Donald Trump the final electoral votes he needed to secure the presidency in 2016. He won by less than one point. Then in 2020, President Biden won our state by just 0.6%. And last November, Republican Senator Ron Johnson won by just 1%. So it comes as no surprise that political pundits and pollsters are forecasting that our Senate race in 2024 will be one of the most competitive in the nation.In fact,The Hillhas already named me one of the most vulnerable Senate incumbents in 2024. So as Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans begin plotting their path to flip the Senate majority, rest assured that my seat will be one of their top targets. And with the White House also on the ballot, you can bet dollars to doughnuts that the GOP and their mega-donors will spend whatever it takes to try and flip our state red. We’ve got a tough fight ahead of us, and it will take a lot of time and resources to build the campaign we’ll need to win. I know this team has what it takes to beat right-wing mega-donors at their own game (we’ve done it before!) but it’s going to take all of us working together, which is why I’m asking: = = Thank you so much for your continued support. Let’s do this! — Tammy | | | The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92. = | | | = | =| = ---|---|--- Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress Gwen Moore for Congress P.O. Box 16646 c/o Evans & Katz Milwaukee, WI 53216 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61705163/400889493/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTczYjZlZS01ZGQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dnJqTJfb8HE-YkKKlOPiD1a1jaU1XNIqtltkKEkeEok=&emci=6cb17ef3-44d9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=4973b6ee-5dd9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) | Team, Since our founding in 2016, we’ve run campaigns in seven states to expand Medicaid when politicians refused to roll out coverage to their constituents stuck in the coverage gap – _and seven times, voters stood by our side and decisively secured their access to health care._ _As a result of these winning campaigns, we’ve helped deliver Medicaid coverage to over 1 MILLION Americans across the country_. [SUPPORT MEDICAID EXPANSION](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61705164/400889494/-721321771?refcode=E20901-20230412-MedicaidClips-SB-Healthcare-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTczYjZlZS01ZGQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dnJqTJfb8HE-YkKKlOPiD1a1jaU1XNIqtltkKEkeEok=) _We are so proud of what we’ve been able to accomplish these past 7 years thanks to your support – but, team, our work is far from finished: _ _[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61705165/400889495/-721321771?refcode=E20901-20230412-MedicaidClips-graphic-Healthcare-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTczYjZlZS01ZGQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dnJqTJfb8HE-YkKKlOPiD1a1jaU1XNIqtltkKEkeEok=)_**In Mississippi, rural hospitals are on the brink of financial ruin due to the state’s continued refusal of federal funding to expand Medicaid coverage. As a result, these hospitals are forced to shoulder the costs of providing care to uninsured patients who would otherwise be eligible for Medicaid coverage. ** And Mississippi’s not alone, team. According to the American Hospital Association, _nearly 75% of rural hospital closures between 2010 and 2021 were in states that refused to adopt Medicaid expansion, or had only just recently adopted it._ **With 10 states remaining who still refuse federal funds, the need to expand Medicaid has never been clearer.** [**That’s why we’re on the frontlines of the fight to guarantee Medicaid coverage for working people across the country. As we gear up for the 2023 and 2024 campaign seasons, and as more Medicaid ballot measures could potentially be on the way, will you donate today to fuel our efforts to give working people in America the health coverage they need?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61705166/400889496/-2066633540?refcode=E20901-20230412-MedicaidClips-SL-Healthcare-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTczYjZlZS01ZGQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dnJqTJfb8HE-YkKKlOPiD1a1jaU1XNIqtltkKEkeEok=) The good news, team, is that time and time again, _the voters have shown they’re with us_. Just last month, in fact, North Carolina became the 40th state to adopt Medicaid expansion after extremist state legislatures finally capitulated to the will of North Carolina voters: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61705167/400889497/-721321771?refcode=E20901-20230412-MedicaidClips-graphic-Healthcare-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTczYjZlZS01ZGQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dnJqTJfb8HE-YkKKlOPiD1a1jaU1XNIqtltkKEkeEok=) This decision will deliver health insurance to hundreds of thousands of North Carolinians and provide much needed relief to the state’s rural hospitals. But while North Carolina has come around, extremists in the last 10 states are still adamant that they will not be accepting the expansion. [**That’s why we’re going to keep fighting in every state where we can expand Medicaid through ballot measures. Donate to fuel our fight to close the Medicaid coverage gap in 2023 and 2024!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61705168/400889498/-721321771?refcode=E20901-20230412-MedicaidClips-SL-Healthcare-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTczYjZlZS01ZGQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dnJqTJfb8HE-YkKKlOPiD1a1jaU1XNIqtltkKEkeEok=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately:_ | **[$15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61705169/400889499/-721321771?express_lane=true&refcode=E20901-20230412-MedicaidClips-EL-Healthcare-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTczYjZlZS01ZGQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dnJqTJfb8HE-YkKKlOPiD1a1jaU1XNIqtltkKEkeEok=)** | **[$25](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61705170/400889500/-721321771?express_lane=true&refcode=E20901-20230412-MedicaidClips-EL-Healthcare-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTczYjZlZS01ZGQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dnJqTJfb8HE-YkKKlOPiD1a1jaU1XNIqtltkKEkeEok=)**

clean_body: | | Team, Since our founding in 2016, we’ve run campaigns in seven states to expand Medicaid when politicians refused to roll out coverage to their constituents stuck in the coverage gap – and seven times, voters stood by our side and decisively secured their access to health care. As a result of these winning campaigns, we’ve helped deliver Medicaid coverage to over 1 MILLION Americans across the country. = We are so proud of what we’ve been able to accomplish these past 7 years thanks to your support – but, team, our work is far from finished: Mississippi, rural hospitals are on the brink of financial ruin due to the state’s continued refusal of federal funding to expand Medicaid coverage. As a result, these hospitals are forced to shoulder the costs of providing care to uninsured patients who would otherwise be eligible for Medicaid coverage. And Mississippi’s not alone, team. According to the American Hospital Association, nearly 75% of rural hospital closures between 2010 and 2021 were in states that refused to adopt Medicaid expansion, or had only just recently adopted it. With 10 states remaining who still refuse federal funds, the need to expand Medicaid has never been clearer. = The good news, team, is that time and time again, the voters have shown they’re with us. Just last month, in fact, North Carolina became the 40th state to adopt Medicaid expansion after extremist state legislatures finally capitulated to the will of North Carolina voters: = This decision will deliver health insurance to hundreds of thousands of North Carolinians and provide much needed relief to the state’s rural hospitals. But while North Carolina has come around, extremists in the last 10 states are still adamant that they will not be accepting the expansion. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Fairness Project Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 31 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions to the Fairness Project support its many efforts nationwide and any focus is at the Fairness Project’s sole discretion. Contributions will not necessarily be used to support activity in any one state. You can request to get only the most important emails from our team , or you can . Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project P.O. Box 21337 Washington, DC 20009 United States

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Theology 101
body:
I'm writing to let you know about something I think you'll find useful in your learning.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=667bff83a11b4e7f80a4e26e3e17ba59&_e=bGRAA8jp4Uw4kIe9bafYKEcZ-XA6GmhquO9iEmZft7lTsHWyRlcbjxaapwmuBEhi2dMdqUWvPSoCyXSwCDFqGcUnFd7kO_CpnhXaSK_J7oedtZlrnlRq3iqVdt7lBbkofkVaHod3hyoKeYSIErSuf6lXaAbxy5VibRU7UEJJ0vbpxu7r0I00HJ2l8RHh18wg4Cq84iYDVeOR59mXnWk_RpseieHfFr1smjxFhuJr7DVSE3aAy9gU82oy5VaC5PyOc6UtgKcXtr_Qx6BWOIjTykFRBvQ1T15GMGawasesnXQnVqSKADbEpOSwONlsPQ__gQ1eMXtOseE90bVlJ9EdtsmLm5aGB6mEGu45HTGNIAwj7TU7ffG4BRGVLsk8AA8CSzW1R9Edd5h9dMJgTfAwgKu45AqR3vHODeooWv2W8BXgSfpVJtYiIkp3GO8sv6ET) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I'm writing to let you know about something I think you'll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=667bff83a11b4e7f80a4e26e3e17ba59&_e=bGRAA8jp4Uw4kIe9bafYKEcZ-XA6GmhquO9iEmZft7lTsHWyRlcbjxaapwmuBEhi2dMdqUWvPSoCyXSwCDFqGcUnFd7kO_CpnhXaSK_J7oedtZlrnlRq3iqVdt7lBbkofkVaHod3hyoKeYSIErSuf6lXaAbxy5VibRU7UEJJ0vbpxu7r0I00HJ2l8RHh18wg4Cq84iYDVeOR59mXnWk_RpseieHfFr1smjxFhuJr7DVSE3aAy9gU82oy5VaC5PyOc6UtgKcXtr_Qx6BWOIjTykFRBvQ1T15GMGawasesnXQqXvuum3_QvRNqFh8vlNRBBfU3f8ZnsyGnTDL5TevEFe2X-x3v0nXUBbIGNTLxk1aKRokkcT5f2Y_OJxd_5535i-ad99cAXXNkgLdxZPxbPeBwdeg60yf_239_aC8CaRfnE9CUcfEW3mLrLGF9kYs1) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as "theology," has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that's what Hillsdale's **" Theology 101" **online course is about--the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**" Theology 101"** has been a popular course, so I'm pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=667bff83a11b4e7f80a4e26e3e17ba59&_e=bGRAA8jp4Uw4kIe9bafYKEcZ-XA6GmhquO9iEmZft7lTsHWyRlcbjxaapwmuBEhi2dMdqUWvPSoCyXSwCDFqGcUnFd7kO_CpnhXaSK_J7oedtZlrnlRq3iqVdt7lBbkofkVaHod3hyoKeYSIErSuf6lXaAbxy5VibRU7UEJJ0vbpxu7r0I00HJ2l8RHh18wg4Cq84iYDVeOR59mXnWk_RpseieHfFr1smjxFhuJr7DVSE3aAy9gU82oy5VaC5PyOc6UtgKcXtr_Qx6BWOIjTykFRBvQ1T15GMGawasesnXR_TKPytWI91smKqf9PiAmGnCFSGv5Qptb66zMMfypCKSkv0LlwdE3Q678L39DIGjHXRknZ9iax4uu2nkch0euDUWny1tee-3ITgov1vySDP9iT2Ta2zcYkjLkuYcqfJ6YOb7m9J2JfE-oShB8-2qVy). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though--and they go fast--so don't delay in getting your copy of **" Theology 101"** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=667bff83a11b4e7f80a4e26e3e17ba59&_e=bGRAA8jp4Uw4kIe9bafYKEcZ-XA6GmhquO9iEmZft7lTsHWyRlcbjxaapwmuBEhi2dMdqUWvPSoCyXSwCDFqGcUnFd7kO_CpnhXaSK_J7oedtZlrnlRq3iqVdt7lBbkofkVaHod3hyoKeYSIErSuf6lXaAbxy5VibRU7UEJJ0vbpxu7r0I00HJ2l8RHh18wg4Cq84iYDVeOR59mXnWk_RpseieHfFr1smjxFhuJr7DVSE3aAy9gU82oy5VaC5PyOc6UtgKcXtr_Qx6BWOIjTykFRBvQ1T15GMGawasesnXToL3YYzRi3O34qiMbL0kC3aSZZ4eeyT9XuoT2RT4wTIBqf9ZAe9MR0Frd7bMLRFkOS2EIt9_hAOJwFm9n3HScOakc7nFet-nmcMkBHQXwAl7hIgl6bgxlDqboqN2ogz714UvfcPpt-WsDJZmX--mFF)** Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Joe Shepherd, URD Founder
subject: It's been a while,
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
We need your help to keep our momentum going | | | Hey there – it’s Joe. I know that you may not have heard from me in a while, so I wanted to check in. First, I want to say thank you for continuing to support United Rural Democrats. When I first founded this organization, I had the support of my friends and family – all of whom lived in small rural towns that had often been left behind by both the Republican and Democratic parties. **Today, it’s almost unimaginable to me how URD has grown. I’ve driven almost 200,000 miles across the country to meet thousands of you.** We’ve endorsed and helped elect dozens of Democratic candidates – in some of the toughest races in the country. And we’ve seen incredible results of local, state, and federal representatives fighting for rural Americans. **The fight doesn’t stop here, Peter.** The 2023/2024 election season is heating up, and we don’t have any time to waste against the well-funded, well-prepared Republican Party. **I’ll be honest, Republicans have been laying the seeds to take back seats for years.** They’ve gerrymandered districts and sowed doubt in our very democracy. **_[But we have the power to turn that tide around. Will you support URD as we work to elect dozens of Democrats this election cycle, Peter?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2GcbJ9uB3_zC02xjt-DTIwu_oZpRUXqcy-yOG0uAxnpC1fx8xJtvNCH_WdC-F_1BMThSWUnPcsOwUoAdCCGqGRoIbGIBad6n8s7G1Pj65xGOQYPfj5FF1m1hZwEiFwrTUZW6xASDygI07iiCvVwg_va9HmT_UJNXj2_WsDPGQ6FstanMWk048ke1OkGkq0D0hzPFuyDReFmIezpb73w0ZwY1B78UHYQiGrbUU0LvfAuUjHj3kp3sJUlVUKmeyiLpph0YCCRYivOIQleoozzUhRs-lK6yflF9XI62wsqFS80vv8/3va/8ULothPGRkO3ZUCNGG3xqw/h0/-T1S5fSbhfiqo-3dNpJLZjX77h2fxHCP7xkZrl86uxA)_** clean_body: We need your help to keep our momentum going | | | Hey there – it’s Joe. I know that you may not have heard from me in a while, so I wanted to check in. First, I want to say thank you for continuing to support United Rural Democrats. When I first founded this organization, I had the support of my friends and family – all of whom lived in small rural towns that had often been left behind by both the Republican and Democratic parties. Today, it’s almost unimaginable to me how URD has grown. I’ve driven almost 200,000 miles across the country to meet thousands of you. We’ve endorsed and helped elect dozens of Democratic candidates – in some of the toughest races in the country. And we’ve seen incredible results of local, state, and federal representatives fighting for rural Americans. The fight doesn’t stop here, Peter. The 2023/2024 election season is heating up, and we don’t have any time to waste against the well-funded, well-prepared Republican Party. I’ll be honest, Republicans have been laying the seeds to take back seats for years. They’ve gerrymandered districts and sowed doubt in our very democracy. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: Thank you for your support. \- Joe United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?

clean_body: President Obama is using his voice to echo the importance of state legislatures. | | | | | President Obama is using his voice to amplify the critical importance of state legislatures: And no one would be better than President Obama – he served THREE terms in the Illinois State Senate! Here’s exactly why he’s so right: While legislation stalls on the federal level, state legislators are making key decisions about access to abortion, public education, health care services, and even decisions about the roads you drive on. Where Republicans have stripped their constituents of these rights, state Democrats have protected the right to choose, expanded early and absentee voting, and much, much more. Simply put, state Democrats are the last line of defense against GOP extremism. Let’s be honest: It’s kinda trash that billionaires and millionaire self-funders have had so much influence over this election.
Were you watching the debate last night? As Helen said on stage, a Mayor should run a city for public interest, NOT for billionaires.
We recently learned that one of our opponents has potentially solicited a million dollars from a billionaire who seeks to destroy public education. Furthermore, he’s also caught up in a severe ethics investigation involving illegal coordination with his super PAC.
Another opponent has literally dumped $7 MILLION of personal wealth into his own campaign coffers.
[**Enough is enough already. If you’re ready for a Mayor who will stand up for working people and not do the bidding of the ultra-wealthy, can Helen count on you to support our movement today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61706473/400890256/-73022071?refcode=AU_HHG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230412_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDAyOWViMy01ZmQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=coRsyrAzRwUlMYX66w8dZ351rNBfsJBG-7YfzLu7onM=)

Last night’s debate also made one thing very clear:
This election is a choice between people who are tinkering around the edges with ideas that are just too small for this moment, or someone like Helen who will never stop fighting for seismic change to make City Hall work for the people.
On the debate stage, Helen outlined her bold vision for safety and youth. She spoke about reducing 911 response times and expanding the mental health crisis units she helped create. She also highlighted her plans to guarantee jobs for young people, expand after-school programming, and support our youth.
[**If you agree that it’s kinda trash for our strong vision to be drowned out by millionaires and billionaires, please chip in to help us fight back.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61706480/400890263/-73022071?refcode=AU_HHG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230412_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDAyOWViMy01ZmQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=coRsyrAzRwUlMYX66w8dZ351rNBfsJBG-7YfzLu7onM=)

She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. On the debate stage, Helen outlined her bold vision for safety and youth. She spoke about reducing 911 response times and expanding the mental health crisis units she helped create. She also highlighted her plans to guarantee jobs for young people, expand after-school programming, and support our youth. = = No one has worked harder and no one will work harder than Helen to build a safer, stronger Philadelphia for all of us. – Team Helen P.S. Check out this fun gif we made from last night’s debate. = Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. If you’d like to donate to Helen and help elect her as Philadelphia’s next Mayor, click here: | = Friends of Helen Gym PO Box 11766 Philadelphia, PA 19101 United States | mailto:info@helengym.com Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym

Do you agree with the wide majority of Mississippians?** | [YES →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61706642/400891073/-736376100?refcode=ea.98012a05-60d9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.98012a05-60d9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTgwMTJhMDUtNjBkOS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tSIBWRAlIFs7Cx2d6_2DUzJc2mzf-cky8Sy5oEiv7XY=&emci=bc486d4e-4dd9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=98012a05-60d9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6059782) | [NO →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61706644/400891075/-736376100?refcode=ea.98012a05-60d9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.98012a05-60d9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTgwMTJhMDUtNjBkOS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tSIBWRAlIFs7Cx2d6_2DUzJc2mzf-cky8Sy5oEiv7XY=&emci=bc486d4e-4dd9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=98012a05-60d9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6059782)

* * *
Peter, extending Medicaid to working Mississippians is a no-brainer.

It helps save our hospitals that are in danger. It creates thousands of good jobs. It significantly grows our economic GDP and the population. And _sooo_ much more.

**Even 70% of Republicans agree that our state should accept federal funds to extend Medicaid!** This isn't a one-sided issue, folks.

So what’s the problem? You guessed it: Governor Tate Reeves.

Despite the desperate cry for help from our struggling hospitals and citizens, Tate Reeves uses every excuse in the book to reject funding time and again.

Tate would rather see our federal healthcare dollars go to Massachusetts, Michigan, and Maryland than Mississippi. It's a shame.

But we can’t let Tate’s self-serving agenda stop Mississippians from receiving quality healthcare. That’s why Tate’s got to go!

**I promise you this: when I’m Governor, we will get it done!**

**But until then, I need to know you’re with me on this, Peter. Do you agree with the wide majority of Mississippians that we should accept federal funds to extend Medicaid?**

Hi Peter — I have exciting news to share, and I wanted you to hear it from me: **I’m officially running for reelection to the United States Senate. ** I know the road ahead won’t always be easy — election experts are _already_ calling me one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats on the ballot next year. But with you by my side, I know we can get this done and win big next November. ---
I’m so proud of the progress we’ve made in the Senate over the past few years, Peter. We’ve lowered the price of prescription drugs, addressed the climate crisis with landmark investment in clean energy, expanded health care for millions of our veterans, and so much more.
A highlight of my time in the Senate was when the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , my bipartisan bill to protect marriage equality, was signed into law late last year. That’s a moment I will never forget.
But there’s a lot more to be done, and I’m not willing to give up the fight to make things easier, better, safer, and stronger for hard-working Wisconsinites.
We have to protect Social Security and Medicare for millions of hard-working seniors who deserve the benefits they’ve spent their lives working towards.
We need to defend voting rights and protect access to the ballot box — we’ve seen the harmful impacts of right-wing extremists who try to deny election results and take away Americans’ right to safely and securely participate in elections.
And we need to re-establish protections for abortion access. After _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned, I was devastated and angry, and I’m sure you were too. Wisconsin just took a huge first step in the right direction with our Supreme Court race last week, but we still have a long way to go toward making sure every woman has the freedom to make her own decisions no matter what zip code she lives in.
I remain hopeful that we can do all of this — and more — together. But it won’t be easy, especially if Republicans have it their way. Their views are becoming more out-of-touch and dangerous by the day, and I know for sure that they will come after my Senate seat with everything they’ve got. They’re _already_ spending big on misleading ads attacking my record.
**But with you by my side, I know we can win. We’ve done it before, together, and I wouldn’t want to have it any other way this time around.**
[_**Will you stand by me again and split a contribution between my reelection campaign and HER Time? It’d mean the world to me to have you with me from Day One.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61707068/400892336/-523917261?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230412_PM1_V1_S4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGIwZTZhNmMtNjFkOS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OCUKrQyZyf4RASGK1k0L25tiL1I-j1_dCh9G8c_cChY=)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Tammy Baldwin and HER Time will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | = Hi Peter — I have exciting news to share, and I wanted you to hear it from me: I’m officially running for reelection to the United States Senate. I know the road ahead won’t always be easy — election experts are already calling me one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats on the ballot next year. But with you by my side, I know we can get this done and win big next November. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Tammy Baldwin and HER Time will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = I’m so proud of the progress we’ve made in the Senate over the past few years, Peter. We’ve lowered the price of prescription drugs, addressed the climate crisis with landmark investment in clean energy, expanded health care for millions of our veterans, and so much more. A highlight of my time in the Senate was when the Respect for Marriage Act , my bipartisan bill to protect marriage equality, was signed into law late last year. That’s a moment I will never forget. But there’s a lot more to be done, and I’m not willing to give up the fight to make things easier, better, safer, and stronger for hard-working Wisconsinites. We have to protect Social Security and Medicare for millions of hard-working seniors who deserve the benefits they’ve spent their lives working towards. We need to defend voting rights and protect access to the ballot box — we’ve seen the harmful impacts of right-wing extremists who try to deny election results and take away Americans’ right to safely and securely participate in elections. And we need to re-establish protections for abortion access. After Roe v. Wade was overturned, I was devastated and angry, and I’m sure you were too. Wisconsin just took a huge first step in the right direction with our Supreme Court race last week, but we still have a long way to go toward making sure every woman has the freedom to make her own decisions no matter what zip code she lives in. I remain hopeful that we can do all of this — and more — together. But it won’t be easy, especially if Republicans have it their way. Their views are becoming more out-of-touch and dangerous by the day, and I know for sure that they will come after my Senate seat with everything they’ve got. They’re already spending big on misleading ads attacking my record. But with you by my side, I know we can win. We’ve done it before, together, and I wouldn’t want to have it any other way this time around. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Tammy Baldwin and HER Time will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you so much, Peter. I can’t wait to see you on the campaign trail, and I promise I’ll keep you updated on every step of this journey. So excited for what’s in store for us. I’m so glad to have you on this historic team. Let’s do this. — Tammy HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

New Op-Ed: Latino-Jewish Relations Can Contribute to the Strengthening of American Democracy by By Dina Siegel Vann, Fernand Amandi and Mike Madrid

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/latinos/thelatinovote-newsletter-apr12-newoped-5861196?e=5bd167f239)
https://latinos.vote/
Today's Headlines:
Progressive Brandon Johnson will be elected Chicago mayor, succeeding Lori Lightfoot (https://www.cnn.com/2023/04/04/politics/chicago-mayoral-election-results/index.html) - CNN

New Op-Ed:

** Latino-Jewish Relations Can Contribute to the Strengthening of American Democracy (https://latinos.vote/latino-jewish-relations-can-contribute-to-the-strengthening-of-american-democracy/)

By Dina Siegel Vann, Fernand Amandi and Mike Madrid

April 12, 2023 - Collaborative relationships among minority populations are critical for deepening understanding, building coalitions for joint advocacy, and strengthening American democracy. Yet a vital partnership spanning decades between American Jews and Latinos is encountering challenges, indicating that longstanding constructive cooperation may not pass on easily from generation to generation.

A new American Jewish Committee (AJC) study of Latino leaders, ages 18-40, reveals ambivalence toward Jews, their place in American society and the degree of discrimination they endure. While 87% of Latinos interviewed say racial, ethnic or religious discrimination is a significant problem in the United States, and 75% report that they themselves have experienced discrimination or know of someone who has, only 6% cite Jews as the group currently experiencing “the most serious/most urgent level” of discrimination. Moreover, 37% say discrimination targeting American Jews has improved, while 14% say it is worse than ever and 35% say it has not changed.

The views expressed by the 125 emerging Latino political, business, media, academic leaders in Chicago, Houston, Los Angeles, Miami and New York provide valuable insights into the thinking of young Latinos, how they may approach relations with American Jews, and what can be done to repair and strengthen the relationship.

For American Jews, the apparent disconnect with daily realities is disconcerting. Amidst widely reported antisemitism across the U.S. 26% of Jews say they have been the target of antisemitism, and 38% say they have altered their behavior to conceal their Jewish identity in public out of fear of antisemitism, according to an ** AJC State of Antisemitism in America report (https://www.ajc.org/AntisemitismReport2022)
.

Understanding the disconnect is critical to rebuilding and strengthening Latino-Jewish relations in the U.S. Historically, the Latino-Jewish partnership was based on commonalities as immigrant and minority communities that thrived in the U.S. while maintaining close links to brethren in other countries – Jews to Israel and Latinos to countries south of the U.S. border.

** To Continue Reading This Op-Ed Click Here. (https://latinos.vote/latino-jewish-relations-can-contribute-to-the-strengthening-of-american-democracy/)

Thank You

Thank you for taking the time to read our updates. If you have any news to share, comments to make, or corrections for us, feel free to ** email us (mailto:info@latinos.vote)
anytime.

Best,

The ** The Latino Vote (https://latinos.vote/)
Team

While some would show gratitude and fight to ensure the next generation of women's sports is more fruitful and prosperous, Megan Rapinoe and her liberal allies are sowing salt into the fields of women's sports. It's selfish and wrong, but certainly not beneath those who prioritize the feelings of biological males over the fairness of competition.

* * *
Team,
I’m thrilled to announce that my old boss U.S. Senator Martin Heinrich and I are teaming up to protect New Mexico’s environment and boost our outdoor economy.
**We just introduced the M.H. Dutch Salmon Greater Gila Wild and Scenic River Act to designate portions of the Gila River, its watershed, and other rivers in the Gila National Forest as Wild and Scenic Rivers.**
**[Add your name to show your support for protecting the Gila River now →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61707433/400893453/-873204607?refcode=fl_email_pt_20230412gila2_gfc_180da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjQwYTY5Ny02MmQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PSsQIwM50bUAR_fRU_YGiGQ7PdrfwlKxq_eaRA-Qnso=&emci=c0f45e7c-62d9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=3b40a697-62d9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4482565)**
The Gila Watershed, home to the nation’s first designated Wilderness, is now the largest remaining network of naturally free-flowing river segments in the Southwest.
By designating portions of this river as Wild and Scenic, we will protect this iconic waterway — as well as our recreational and agricultural industries that rely on it — for generations to come.
**This is once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to protect an irreplaceable river and watershed that New Mexicans love and depend on.**
**[If you’re with me and Sen. Heinrich, add your name to become a citizen cosponsor of our bill to protect the Gila today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61707435/400893455/-873204607?refcode=fl_email_pt_20230412gila2_gfc_180da_xx_l3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjQwYTY5Ny02MmQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PSsQIwM50bUAR_fRU_YGiGQ7PdrfwlKxq_eaRA-Qnso=&emci=c0f45e7c-62d9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=3b40a697-62d9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4482565)**

I promised to fight for NM-02’s public lands and protect our environment, and with your support, I’m delivering.
Thank you for using your voice to protect the important lands and waterways that make New Mexico so special.
— Gabe

| Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. clean_body: | = Hey there, did you see this? Gabe is partnering with Senator Martin Heinrich to pass a bill that would protect the Gila River and its watershed for generations to come. | Team, I’m thrilled to announce that my old boss U.S. Senator Martin Heinrich and I are teaming up to protect New Mexico’s environment and boost our outdoor economy. We just introduced the M.H. Dutch Salmon Greater Gila Wild and Scenic River Act to designate portions of the Gila River, its watershed, and other rivers in the Gila National Forest as Wild and Scenic Rivers. The Gila Watershed, home to the nation’s first designated Wilderness, is now the largest remaining network of naturally free-flowing river segments in the Southwest. By designating portions of this river as Wild and Scenic, we will protect this iconic waterway — as well as our recreational and agricultural industries that rely on it — for generations to come. This is once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to protect an irreplaceable river and watershed that New Mexicans love and depend on. ** I promised to fight for NM-02’s public lands and protect our environment, and with your support, I’m delivering. Thank you for using your voice to protect the important lands and waterways that make New Mexico so special. — Gabe | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. Now, he's taking his experience in office and passion for economic opportunities, the environment, and giving a voice to underserved communities in Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Riley Gaines
subject: The left has no problem with violence against women…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nine PAC
body:
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549818:JG5L24GmN:m:1:3391001263:9632CB231BF758DBDBB7F34AB6635410:r)
---
Fellow American,

**First** : After the NCAA forced me to compete against a biological male, I decided to dedicate my life to fighting for women and ending the unjust discrimination against females who are forced to compete against biological males. **Then** : Just days ago, after speaking to a group of college students, I was assaulted and attacked by a man in a dress, one of the many recent episodes of violence doled out against those who refuse to bow down to the transgender agenda. **Now** : The University is siding with the violent protesters and refusing to even apologize to me. Some faculty members had the nerve to call the violence "peaceful." It seems like the left has no problem with violence against women, so long as the violence serves their woke agenda.
---
[**FIGHT BACK**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549818:JG5L24GmN:m:1:3391001263:9632CB231BF758DBDBB7F34AB6635410:r)
---
Despite their violent talk and actions, I WON'T BE INTIMIDATED. We must stand up for the TRUTH, no matter whose feelings it hurts. The future of women's sports depends on taking a stand RIGHT NOW. We can't cede any more ground to these woke activists. Join me and help fight back!
---
[**DONATE TO NinePAC**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549818:JG5L24GmN:m:1:3391001263:9632CB231BF758DBDBB7F34AB6635410:r)
---
God Bless,
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62549818:JG5L24GmN:m:1:3391001263:9632CB231BF758DBDBB7F34AB6635410:r)
---
Riley Gaines

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: These lawmakers just put polluters over people. We're holding them accountable:
body:
Help us reach 5,000 comments to overcome corporate polluters.? Tell the EPA:
PROTECT COMMUNITIES FROM CHEMICAL DISASTERS
The EPA is now seeking public input on a new rule to require industrial facilities to disclose the hazardous chemical risks posed by their operations, take stronger actions to prevent accidents, and move quickly should an accident occur.

Corporate polluters have already killed this rule once, when Trump decided to allow these dangerous facilities to operate in secrecy. We cannot allow them to succeed again.

GOAL: 5,000 actions
TAKE ACTION https://links.messages.lcv. ? ?
? Peter ? a critical new rule from Biden's EPA would finally require dangerous industrial facilities to disclose any hazardous chemicals they contain ? and take steps to prevent and mitigate harmful accidents.

This rule will especially protect people living closest to these facilities, which are overwhelmingly low-wealth communities and communities of color, as well as workers. Decades of environmental racism ensured these hazardous facilities were located in the neighborhoods with the least resources to fight back, meaning these frontline communities are disproportionately exposed to chemical accidents and harmful pollutants that have jeopardized their health.

Here's the problem: powerful interests, like the oil and gas industry and the chemical industry, are demanding the EPA once again abandon these important protections. Unless our movement speaks up right now, we may miss out on this opportunity to advance environmental justice and worker safety, and create healthier communities and workplaces.

Please TAKE ACTION right now to protect communities from chemical hazards. To beat the chemical industry, we need to urgently deliver 5,000 comments supporting the EPA's proposed rule. https://links.messages.lcv.

We've already seen the dangers these facilities can pose. In 2013, an explosion of ammonium nitrate fertilizer killed 15 people and destroyed a school, nursing home, and many homes in the city of West, Texas. The Obama administration began a painstaking process to prevent similar disasters, culminating in enhanced protections for minimizing and managing chemical risks.

But after an aggressive campaign from the chemical industry and other corporate polluters, the Trump administration abandoned the rule, choosing to prioritize corporate profits over the health of vulnerable communities and workers.

Under President Biden, the EPA can now reverse this dangerous decision and finally help protect people, especially environmental justice communities, from hazardous pollution and chemical disasters.

Don't let corporate polluters undermine critical environment protections. TAKE ACTION now to help us deliver 5,000 comments supporting environmental justice and corporate accountability. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Ap9dcYRVjLf~

Thank you for taking action to protect people and workers from environmental disasters.

Sincerely,

Madeleine Foote
Deputy Legislative Director

clean_body: Help us reach 5,000 comments to overcome corporate polluters.? Tell the EPA: PROTECT COMMUNITIES FROM CHEMICAL DISASTERS The EPA is now seeking public input on a new rule to require industrial facilities to disclose the hazardous chemical risks posed by their operations, take stronger actions to prevent accidents, and move quickly should an accident occur. Corporate polluters have already killed this rule once, when Trump decided to allow these dangerous facilities to operate in secrecy. We cannot allow them to succeed again. GOAL: 5,000 actions TAKE ACTION ? ? ? Peter ? a critical new rule from Biden's EPA would finally require dangerous industrial facilities to disclose any hazardous chemicals they contain ? and take steps to prevent and mitigate harmful accidents. This rule will especially protect people living closest to these facilities, which are overwhelmingly low-wealth communities and communities of color, as well as workers. Decades of environmental racism ensured these hazardous facilities were located in the neighborhoods with the least resources to fight back, meaning these frontline communities are disproportionately exposed to chemical accidents and harmful pollutants that have jeopardized their health. Here's the problem: powerful interests, like the oil and gas industry and the chemical industry, are demanding the EPA once again abandon these important protections. Unless our movement speaks up right now, we may miss out on this opportunity to advance environmental justice and worker safety, and create healthier communities and workplaces. Please TAKE ACTION right now to protect communities from chemical hazards. To beat the chemical industry, we need to urgently deliver 5,000 comments supporting the EPA's proposed rule. We've already seen the dangers these facilities can pose. In 2013, an explosion of ammonium nitrate fertilizer killed 15 people and destroyed a school, nursing home, and many homes in the city of West, Texas. The Obama administration began a painstaking process to prevent similar disasters, culminating in enhanced protections for minimizing and managing chemical risks. But after an aggressive campaign from the chemical industry and other corporate polluters, the Trump administration abandoned the rule, choosing to prioritize corporate profits over the health of vulnerable communities and workers. Under President Biden, the EPA can now reverse this dangerous decision and finally help protect people, especially environmental justice communities, from hazardous pollution and chemical disasters. Don't let corporate polluters undermine critical environment protections. TAKE ACTION now to help us deliver 5,000 comments supporting environmental justice and corporate accountability. Thank you for taking action to protect people and workers from environmental disasters. Sincerely, Madeleine Foote Deputy Legislative Director League of Conservation Voters ? ? ? ? ? I just launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee, and I couldn't be more excited to hit the ground and listen to more Americans about their concerns, worries, fears, and priorities.

But the truth is, accomplishing our goal isn't cheap. _**[So today, I'm humbly asking if you could please chip in $5, $10, $25, or anything you can afford to help my team and I keep trying to restore FAITH in America.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=484720f701cc4af9a6587a2dbe106f69&_e=tk2_YyiclJcTdIQ6jQzmrlBCoROJm4Pk7p4XF6ceJH-uSAWbZTCFW2LwNgmGAapRcnGC6lRppvch9SG2dSSbbVHqpzVC8rlcM4hK-Fn722OyEsk0ObyQYaKHit6BKs99ULGm2yCSnbHTOUiYXEoOSBLSr0MDO-h78oNAndZjT8n0Zixw2WJ2t86OdqGJT0LQzrw2eLvRcSk6MUEAqWEUbC3_Q8LLnwQSfl5o6hdwveWywu6qhv8maVLtGUuuSZVRHYOe3InLUP7J97iK2WZO6EioSpdWL4AbjSRqPMlTSY_zjR_foYu03QPWt_hZlSsQMdVutIri2cTgVMEqrruCba4ZPdnxZEIH1zLuDju-zLLXWT-5gdnjQ8g_p0J0YvG_ "So today, I’m humbly asking if you could please chip in $5, $10, $25, or anything you can afford to help my team and I keep trying to restore FAITH in America.")**_ I believe our best days are ahead of us, but I can't do this alone. Are you with me?
---
| | [I'M WITH TIM SCOTT](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=484720f701cc4af9a6587a2dbe106f69&_e=av4V95bbhDJX_5ARCUvX2sEx99_ucGGL6J05vDAFcTjIZDDQEZnkyKQNmyvQvOw5ZVe_PqihqEk7e9-o3D3DWVmmtlJZ_LUL3PuVDTTcJCR7QC-JVmsHIOrL8RnNpv-KVRqvjG_L7ERJId9Fb__uRHwojrW4fdHxB7ih0BnQgCy_FU5Ad5tFJ-USCUmmo7DsbSeyMJXBTubWEo0BmaXcxKx6bag3MgkYNAGGHmv8M3UnJA679t9ngZQ3aCMMa6tTT72xOLVN-erphsngWmomYixylHQG4BnBiZV4HZGVr99XicAuzfG0tcf7t6IXEDt-sBH0PKF9a9K-LgpUKR_q2N0QV0wDc07vlh9ZEMvkvSWeTUvb9BtChjunbdJqHutW "JOIN MY TEAM")

I was raised in a single-parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13. **I understand the value of a dollar.**

I don't take asking for money lightly. I know that every donation made is a sacrifice, and I am forever grateful for each and every gift.

_**[I know we have been asking a lot lately, but it would mean so much if you could give $5 to help us restore faith in America.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=484720f701cc4af9a6587a2dbe106f69&_e=av4V95bbhDJX_5ARCUvX2sEx99_ucGGL6J05vDAFcTjIZDDQEZnkyKQNmyvQvOw5ZVe_PqihqEk7e9-o3D3DWVmmtlJZ_LUL3PuVDTTcJCR7QC-JVmsHIOrL8RnNpv-KVRqvjG_L7ERJId9Fb__uRHwojrW4fdHxB7ih0BnQgCy_FU5Ad5tFJ-USCUmmo7DsbSeyMJXBTubWEo0BmaXcxKx6bag3MgkYNAGGHmv8M3Uozr7JwgVFpopJrFA1CPe_5qmexsRBcq54FiPGgikkq8ozr4HZOB7QDuB4TxRrSm19dnf59OEFquQtfDM8eJ3x2mBBCEGpIQsrFICaO5OSvgSaTpaLFeT0jfwMaoS7NnxFF3DjUvcVSMf4R48lRsdE "I know we have been asking a lot lately, but it would mean so much if you could give $5 to help us restore faith in America.")**_

clean_body: | | | | | | CONFIDENTIAL CAMPAIGN INFORMATION | | | "Generic Button" Date: 04/12/2023 Topic: 2024 Presidential Race Security: Confidential | | | "Generic Button" | | | I just launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee, and I couldn't be more excited to hit the ground and listen to more Americans about their concerns, worries, fears, and priorities. But the truth is, accomplishing our goal isn't cheap. "So today, I’m humbly asking if you could please chip in $5, $10, $25, or anything you can afford to help my team and I keep trying to restore FAITH in America." I believe our best days are ahead of us, but I can't do this alone. Are you with me? | | "JOIN MY TEAM" I was raised in a single-parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13. I understand the value of a dollar. I don't take asking for money lightly. I know that every donation made is a sacrifice, and I am forever grateful for each and every gift. "I know we have been asking a lot lately, but it would mean so much if you could give $5 to help us restore faith in America."** | | "JOIN MY TEAM" | PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT PRESIDENTIAL EXPLORATORY COMMITTEE 1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD CHARLESTON, SC 29407 |

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: End the weaponization of police power in America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
It’s time to stop complaining and actually fix the problem without apology.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=8fe87610bb904677ab2e8f3a5960c18a&_t=mem6Q3ubirzNkCM0WQNsJyOVeLyWZs1QTvtcIoJNrRkEBeMDT58N_TxLUL_HE6pQpwAYsJgqDrm0i-0iizqiIACUwz83FLFKxMgeLFM2COc%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=8fe87610bb904677ab2e8f3a5960c18a&_t=mem6Q3ubirzNkCM0WQNsJyOVeLyWZs1QTvtcIoJNrRkEBeMDT58N_TxLUL_HE6pQpwAYsJgqDrm0i-0iizqiIACUwz83FLFKxMgeLFM2COc%3D)

| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8fe87610bb904677ab2e8f3a5960c18a&_e=xVMwsTAvw3BwltNWweAfUgryIsBHGCuw3ncSRMOX1JnZ5qYbYeQ2UCP6430rMiDII0BFjZGUbalbl0oXUr8wiumIay470BRd6ki-1aYPpH6EyXudhaFAt05JxmdMQybof09rbPePjSbxpfkIJPRLZEuvMUDl-_rBwXhr_Y7qvrm2Dv29f7BxyZ3gf1WWgiMNBR60dQo0WU2JQc9QApRl1VJeEHuezEvBmzKiOqYvBcxAMOzOsECInIXbM1i3AmS_4UD4hs9FzYCLPlCtZVwcPLuOVToGP-QqxlMhNdTxIsHssBEL_IQihfwhJt2UsZh3lIkIjpIO0gCQuaT864CuN83U1AySPY7vTD7Sw2tM0-Q%3D)
Fellow American -

Over the course of this election, I am laying my vision for an American national revival.

Here’s one promise for you: I will end the weaponization of police power in America.

Time to stop complaining and actually *fix* the problem without apology.
1. Shut down + replace the FBI
2. Shut down + replace the IRS
3. Pardon all federal defendants prosecuted based on political motives. This includes Douglass Mackey & nonviolent January 6 defendants denied due process
4. Hold Congress accountable for taxpayer $$ used as hush money for sexual harassment claims
5. Publish the Jeffrey Epstein client list: the police state can’t be weaponized to protect a select few.

Fellow American, if you agree, and want these policies debated on the main stage of the Republican Presidential Primary, then I need your help. **[Chip in $1 to build this movement toward our American revival.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8fe87610bb904677ab2e8f3a5960c18a&_e=xVMwsTAvw3BwltNWweAfUgryIsBHGCuw3ncSRMOX1JnZ5qYbYeQ2UCP6430rMiDII0BFjZGUbalbl0oXUr8wiumIay470BRd6ki-1aYPpH6EyXudhaFAt05JxmdMQybof09rbPePjSbxpfkIJPRLZEuvMUDl-_rBwXhr_Y7qvrm2Dv29f7BxyZ3gf1WWgiMNBR60dQo0WU2JQc9QApRl1VzYe-zRt3fbeE41F2r22Id5-qLirk4G_DU5VnzPEh0qAkqaPf9Ba0ALx1V2bBFoxlxxWP8rKvWdQdfBraSekv5oBesXru9p1FPwjJzwthqvmzGHOxdCHOoYhOJeWdmiFGga6oi6cBvBcqLNrAPe3Eo%3D)**

Thanks,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8fe87610bb904677ab2e8f3a5960c18a&_e=xVMwsTAvw3BwltNWweAfUgryIsBHGCuw3ncSRMOX1JnZ5qYbYeQ2UCP6430rMiDII0BFjZGUbalbl0oXUr8wiumIay470BRd6ki-1aYPpH6EyXudhaFAt05JxmdMQybof09rbPePjSbxpfkIJPRLZEuvMUDl-_rBwXhr_Y7qvrm2Dv29f7BxyZ3gf1WWgiMNBR60dQo0WU2JQc9QApRl1ZHcSMCNITS8J1Uolcc4dvUBCAahyOnJQ6OvE15JFnl8rOumrXPRUZbJTdhBBtfFMrqZ9QAd9eVCoV85xA3FUKqlXRQsqayigLcy6z_NwuzTIFXpZH9k_VoTKNslDaw6YuyPStYFgHSugoFCxY5L05w%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** DONATE TODAY -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8fe87610bb904677ab2e8f3a5960c18a&_e=xVMwsTAvw3BwltNWweAfUgryIsBHGCuw3ncSRMOX1JnZ5qYbYeQ2UCP6430rMiDII0BFjZGUbalbl0oXUr8wiumIay470BRd6ki-1aYPpH6EyXudhaFAt05JxmdMQybof09rbPePjSbxpfkIJPRLZEuvMUDl-_rBwXhr_Y7qvrm2Dv29f7BxyZ3gf1WWgiMNBR60dQo0WU2JQc9QApRl1XYtTEGpsIptO-2JmuUduXq8Rn7rhgZ5GvtbziypNB00loRIjRgXYjty473bNY3XXY0DvIV09_d0QuL7KF3kRT8JaEoH6SdGAUnD-QRawXdHX-XqNUYrJr7QRwkQ1QwlPGkbq4ILFEDcN11VmWjUErY%3D)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8fe87610bb904677ab2e8f3a5960c18a&_e=xVMwsTAvw3BwltNWweAfUgryIsBHGCuw3ncSRMOX1JnZ5qYbYeQ2UCP6430rMiDII0BFjZGUbalbl0oXUr8wiumIay470BRd6ki-1aYPpH6EyXudhaFAt05JxmdMQybof09rbPePjSbxpfkIJPRLZEuvMUDl-_rBwXhr_Y7qvrm2Dv29f7BxyZ3gf1WWgiMNBR60dQo0WU2JQc9QApRl1Zc08f8WmioBt1mrL_Z-8XXhjWrCRg9jAHYKQWtN3RkbuShyiRqg-wZUMsowZTxlngz50iNjTTWIeLVl-vywNDpLEzxBa-NtZ6UvPizYAie7fu47tyKjgTrhxkokUGn745QvNXSkZ5RVC5Srjk5b5ww%3D)

---

| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8fe87610bb904677ab2e8f3a5960c18a&_e=xVMwsTAvw3BwltNWweAfUnDpqrJ0p1czRlhabwGiVZJOuPniy8e78-K5PimY1VvWcsnEbZH5K3E4OgdZyYzdnaqox8xnMLb1SUfU34EYm9Mfp5WBYIQUwJ1IN2fyDhbrNR9HliSAbt_5Itkl8WppFOvEqnaWLeNmYp4s_SP0HvM59AfjctSk-13PF6wSmgrT1anw-Zv3t_uqBsNjiITZOi-KPOWdXgeq_FuvY2unk_k%3D)| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8fe87610bb904677ab2e8f3a5960c18a&_e=xVMwsTAvw3BwltNWweAfUq8B0bvSPJANsWDpOrHNnqye_3RTHJwpgFHrI8yHuPNqgEw5k7GOKCIL3qvW0N4lF4i-dS-lgQkoYvrEbt3moFAaISJdh2AL_B7KtDdB_MmHjuoLxTqIqZhr1Q7hjRCyAObUlQMD2YtoA7JFusPPSRAmTtMhxnozdMnlQl6tBaD93TmsVUizFEZYd7VqnJzcAA%3D%3D)| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8fe87610bb904677ab2e8f3a5960c18a&_e=xVMwsTAvw3BwltNWweAfUhAGOciKSnc04pTQJwRFAwH50-93ix_YagqSy8ao6a4Ujx2ypThkIZZO1N7LSFyYq4pyn4AFY-s6FZ8SfRJis5j2Rxks3sVYisF4Y2kjSsNzKJPP_JVTixBn9s5Cld773VA2ZMyRWeGzTL1bzjdkHEXRy53bwQFFHI96ACB-oI23cRAAKbEwThpCy294jrnYPYf1kR-Q5OmILjS4QRN9L0g%3D)

name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: Official Endorsement by Dave Brat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
Former Congressman Endorses Senator Chase
---
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| ENDORSEMENT ALERT
---
| Former Congressman Dave Brat
---
| | |
---
| |
---|---
|

"I endorse Virginia State Senator Amanda Chase as she seeks re-election to the Virginia State Senate.
Senator Chase supported me before it was cool to be Pro Faith, Pro Constitution, Pro Free Markets and Pro American. She has courage. I ran on and supported the Republican Creed of Virginia.

Many say they support this platform, but not everyone votes like it or messages constantly on it like Senator Chase.

• Free enterprise system - No special interests
• All individuals are entitled to equal rights, justice, opportunities
• Fiscal responsibility and budgetary restraint at all levels
• Observing Constitutional limitations
• Peace is best preserved through a strong national defense
• Faith in God, as recognized by our Founding Fathers, is essential to the moral fiber of the Nation

'We the People' are tired of politicians who do not see the dangers right in front of us; from out of control schools to election integrity. We want people that can clearly articulate what these issues are and boldly lead the people to action.
If we elect leaders that hold fast to the Virginia Republican Creed, there is no way we can end up with runaway spending, crime in the streets, crushing regulations and an economy that favors the Big and Powerful over small business and our great citizens.
'We the People' overwhelmingly love God, Country and our fellow citizens. But love does not mean that anything goes. We the People demand that politicians are accountable to us.

They work for us. Senator Amanda Chase will listen to the vast majority who want truth and sanity back in Government.

Unfortunately, that will take a fight, and we have someone who will fight the good fight to ensure that the City on a Hill remains bright for us and a light for generations to come."

-Former Congressman Dave Brat (R-VA07)

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Will you renew your membership for the 4th consecutive year?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This is your LAST chance.

|
---
| | | |
---

**Are you there? I still haven 't heard back from you...**

Friend,

It's Kevin McCarthy. My life’s work has been dedicated to leadership and service. **I’ve led nonprofits, including the Make-A-Wish Foundation, and as the CEO of the American Red Cross in Arizona** , where I’ve been proud to make a difference in the lives of others. Whether it’s supporting sick children and their families during their toughest times, or coordinating first-response efforts during natural disasters, helping people has always been a motivating force for me.

**Now, I’m running for Congress because our community needs a new voice – one that isn’t a corrupt career politician that only cares about money and power.**

So many of our residents have become victims of our corrupt society and broken economy. They’re living paycheck-to-paycheck and can’t keep up with rising costs. It’s becoming difficult to find affordable healthcare that actually works for them. Our students are underperforming in schools and facing mental health struggles, all while public schools are facing budget cuts. Arizonans have been left behind and forgotten for far too long, and they deserve better than this.

I’m not a career politician like some others, but I know my record as a CEO with a purpose and a passion for service gives me a unique perspective on the issues facing our community today. Arizonans are tired of corrupt politicians like David Schweikert, and it’s time to elect a new voice to deliver progress for our state.

Friend

I'll always be grateful to be an American. I know how much my family risked immigrating to the U.S. and how much better my life is because of it.

However, what the liberals are doing to the borders of this country is **_insane_**.

My family had to go through the legal process of immigrating to this country. The long and arduous process that is set in place is there for a reason, and my political counterparts seem to forget that.

Instead, they're focusing on open borders, higher taxes, and failed policies **while the country is suffering**.

**_This shouldn 't be allowed. _**

I know you agree with keeping our borders secure. We've seen the chaos that comes with open borders: increased crime, unfair elections, unsafe communities. We can't let this keep happening.

So, will you protect our country and stand for secure borders? | [ **I WILL STAND FOR SECURE BORDERS** ](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=8519fc6e6da64296b73841f3b3a8a3f4&_e=r6ScHS-4Lnur1Z4aKnqk9Yrym_ZB_5rVqIBT3r_i9B5LyVuY5X52PizfGgFwhKJruy0bMMip1-BRdhqs2rfc5c5kqby2jB8MC2M3aDvdxHh1rQKWBeV7qSAtb9OP7wG6Glmlv_qravRkJl6asoPs9mPjKjVewZpAdELgJpgcKx42Dfmm2-50O1WDyYG9k9jLcVevcHxQOakdJ0g0qE5UciYGYYyqz0NV3z_u70X8c163BGLT5o53Iqg7ztiL0jTI8n-4gGMrtM5rL2CSDCuiSKPNdD20-Md_QzO-QR-cfOBHJAJWR0K5TD1Q_9vWlFP3cCNI2KDit-RLjyx4YVs_py_XFJHGHtFyA8XcleRBz2WBV4LtLETMm0vphhaGzBdRs7RtVWKVRz45IQqYJE3u1UpZe_WLuKGCsSma7f0npzuSRGov9VwDP9rYC0EZ51LLyYw_I4Hj_OXFpep6y0KaTVYsqBUwf-dsHs1-xlr07cVoEBlfCPp_IMqbYiZN_PO2)

clean_body: but this shouldn't be allowed | Friend I'll always be grateful to be an American. I know how much my family risked immigrating to the U.S. and how much better my life is because of it. However, what the liberals are doing to the borders of this country is insane. My family had to go through the legal process of immigrating to this country. The long and arduous process that is set in place is there for a reason, and my political counterparts seem to forget that. Instead, they're focusing on open borders, higher taxes, and failed policies while the country is suffering. This shouldn 't be allowed. I know you agree with keeping our borders secure. We've seen the chaos that comes with open borders: increased crime, unfair elections, unsafe communities. We can't let this keep happening. So, will you protect our country and stand for secure borders? | We've seen liberal cities mishandle this crisis. Don't let this go on. Stand with me and support secure borders. I'll never stop fighting for this country. Thank you. - Nicole | A No-Nonsense Leader for Congress. * Congresswoman Malliotakis is the daughter of immigrants, her father from Greece and her mother a Cuban exile of the Castro dictatorship. She is currently the only Republican member of Congress representing New York City and the only Hispanic Republican elected official citywide. | Paid for by Nicole for New York Nicole for New York (Federal) P.O.
