name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Re: Wisconsin’s Senate race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2096%2E5257348%2EuVMqMJ ]Adam Schiff for Senate

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em_baldwin.B8-CUu&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC30_20230412_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2096%2E5257348%2EuVMqMJ ]Sen. Tammy Baldwin at parade

Hi Derek — I have exciting news to share, and I wanted you to
hear it from me:

I’m officially running for reelection to the United States Senate.

I know the road ahead won’t always be easy — election experts are already
calling me one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats on the ballot next
year. But with you by my side, I know we can get this done and win big
next November.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em_baldwin.B8-CUu&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC30_20230412_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2096%2E5257348%2EuVMqMJ ]Derek, will you help me start the first day of our reelection
in the strongest position by splitting a donation between my campaign in
Wisconsin and Adam Schiff's today?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to Tammy Baldwin and Adam Schiff will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=apr2023_abs_em_baldwin.3ccolb&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC30_20230412_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2096%2E5257348%2EuVMqMJ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=apr2023_abs_em_baldwin.P1uzii&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC30_20230412_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2096%2E5257348%2EuVMqMJ ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=apr2023_abs_em_baldwin.EyvpDh&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC30_20230412_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=2096%2E5257348%2EuVMqMJ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=apr2023_abs_em_baldwin.q_YoAJ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC30_20230412_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=2096%2E5257348%2EuVMqMJ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=apr2023_abs_em_baldwin.Tui7gP&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC30_20230412_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=2096%2E5257348%2EuVMqMJ ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em_baldwin.B8-CUu&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC30_20230412_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=2096%2E5257348%2EuVMqMJ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

I’m so proud of the progress we’ve made in the Senate over the past few
years, Derek. We’ve lowered the price of prescription drugs,
addressed the climate crisis with landmark investment in clean energy,
expanded health care for millions of our veterans, and so much more.

A highlight of my time in the Senate was when the Respect for Marriage
Act, my bipartisan bill to protect marriage equality, was signed into law
late last year. That’s a moment I will never forget.

But there’s a lot more to be done, and I’m not willing to give up the
fight to make things easier, better, safer, and stronger for hard-working
Wisconsinites.

We have to protect Social Security and Medicare for millions of
hard-working seniors who deserve the benefits they’ve spent their lives
working towards.

We need to defend voting rights and protect access to the ballot box —
we’ve seen the harmful impacts of right-wing extremists who try to deny
election results and take away Americans’ right to safely and securely
participate in elections.

And we need to re-establish protections for abortion access. After Roe v.
Wade was overturned, I was devastated and angry, and I’m sure you were
too. Wisconsin just took a huge first step in the right direction with our
Supreme Court race last week, but we still have a long way to go toward
making sure every woman has the freedom to make her own decisions no
matter what zip code she lives in.

I remain hopeful that we can do all of this — and more — together. But it
won’t be easy, especially if Republicans have it their way. Their views
are becoming more out-of-touch and dangerous by the day, and I know for
sure that they will come after my Senate seat with everything they’ve got.
They’re already spending big on misleading ads attacking my record.

But with you by my side, I know we can win. We’ve done it before,
together, and I wouldn’t want to have it any other way this time around.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em_baldwin.B8-CUu&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC30_20230412_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=2096%2E5257348%2EuVMqMJ ]Will you stand by me again and split a contribution between my
reelection campaign and Adam Schiff’s? It’d mean the world to be to have
you with me from Day One.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to Tammy Baldwin and Adam Schiff will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=apr2023_abs_em_baldwin.3ccolb&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC30_20230412_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=2096%2E5257348%2EuVMqMJ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=apr2023_abs_em_baldwin.P1uzii&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC30_20230412_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=2096%2E5257348%2EuVMqMJ ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=apr2023_abs_em_baldwin.EyvpDh&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC30_20230412_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1015&akid=2096%2E5257348%2EuVMqMJ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=apr2023_abs_em_baldwin.q_YoAJ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC30_20230412_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1016&akid=2096%2E5257348%2EuVMqMJ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=apr2023_abs_em_baldwin.Tui7gP&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC30_20230412_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1017&akid=2096%2E5257348%2EuVMqMJ ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em_baldwin.B8-CUu&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC30_20230412_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1018&akid=2096%2E5257348%2EuVMqMJ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you so much, Derek. I can’t wait to see you on the
campaign trail, and I promise I’ll keep you updated on every step of this
journey. So excited for what’s in store for us.

I’m so glad to have you on this historic team.

Let’s do this.

— Tammy

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=apr2023_abs_em_baldwin.LUHBj3&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC30_20230412_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1019&akid=2096%2E5257348%2EuVMqMJ ]DONATE MONTHLY

150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

---

Team, this is _outrageous:_ **Senate Republicans just doubled down and held a _massive_ fundraiser for the ARCHITECT of a plan to raise the retirement age for Social Security!**

We can’t let far-right Republicans rip away _millions_ of seniors' hard-earned benefits. Democrats _everywhere_ must stand up and make their voices heard NOW before it’s too late!

To fight back, we've launched an URGENT live poll to confirm where Americans stand on the GOP campaign platform of _raising_ the Social Security retirement age, **but we’re 66 responses short in Pennsylvania --_and we’re still missing your answer!_ The deadline is MIDNIGHT, so please tell us now:**

**Do you approve of GOP plans to raise the Social Security retirement age?**
| | [Yes](http://go.dscc.org/go/12709?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230412-AnswerMissing-SSGOPFundraiserLivePoll-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230412-AnswerMissing-SSGOPFundraiserLivePoll-Pros-sl1&akid=10403%2E9716520%2EMXs7bZ)

name: Indiana Dems
subject: Push back against the National Rifle Association
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, This week, the NRA Annual Meeting is being held in Indianapolis. In just the past few days, we’ve witnessed tragic mass shootings, with the latest horrifying incident just across the Ohio River in Louisville. Despite the bloodshed, Indiana Senate Republicans honored the NRA and its leadership yesterday in the Statehouse. It is shameful. Rather than find solutions that focus on responsible gun ownership and keeping firearms out of the wrong hands, the NRA and the Republican politicians that prop it up have repeatedly failed to take any sort of action to curb the mass violence and destruction unfolding across our country. **It’s up to us to push back against this injustice.** [**Ahead of the NRA convention in our home state this week, chip in to our movement and show Indiana Republicans that they will be held accountable. Your donation will help us elect more candidates who believe in responsible gun ownership, universal background checks, and decreased military-style weaponry on American streets.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61709415/400900899/1643342139?refcode=230412-FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjdhYjhkMy02OGQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n9xig57h151QSuLIDy91efOSxdee2nRzrRDrUqCQLbk=) We cannot grow numb to the injustice and the danger of these shootings. That is how they win. As much as it hurts, as much as it can be draining, we need to stay engaged. We have to take on these special interests that are more committed to their own personal futures and pocketbooks than the safety of our schools, places of worship, movie theaters, businesses, and neighborhoods. When we all come together, that’s how we win. clean_body: | Peter, This week, the NRA Annual Meeting is being held in Indianapolis. In just the past few days, we’ve witnessed tragic mass shootings, with the latest horrifying incident just across the Ohio River in Louisville. Despite the bloodshed, Indiana Senate Republicans honored the NRA and its leadership yesterday in the Statehouse. It is shameful. Rather than find solutions that focus on responsible gun ownership and keeping firearms out of the wrong hands, the NRA and the Republican politicians that prop it up have repeatedly failed to take any sort of action to curb the mass violence and destruction unfolding across our country. It’s up to us to push back against this injustice. = We cannot grow numb to the injustice and the danger of these shootings. That is how they win. As much as it hurts, as much as it can be draining, we need to stay engaged. We have to take on these special interests that are more committed to their own personal futures and pocketbooks than the safety of our schools, places of worship, movie theaters, businesses, and neighborhoods. When we all come together, that’s how we win. = Thanks, Indiana Democratic Party | | | = | = [content goes here] Indiana Democratic Party 115 W Washington INDLPS, IN 46202 United States Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. name: Mike Thompson
subject: Please join me in standing against the politicizing of the FDA
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://support
body:
|
---
| | Peter,

Recently, a hyper-partisan judge in Texas released a ruling instructing the Food and Drug Administration to revoke the approval of a widely used and proven safe medication, Mifepristone.

This is the next step in the war against reproductive rights. It’s a shocking overreach by the courts, and we need to rise up against it right away.

**_[If you believe that the FDA must remain free from political interference, will you add your name now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61709473/400901133/1327867735?refcode=EM_NBI_MT_20230412_PT_Mifepristone_0_ID_MikeThompson_NA_NA_Mifepristone&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDRmZWYzNi02OWQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bWuoGIos2G1MrxRE80O-jjXw-ONDRQuzOcAdeCgLKZs=&emci=66bea11a-69d9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=c04fef36-69d9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2678920)_**
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61709474/400901134/1327867735?refcode=EM_NBI_MT_20230412_PT_Mifepristone_0_ID_MikeThompson_NA_NA_Mifepristone&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDRmZWYzNi02OWQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bWuoGIos2G1MrxRE80O-jjXw-ONDRQuzOcAdeCgLKZs=&emci=66bea11a-69d9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=c04fef36-69d9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2678920)
---

It’s been 23 years since Mifepristone was first approved by the FDA. Peter, this unprecedented abuse of judicial power strips away reproductive freedom and goes against the foundation of our nation.

I believe that politics should not play a role in whether medical professionals are able to approve and distribute medication. **_[If you agree, please stand with me today by adding your name.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61709475/400901135/1327867735?refcode=EM_NBI_MT_20230412_PT_Mifepristone_0_ID_MikeThompson_NA_NA_Mifepristone&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDRmZWYzNi02OWQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bWuoGIos2G1MrxRE80O-jjXw-ONDRQuzOcAdeCgLKZs=&emci=66bea11a-69d9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=c04fef36-69d9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2678920)_**

Thank you,

Mike Thompson

|

name: House ALERT via TNDP
subject: Now let’s get back to working for the people
body:
Rep. Pearson is back to serving the people of Memphis, where he belongs. |
#
---
The people have spoken, and Rep. Pearson is back to serving the people of Memphis, where he belongs. | | **"Second Expelled Democrat Is Sent Back to Tennessee House"**
_— New York Times, April 12th, 2023_

_"...the unanimous vote by the Shelby County Board of Commissioners allows Mr. Pearson to return to his seat as early as this week, ahead of a special election later this year. name: Alexandra Rojas (via JusticeDemocrats.com)
subject: Waleed and mine’s new op-ed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Hi Peter, did you
have a chance to check out the [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/133317?t=1001&akid=28448%2E1203867%2EM9uSJS ]op-ed my colleague Waleed and I wrote in
The Nation?

We explore how progressives should build infrastructure to combat AIPAC’s
unlimited spending in Democratic primaries — even as some “progressive”
consultants and advisors seek to capitulate to the anti-Palestinian lobby.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/133468?refcode=em20230412-28448&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=28448%2E1203867%2EM9uSJS ]We need the resources to fight back on our own terms. Will you make a
contribution today to support our ability to speak out against the AIPAC
network and their tens of millions of dollars?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/133468?refcode=em20230412-28448&t=1003&akid=28448%2E1203867%2EM9uSJS ][IMG]

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/133468?refcode=em20230412-28448&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=28448%2E1203867%2EM9uSJS ]Contribute $3

In the last cycle, AIPAC backed over 100 insurrectionist Republicans and
spent tens of millions against anyone who spoke up for Palestinians in
general elections and primaries.

The progressive movement has to learn from Summer Lee’s victory over
AIPAC. It’s a recent and concrete example of how a strong candidate with a
well-run, community-driven campaign and large progressive coalition can
overcome AIPAC’s multimillion-dollar machine.

If AIPAC is going to spend millions of dollars on misleading attack ads
aimed at progressive Democrats, we have to fight back — but money in the
bank is the number one thing that has impacted our ability to push back
against AIPAC these past few years.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/133468?refcode=em20230412-28448&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=28448%2E1203867%2EM9uSJS ]Peter,
please make a contribution to our
movement now to help us elect progressive leaders willing to fight back
and champion solutions to the crisis we’re facing.

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=28448%2E1203867%2EM9uSJS ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=28448%2E1203867%2EM9uSJS ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230412-28448-footer&t=1026&refcode2=28448_1203867_M9uSJS&akid=28448%2E1203867%2EM9uSJS

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=28448%2E1203867%2EM9uSJS

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Peter,

Since the Supreme Court overturned the landmark _Roe v. Wade_ decision, millions of women have been stripped of the right to make their own personal reproductive health care decisions. Over the past week, we've seen that extreme conservative judges want to go even further.

A federal judge in Texas reversed a longstanding approval by the FDA for a safe and commonly-used abortion drug. While Mifepristone is still legal and accessible after a conflicting ruling and appeal from the Biden Administration, right-wing legislators and judges across the country continue to push for restrictions on reproductive rights.

As a doctor, Kim knows that deeply personal reproductive health care decisions should be made between a patient and her doctor only. **That's why she's co-sponsoring the recently reintroduced Women's Health Protection Act.**

The Women's Health Protection Act would codify _Roe v. Wade_ into law and block states from enacting medically unjustified barriers to accessing abortion care.

clean_body: If you support codifying Roe v. Wade, join Kim in calling for the passage of the Women's Health Protection Act today → "House Democrats introduce bill that would enshrine federal abortion rights" | Peter, Since the Supreme Court overturned the landmark Roe v. Wade decision, millions of women have been stripped of the right to make their own personal reproductive health care decisions. Over the past week, we've seen that extreme conservative judges want to go even further. A federal judge in Texas reversed a longstanding approval by the FDA for a safe and commonly-used abortion drug. While Mifepristone is still legal and accessible after a conflicting ruling and appeal from the Biden Administration, right-wing legislators and judges across the country continue to push for restrictions on reproductive rights. As a doctor, Kim knows that deeply personal reproductive health care decisions should be made between a patient and her doctor only. That's why she's co-sponsoring the recently reintroduced Women's Health Protection Act. The Women's Health Protection Act would codify Roe v. Wade into law and block states from enacting medically unjustified barriers to accessing abortion care. Thank you, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat in 2024. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I’m officially running for reelection
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61711474/400908406/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2ViM2ZjOC02Y2Q5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tVxg57HZG7i9mZ1_v9Fa-ey21f_v_XbRji6tOoDP8G4=&emci=71eb3fc8-6cd9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=7ceb3fc8-6cd9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=8943725) Hi Peter — Senator Tammy Baldwin here! **[In a moment, I’m going to ask you to split a donation between my campaign for Senate in 2024 and Bob Casey.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61711476/400908407/1741763267?refcode=em20230412-2-ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2ViM2ZjOC02Y2Q5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tVxg57HZG7i9mZ1_v9Fa-ey21f_v_XbRji6tOoDP8G4=)** But first, I hope you will give me a chance to explain the stakes of this race, and why your support is so important, especially right now. Winning in Wisconsin isn’t easy. As you may remember, our state gave Donald Trump the final electoral votes he needed to secure the presidency in 2016. He won by less than one point. Then in 2020, President Biden won our state by just 0.6%. And last November, Republican Senator Ron Johnson won by just 1%. So it comes as no surprise that political pundits and pollsters are forecasting that our Senate race in 2024 will be one of the most competitive in the nation. In fact, **_The Hill_ has already named me one of the most vulnerable Senate incumbents in 2024.** So as Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans begin plotting their path to flip the Senate majority, rest assured that my seat will be one of their top targets. And with the White House also on the ballot, you can bet dollars to doughnuts that the GOP and their mega-donors will spend whatever it takes to try and flip our state red. We’ve got a tough fight ahead of us, and it will take a lot of time and resources to build the campaign we’ll need to win. I know this team has what it takes to beat right-wing mega-donors at their own game _(we’ve done it before!)_ but it’s going to take all of us working together, which is why I’m asking: **[Can you split a donation of $10 or more between my reelection campaign and Bob Casey? It’d mean the world to us to have your support on Day One.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61711477/400908408/1741763267?refcode=em20230412-2-ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2ViM2ZjOC02Y2Q5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tVxg57HZG7i9mZ1_v9Fa-ey21f_v_XbRji6tOoDP8G4=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, we'll process your donation to Bob Casey + Tammy Baldwin immediately:_ | | [**$5**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61711478/400908409/1741763267?refcode=em20230412-2-ngp&express_lane=true&amount=5&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2ViM2ZjOC02Y2Q5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tVxg57HZG7i9mZ1_v9Fa-ey21f_v_XbRji6tOoDP8G4=)

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: Why I created the BLEXIT Foundation
body:
But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ebad5a61e78448559b31c56eea17eb06&_e=hpIDKUOmGjKr_uxNrcnhKjHzmtXqMPdhQiesnjOqW1IA-Z9h-G1A7PNqOnZrt-GobwPmCMHDtCmDRmIDLpg_jHpALDAEn4ekQEz3OZ_BT_vcftcYM-upkXg81ATreEx3JscnlB2aiTA5xhIoViU9Im87J5kEHIXUeQFbMZc6m7GwllofBqWPapfhoQjQ9COsMEXqJ1VdvtiW1i1w9w90yTiy48iO67sD1vv_TGyvRnILho7BiXY9WHSDeqisH6GFydZCRWeONRwaAw6RmOuB6CE0M7tGw1Gf4IHtjz6CX20%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ebad5a61e78448559b31c56eea17eb06&_e=hpIDKUOmGjKr_uxNrcnhKjHzmtXqMPdhQiesnjOqW1IA-Z9h-G1A7PNqOnZrt-GobwPmCMHDtCmDRmIDLpg_jHpALDAEn4ekQEz3OZ_BT_vcftcYM-upkXg81ATreEx3JscnlB2aiTA5xhIoViU9IpLVPcXQ3099eWVUP_z3N6R6FzFg9jU06Wn0phs8syukREOXE1iQrTVnVjYL1QLJWRZnkdKo6l31KllcPsp4_ma3LEq0ciugPZYQCaS4CjtTi2YHWKr-nawDZZZ2LLmTB_5HXrR8NXTYz3iLnYVxLm8%3D)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ebad5a61e78448559b31c56eea17eb06&_e=hpIDKUOmGjKr_uxNrcnhKjHzmtXqMPdhQiesnjOqW1IA-Z9h-G1A7PNqOnZrt-GobwPmCMHDtCmDRmIDLpg_jHpALDAEn4ekQEz3OZ_BT_vcftcYM-upkXg81ATreEx3JscnlB2aiTA5xhIoViU9IrgALL0ARU_PC_OgjoIgB-gBMYSaG9iEeuP3U0puhmTEgQQSQKHtpl0-FtMf7jHnVhwPAzI2LDSmmXl_Al1Ump668oHhI5yEDiZ0mBZYVIp2UZUiycKN1MMl6I_xoPGrAiwBaw6GYeEt4xZiDpcpeiI%3D)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ebad5a61e78448559b31c56eea17eb06&_e=hpIDKUOmGjKr_uxNrcnhKjHzmtXqMPdhQiesnjOqW1IA-Z9h-G1A7PNqOnZrt-GobwPmCMHDtCmDRmIDLpg_jHpALDAEn4ekQEz3OZ_BT_vcftcYM-upkXg81ATreEx3JscnlB2aiTA5xhIoViU9IpmnkSlF05-Erv2kropDArGxq4ss8sU8PhuO2s8OnMoYguEQmEXgXs65cx1gsn2vsS4yPdp6wfSxNGmCE5Rm9r4fzXP5U435p3KVUNPTTzmxn1GjZdSO9dztMNvQOHw3oepzD9nCPMCs8SmHzvV-vyU%3D)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ebad5a61e78448559b31c56eea17eb06&_e=hpIDKUOmGjKr_uxNrcnhKjHzmtXqMPdhQiesnjOqW1IA-Z9h-G1A7PNqOnZrt-GobwPmCMHDtCmDRmIDLpg_jHpALDAEn4ekQEz3OZ_BT_vcftcYM-upkXg81ATreEx3JscnlB2aiTA5xhIoViU9Ih2BaH946byo3W0w7YkRAxcel1KEsx2shfPkj07eV39NH56r1Xi2pZUE-bwlL4U9QSrloEoaYPCEc4UJk4rpgxpX8Xcxp4NrtrxE24So-0_lVYnCOQO35yB_gm47IU2mpS1mTO7K6Xw4AbMfXqkgHWA%3D)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ebad5a61e78448559b31c56eea17eb06&_e=hpIDKUOmGjKr_uxNrcnhKjHzmtXqMPdhQiesnjOqW1IA-Z9h-G1A7PNqOnZrt-GobwPmCMHDtCmDRmIDLpg_jHpALDAEn4ekQEz3OZ_BT_vcftcYM-upkXg81ATreEx3JscnlB2aiTA5xhIoViU9IiNv_YB3nxdLI5gyTE9Q1uyTya6xK4PsTwGGULwDUoTubvRssLd_yEaOLTr-MVj3TrbpoUP1dfLZV1VouMLBgNNfEpKzmagdhVACMXQlVhKOK6U1MCVaUJP9Jbl9vGqyf7gM4w1RX8L74mBz5o0npFU%3D)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ebad5a61e78448559b31c56eea17eb06&_e=hpIDKUOmGjKr_uxNrcnhKjHzmtXqMPdhQiesnjOqW1IA-Z9h-G1A7PNqOnZrt-GobwPmCMHDtCmDRmIDLpg_jHpALDAEn4ekQEz3OZ_BT_vcftcYM-upkXg81ATreEx3JscnlB2aiTA5xhIoViU9IqErvo37fyq_ne8jXYuWG24ZEnLwARlYZ3FuevHvdV6INmL76ebmZCnd7SOebXmJbLfAIyXQX44lAofBLcsNhVaWTLdfH_XW-dO9UEg819FOmbwsaF-8WGXPwfCqs-waj9pgD07l4FfXyOvWZ0dy0oU%3D)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ebad5a61e78448559b31c56eea17eb06&_e=hpIDKUOmGjKr_uxNrcnhKjHzmtXqMPdhQiesnjOqW1IA-Z9h-G1A7PNqOnZrt-GobwPmCMHDtCmDRmIDLpg_jHpALDAEn4ekQEz3OZ_BT_vcftcYM-upkXg81ATreEx3JscnlB2aiTA5xhIoViU9ItQh4UvcFDudW0P6Kx_dSePiOuBJ9HvPz0dVe_jp6BEhYKxFNba6YUCwkXQ2lCEs5tpuBb9w5MBOmn330OUx1v2aXmsb_cqpgramsUSt8XZ3HVdIdtAl5y88WBpxjcCF1ljh5nE5TQLHq_vSweTFDWM%3D)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ebad5a61e78448559b31c56eea17eb06&_e=hpIDKUOmGjKr_uxNrcnhKjHzmtXqMPdhQiesnjOqW1IA-Z9h-G1A7PNqOnZrt-GobwPmCMHDtCmDRmIDLpg_jHpALDAEn4ekQEz3OZ_BT_vcftcYM-upkXg81ATreEx35C5ql1dd-332edwCFMYrOw0d9ATKlatM1H26LJB79vZCtNiqefFn67b78ytfMhek6gO2YDdUCqooTMrgd-eVxX5fBY-i1caXYUyJScqyR9yQswYmK4MKZ2hXec74qltOOG08bIupdlGaFVKu5gz_CW9HQVoPEudWNIjuwEruNAc%3D)

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

clean_body: But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I've dealt with racism... I 've even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

| |

| | | I just launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee and I want to tell you a quick story...

I was just going through some old photos before this massive decision, and it made me realize how fortunate I am to be where I am today.

---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a4ad6900f2e14c1790b546fc21d51143&_e=8hTHNBAm7ttHQFX5Jyq_nZgWLCSJ_rYwBXmXCG84vGdCFWd7XDeDWUit7WyhF_Xh7oEQF8YWaUPWeYY7OvTOT8P3oN4HJH0h_mvabnqStqKJFKRDp0eo-PRTutnPnTwIOu2nJou0Uja9X4Dv6XrjLWKqy0AukBPnVsTZ5sxEQzjhnf9u3c0graPUKo4618PGVetCcUn5TYPhs9OZS8kOzGcJbDKmpU9jUOjenMv4qUVaO0DsJLAsByQwn2qmSdN2JyGDIn_OfsFgj_QyN19NqRM4IQsk3lSeQCSvLhIzFUHlXgcx6R3KmphTwQFGakTvOfht79-UrhN6iSVFC4zc2E_4sswnMMk51PrUGBcyCg-R47USdFc2mM2X5j9cLcBGlob7Taq2apaAPl-KR_b91BXZB-Eg_v0u1bcb6-65inmQUrfPyPFtTzG2kj1Q2CRL)
---

That photo was taken when I was a young boy, growing up in North Charleston, South Carolina. Back then, I had no idea I would one day consider running for President of the United States.

When I was young, my grandparents took my mother, brother, and me into their home shortly after my parents split. After that, my mother had to work long and hard hours just to put food on the table and a roof over our heads.

With the guidance that came from my mother and both of my grandparents, I was taught the importance of a good education - despite the fact that my grandfather never even knew how to read. Yet, they knew that education was the closest thing to magic in America and the ticket to fulfilling the American Dream.

---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a4ad6900f2e14c1790b546fc21d51143&_e=8hTHNBAm7ttHQFX5Jyq_nZgWLCSJ_rYwBXmXCG84vGdCFWd7XDeDWUit7WyhF_Xh7oEQF8YWaUPWeYY7OvTOT8P3oN4HJH0h_mvabnqStqKJFKRDp0eo-PRTutnPnTwIOu2nJou0Uja9X4Dv6XrjLWKqy0AukBPnVsTZ5sxEQzjhnf9u3c0graPUKo4618PGVetCcUn5TYPhs9OZS8kOzGcJbDKmpU9jUOjenMv4qUVaO0DsJLAsByQwn2qmSdN2JyGDIn_OfsFgj_QyN19NqRM4IQsk3lSeQCSvLhIzFUGQLPHaSeYsVnlFePl-wSZOtDgXqCAnEZbh969DXuaYSiVGJi7nPmQz6xHRWb3cn_JYk44mjoZsnMTAEUv2LzCRHdxD1x-_lwgavEus4zMd8PdReY0AikaKlCSaLSZ6p8Y0j1qRHIhPXrDwE0z_2IDE)
---

Here's a photo of me in high school when I was on the football team. Back then, it was my dream to play for the Dallas Cowboys when I was old enough. With a job like that, I would be able to repay my mom for all of the sacrifices she made for my brother and me - and not have to worry about keeping a roof over her head.

**Simply put: football was an escape. It was my ticket out of poverty, and to give back. **

But as life often does, it took an unexpected turn - one day I fell asleep behind the wheel of my mom's car, flipping it and almost dying in the process. I thank my lucky stars that God had more of a plan in store for me, because the story didn't end there.

During college, I dedicated my life to Christ and meaningful service, and long story short, I was able to live out my mother's American Dream!

With the help of some key mentors along the way, I was able to find success in business - and used it to improve the lives of others.

After my time in business, I decided that I wanted to run for public office and work to better the lives of people in my community. So, I chose to run in the Charleston area **_- as a Republican. _**

Since then, I have become the first black man elected to the U.S. Senate from a Southern State since Reconstruction. And now, I'm exploring a run for President of the United States. **You really could only do this in America.**

---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a4ad6900f2e14c1790b546fc21d51143&_e=8hTHNBAm7ttHQFX5Jyq_nZgWLCSJ_rYwBXmXCG84vGdCFWd7XDeDWUit7WyhF_Xh7oEQF8YWaUPWeYY7OvTOT8P3oN4HJH0h_mvabnqStqKJFKRDp0eo-PRTutnPnTwIOu2nJou0Uja9X4Dv6XrjLWKqy0AukBPnVsTZ5sxEQzjhnf9u3c0graPUKo4618PGVetCcUn5TYPhs9OZS8kOzGcJbDKmpU9jUOjenMv4qUVaO0DsJLAsByQwn2qmSdN2JyGDIn_OfsFgj_QyN19NqRM4IQsk3lSeQCSvLhIzFUGgevLtFPATXZPaR76MgBwjXln8mZ53Z6nloHtMdnbvNIxfUlCluEf_P8TrYN9ZcHhHrqQbVi1jD2NFMRUmr-PjdGLWyvCfHI6YZm26Nblog09K0-9UnM86xI5-u-3_N6FOisPSBNbnHJ9yYg8S8YAd)
---

What I have learned along the way is this: **Every American is capable of achieving their own American Dream when given an equal playing field, especially if the government gets out of their way when doing it.**

That's why I'm exploring a run for President. We need to restore faith in America and protect the American Dream for all. It's a lot of hard work, but I have only been able to make it this far with the help of my supporters.

Just like others on my team, I know you're reading this email to do the same thing - to join me in standing up for all Americans. Friend, the GOP is waging an all-out war against our reproductive rights.
First, they overturned Roe v. Wade — destroying nearly 50 years of precedent! Then, extremist legislators began passing total abortion bans in states across the country, often with little to no exceptions.
But this is only just the beginning. Now, they're scheming to criminalize interstate travel for abortion care and ban mifepristone, a commonly prescribed pill for abortions, in all 50 states!
**Thankfully, President Joe Biden is fighting tooth and nail to restore reproductive rights and lead us FORWARD. But President Biden can't win this fight alone. Wade — destroying nearly 50 years of precedent! Then, extremist legislators began passing total abortion bans in states across the country, often with little to no exceptions. Thankfully, President Joe Biden is fighting tooth and nail to restore reproductive rights and lead us FORWARD. But President Biden can't win this fight alone. As GOP attacks against him grow, we're calling on 1,000 Democrats to respond to our live poll — including you. Friend,
I sat down with Tucker Carlson last night for my FIRST INTERVIEW since I was arrested and arraigned.
_Tucker asked if there’s**ANYTHING** the Democrats could throw at me that would make me drop out of the presidential race._
Without hesitation, I said, _**“NO. I’D NEVER DROP OUT.”**_
Because the fate of America hangs in the balance – and I will _NEVER SURRENDER_ our country to the radical Left.
If an unjust, and possibly illegal, ARREST didn’t even make me flinch – then I promise you, NOTHING WILL.
**Now, I’m asking YOU to stand with me as the Left tries to throw everything they can at us to _force me out of the presidential election._**

clean_body: My first interview since I was arrested and arraigned. | | | Friend, I sat down with Tucker Carlson last night for my FIRST INTERVIEW since I was arrested and arraigned. Tucker asked if there’sANYTHING the Democrats could throw at me that would make me drop out of the presidential race. Without hesitation, I said, “NO. I’D NEVER DROP OUT.” Because the fate of America hangs in the balance – and I will NEVER SURRENDER our country to the radical Left. If an unjust, and possibly illegal, ARREST didn’t even make me flinch – then I promise you, NOTHING WILL. Now, I’m asking YOU to stand with me as the Left tries to throw everything they can at us to force me out of the presidential election. | Thank you, | Donald J. | Hi Peter!

I wanted to take a moment to introduce myself: my name is Rio Diaz and I am so excited to be Susan’s new Finance Director.

My job is to oversee our fundraising efforts so that Susan can focus on the issues that matter most to PA-07, like health care, jobs, and education.

I wanted to take a moment to introduce myself: my name is Rio Diaz and I am so excited to be Susan’s new Finance Director. My job is to oversee our fundraising efforts so that Susan can focus on the issues that matter most to PA-07, like health care, jobs, and education. As a new member of Team Wild, I’m hoping to make a good impression.= | | | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = I’m thrilled to be working with a candidate who doesn’t take corporate PAC money – even if it makes my job harder! In my short time on Team Wild, I have already seen how passionate Susan is about fighting for the families and workers of the greater Lehigh Valley and the entire nation. = | = I hope you’re as excited as I am to be on Team Wild. I look forward to working together to hold PA-07 and flip the House blue in 2024! | | Hi Peter — I have exciting news to share, and I wanted you to hear it from me:

I’m officially running for reelection to the United States Senate.

I know the road ahead won’t always be easy — election experts are already calling me one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats on the ballot next year. But with you by my side, I know we can get this done and win big next November.

I’m so proud of the progress we’ve made in the Senate over the past few years, Peter. We’ve lowered the price of prescription drugs, addressed the climate crisis with landmark investment in clean energy, expanded health care for millions of our veterans, and so much more.

A highlight of my time in the Senate was when the Respect for Marriage Act, my bipartisan bill to protect marriage equality, was signed into law late last year. That’s a moment I will never forget.

But there’s a lot more to be done, and I’m not willing to give up the fight to make things easier, better, safer, and stronger for hard-working Wisconsinites.

We have to protect Social Security and Medicare for millions of hard-working seniors who deserve the benefits they’ve spent their lives working towards.

We need to defend voting rights and protect access to the ballot box — we’ve seen the harmful impacts of right-wing extremists who try to deny election results and take away Americans’ right to safely and securely participate in elections.

And we need to re-establish protections for abortion access. After Roe v. Wade was overturned, I was devastated and angry, and I’m sure you were too. Wisconsin just took a huge first step in the right direction with our Supreme Court race last week, but we still have a long way to go toward making sure every woman has the freedom to make her own decisions no matter what zip code she lives in.

I remain hopeful that we can do all of this — and more — together. But it won’t be easy, especially if Republicans have it their way. Their views are becoming more out-of-touch and dangerous by the day, and I know for sure that they will come after my Senate seat with everything they’ve got. They’re already spending big on misleading ads attacking my record.

But with you by my side, I know we can win. We’ve done it before, together, and I wouldn’t want to have it any other way this time around.

[**_Will you stand by me again and split a contribution between my reelection campaign and Democratic Party of Georgia? It’d mean the world to me to have you with me from Day One._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61712420/400913497/2063583167?refcode=20230412.2_TB_4X&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjI0NDkwZi03MWQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BJEafdjnyihIsAO_9BJB0Iynxdb84BFHS2Nn_v7_cCA=)

I’m so proud of the progress we’ve made in the Senate over the past few years, Derek. We’ve lowered the price of prescription drugs, addressed the climate crisis with landmark investment in clean energy, expanded health care for millions of our veterans, and so much more. A highlight of my time in the Senate was when the _Respect for Marriage Act,_ my bipartisan bill to protect marriage equality, was signed into law late last year. That’s a moment I will never forget. But there’s a lot more to be done, and I’m not willing to give up the fight to make things easier, better, safer, and stronger for hard-working Wisconsities. We have to protect Social Security and Medicare for millions of hard-working seniors who deserve the benefits they’ve spent their lives working towards. We need to defend voting rights and protect access to the ballot box — we’ve seen the harmful impacts of right-wing extremists who try to deny election results and take away Americans’ right to safely and securely participate in elections. And we need to re-establish protections for abortion access. After _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned, I was devastated and angry, and I’m sure you were too. Wisconsin just took a huge first step in the right direction with our Supreme Court race last week, but we still have a long way to go toward making sure every woman has the freedom to make her own decisions no matter what zip code she lives in. I remain hopeful that we can do all of this — and more — together. But it won’t be easy, especially if Republicans have it their way. Their views are becoming more out-of-touch and dangerous by the day, and I know for sure that they will come after my Senate seat with everything they’ve got. They’re _already_ spending big on misleading ads attacking my record. **But with you by my side, I know we can win. We’ve done it before, together, and I wouldn’t want to have it any other way this time around.** **[_Will you stand by me again and split a contribution between my reelection campaign and Mark Warner? It’d mean the world to me to have you with me from Day One._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61712678/400914551/1149296651?refcode=mw_em_230412_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODY1NTAzMC03MmQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b_MshPd4us2IoXHDami5XQm0jZDxvrbCPGiMUR_Sgjg=)** ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61712679/400914552/1149296651?refcode=mw_em_230412_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODY1NTAzMC03MmQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b_MshPd4us2IoXHDami5XQm0jZDxvrbCPGiMUR_Sgjg=)**** Thank you so much, Derek. Let’s do this. — Tammy ****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61712680/400914553/1149296651?refcode=mw_em_230412_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODY1NTAzMC03MmQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b_MshPd4us2IoXHDami5XQm0jZDxvrbCPGiMUR_Sgjg=)**** ** **

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: A quick explanation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Here in Wisconsin, our recent elections have been decided by some very slim margins. So it’s no surprise that election experts are saying I’m one of the most vulnerable Senators up for reelection in 2024.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=153%2E35263%2EJV2pKH)
Peter, In just a minute, I’m going to ask you to **[make a contribution to my reelection campaign.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-launch23.BP3f3F&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230412_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=153%2E35263%2EJV2pKH)** First, though, I hope you’ll give me a moment to explain why your early support is key to our success. Here in Wisconsin, our recent elections have been decided by some very slim margins. So it’s no surprise that election experts are saying I’m one of the most vulnerable Senators up for reelection in 2024. It’s also no surprise that Republicans are going to spend millions of dollars in an attempt to defeat me. They’re going to attack me over and over again — and it’s going to be absolutely crucial that my team and I have the resources to break through the other side’s noise and ensure that folks across Wisconsin are hearing our message. I’ve taken on tough battles before — and this will be no different. **[It would mean the world to me to have your support from Day One of this campaign. Can I count on you?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-launch23.BP3f3F&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230412_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=153%2E35263%2EJV2pKH)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-launch23.kLC5-H&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230412_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=153%2E35263%2EJV2pKH)

I couldn't have asked for a stronger start to our re-election campaign! | | | | [ ](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=af344854b7&e=2de202398d)
---
| Peter,

Petitioning has come to an end and I have incredible news to share! We've collected **thousands of signatures** from every corner of the district to help secure my spot on the ballot -- all thanks to you!

[**I couldn't have asked for a stronger start to our re-election campaign, but there's still a long road ahead. Chip in today to keep this momentum going!**](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=916a79eb44&e=2de202398d)

| As we celebrate this exciting step forward, I wanted to take the time to express my gratitude for your support. Everything we've accomplished over the years -- from winning elections to delivering for our Lower Manhattan communities -- we've accomplished together. I'm thankful to have you by my side, and I hope I can count on you as we get closer to Election Day.

We've worked together to protect affordable housing, expand reproductive rights, and build a cleaner and greener city for all. [**Help continue this work by funding my re-election campaign today.**](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=1aa785b9a4&e=2de202398d)

Thank you,
Carlina

Peter, As Republican leaders touched down in Taiwan to re-affirm our commitment to their freedom and independence, Chinese fleets surrounded the Island.

China has made themselves clear: they’re not afraid to use force to intimidate America. And while I’m grateful to the Republicans who are standing strong in Taiwan, the far Left won’t let us do what we need to do to stop Communist China once and for all.

Peter, I escaped a communist country as a child when I was lucky enough to escape with my family to America.

These regimes will do whatever it takes to suffocate freedom _everywhere_ , and it’s up to us as Americans to stop them.

[**Please, join me today to take a stand against Communist China and DEFEND FREEDOM across the globe.**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=595a78cb88494a43baafa80bf5df0453&_e=9mcejC_QOItY8TW9nEOOl4kagFpMjrZ-CLEavmM3NdwIBG42Ytu9VHX5xp4SMv9CcRYwlnuPvpgB-94HwNViHId2C7nSYWPMMaA4QrzG3SqgswoxS_jz0Sq-10_N-mnHJ4XtkdlHz6aVZ1TXK94twAPg_V3rPhD-DL6w6Q0SYZVxB2GrsAu7J4GQtlQWfOGRVTkGqg5FFc18xMVDx_T7-bRQo34_JeQh2kjbtyfs3EG6TIKXyDih3eZsI6bvg1rJjL3DWVbYJFuO5M0uC90W_lr-wg1rV4QI-JusmT0sHIGpNe0gxEWrqPIPEz_6HvAFZI1dH5uL6VnCEI2wGfBJG2SF3NgfrVqeHC1WqVAdS2rk12ihQ2Afhlc6THjHYXSt)
---
[**STOP COMMUNIST CHINA**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=595a78cb88494a43baafa80bf5df0453&_e=9mcejC_QOItY8TW9nEOOl4kagFpMjrZ-CLEavmM3NdwIBG42Ytu9VHX5xp4SMv9CcRYwlnuPvpgB-94HwNViHId2C7nSYWPMMaA4QrzG3SqgswoxS_jz0Sq-10_N-mnHJ4XtkdlHz6aVZ1TXK94twAPg_V3rPhD-DL6w6Q0SYZVxB2GrsAu7J4GQtlQWfOGRVTkGqg5FFc18xMVDx_T7-QIdC60LBbtVH3B4DK8jCjUolvkNBoRjBpI330evv_K0a7lSU8ruFPOmvEdj9u_Tp2M1nLoKfTkcTCYrF8bMohSMuaq4q8gpj41QeWMoGPfOOyW8qXzKruKFYrK3CmCKZLAnz6Qo85eGoenOpbZ09-BBu2or9iMNH8NYnZp7Ioum)
---
When the U.S. falters, the Chinese Communist Party applauds.

They are the single biggest threat to American safety and security - yet the left _refuses_ to do anything about it.
In fact, they cry “racism” every time we try to take action against their dangerous regime.
Peter, as an Asian-American, I can tell you that tackling communist China isn’t “racism” - it’s common sense.
**We MUST stand strong against the Chinese Communist Party if we’re going to keep America safe, and that starts with electing conservative leaders who aren’t afraid to get tough on our enemies.**
[**Pitch in now and help us elect leaders who will DEFEND America from Communist China.**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=595a78cb88494a43baafa80bf5df0453&_e=9mcejC_QOItY8TW9nEOOl4kagFpMjrZ-CLEavmM3NdwIBG42Ytu9VHX5xp4SMv9CcRYwlnuPvpgB-94HwNViHId2C7nSYWPMMaA4QrzG3SqgswoxS_jz0Sq-10_N-mnHJ4XtkdlHz6aVZ1TXK94twAPg_V3rPhD-DL6w6Q0SYZVxB2GrsAu7J4GQtlQWfOGRVTkGqg5FFc18xMVDx_T7-dO5ORjwFZvPGuw6Sreq5UU56R2N-4sPb8v7XMzgq2oHst3o_SR29iwmLkptdvcc1_0T2pIEYAYUF8ct0bvysu6ia2lDTANhFBXqgrLCajdW6MkwAY0GnzOfFNVb9i8y8wy0nmJjLDLFT_6TFxqSreiq9rmr9d2Yz18EJVvJfc13)

| | | | | Peter, **A right wing challenger jumped into a primary race to take on treasonous ignoramus, Lauren Boebert, in her reelection attempt. **_The conservative challenger, Russ Andrews, is wrong about pretty much everything. _ _But he did describe her pretty well to the Aspen Daily News:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc19418ed-ea86-49a0-afe1-50f9f719a484/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _All true. Definitely the "moving on" part.**_ _**_**_But why replace Boebert with only a slightly-less-bad version? Why not an experienced, intelligent, hard-working Democrat, Adam Frisch, to protect abortion rights, ban assault rifles and fight MAGA attacks on democracy? _** **_Boebert will likely survive her primary challenge, as the craziest MAGAs turn out. Yet, with less money and more baggage by the time Andrews is done with her._** **_You may remember Frish came within 546 votes of ousting her last time. This will help us finish off the job!_** [**_So, will you give Adam Frisch $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can so Boebert can "move on" and be replaced by a patriot & statesman in Congress?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3144b973-c058-42b9-8016-a4ff2271505a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for staying in this fight._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Replace Sinema
subject: Sinema could throw the Senate seat to this pro-insurrectionist
body:
Lamb called the Jan. 6 insurrectionists ‘loving, Christian people’ | | | Peter - Yesterday, **far-right MAGA Republican Sheriff Mark Lamb** declared his candidacy for U.S. Senate in Arizona. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xoh2GqdBX7Ei4i2rjp_z0QLcPqRCWWvCHCRalKNvJeihE-I86BWUnN2mzGKL3aqT8XgcuIDjwFqkAO_R7pFS_ICmK4u3bo582h3HOk7nAn7OGdFXPfyQJs2P-cpo4GpYvdyhlQlBXBoNBX7xN2DB73dsToLa7gUVeIGc8F98USTz4ri5c0H8-wZBh_mwzBSHrh2Ud_rOzvQEsy2g8dBb5rNhK_rq50ZwK_SqQl2nBMTAk4HSiS-CwVKpl4VCpEjhINPnVSftMsq2bZFq3PvLUDbs7Iv195sT3QOXDC6PaBiDIWsDV1TRCxb6ywo4GhhdeUXNYfwN_-ENY_sUutDAozovLplq9g8HO0CYCNErKHjrX69X5T8-p7Q8hHzrWzUs8/3va/cBFC_hfmS0GgsafczfAZYw/h0/IG98qAfGoqqyO-jP9woYkZsFLQRxd6NzlrarjKnDneE) Lamb is a staunch supporter of Donald Trump’s efforts to overthrow the 2020 election and a frequent Fox News guest. We don’t know yet whether he, Kari Lake, or another Republican will win their party’s nomination. But we do know that Kyrsten Sinema’s potential third-party campaign will only help Republicans and hurt Democrats. **Former Capitol Hill Police Sergeant Aquilino Gonell said** “I’m disgusted by Mark Lamb’s continued perpetuation of the ‘Big Lie’ that led to the attack on me and my fellow officers...The **rioters were violent, treasonous insurrectionists** that**injured nearly 140 officers** in their quest to overturn the results of a free and fair election...And they were **egged on before, during, and after their attack on the Capitol by Mark Lamb, who called them ‘loving, Christian people** ’ who ‘just happen to support President Trump a lot.’”

name: Tammy Baldwin (via Democrats.org)
subject: re: why I’m running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee and authorized by Tammy Baldwin for Senate_
body:
I just launched my reelection campaign but I want to tell you why with a story about my family. | |
---
Hi Derek, it’s Tammy Baldwin. I just launched my reelection campaign to continue representing Wisconsin in the U.S. Senate. I want to take a moment to tell you a bit about why I’m running, and then ask you to [join our movement by splitting a $10 donation between my campaign and the DNC.](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xc7yagsEVRI3No4S9nRGLUx2MMqFMlQjIWiOHbrCX9rPw_a4XK2w_kAbXfxMKUkg0jNKGZFotdknlPdlIqpK3Y8Xk4nPks49gZOfV0ZsWzD3CzY0NpUqGvUW1CwoeaxtetRB9qYUL4ST_TE1DWEEkPQdY1qPhRkAGGhWrUBGuWDeoFxGEWr1hLpuCC-p0iuaUsl4jPink8thVyauSsSOF49otBnqGVtDfPK6hcv5X_jsDr0udZxZBsgXvqOYqMpVEqD5DF-ygIXhpH90cLT-GquUjplyBx2vwHsU_d8VI9kgkbzxj-uMMYyzffwsOd0f43x8iDq_Y9UtQsSwAQFOv_4aryHHlDUvGZAmHMVmKtGQ/3va/jaTGIH1BTuijQM4CbS9AqQ/h0/p1_G_bFLRiyw81CiEMPYLMvDVolEOtzQW8quwauCm6I) When I was a child, I got pretty sick and eventually got diagnosed with a serious illness. After three months in the hospital, my grandparents -- who raised me -- began looking for an insurance policy that would cover future care. **As hard as they tried, they couldn’t find a single policy that would cover me.** Every insurer looked at my health record and denied me health insurance because of my “pre-existing condition.” Because I was sick, my grandparents were forced to pay out-of-pocket for my treatment. I saw how much my Nana and grandfather struggled to provide the necessary care I needed. And I made a vow that I would make sure no one else would ever have to go through that. **Now, because of years of work by Democrats, people like me cannot be discriminated against because of a pre-existing condition. And caregivers like my grandparents don’t have to stay up late worrying about what will happen to their savings if their loved one gets sick.** But Derek, this progress is not guaranteed. Republicans continue to attack access to health care and threaten protections for people with pre-existing conditions across the country. And I can tell you that if Mitch McConnell and his Republican allies take hold of this Senate seat and the majority in 2024, countless Americans could find themselves in a place where insurance companies, once again, write all the rules. **I need the support of this grassroots team to defend this seat and keep lowering costs for families.** [Will you split a $10 donation between my reelection campaign and the DNC to make sure I can stay in the Senate and to elect more Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide who will fight for critical health care protections for all Americans?](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xc7yagsEVRI3No4S9nRGLUx2MMqFMlQjIWiOHbrCX9rPw_a4XK2w_kAbXfxMKUkg0jNKGZFotdknlPdlIqpK3Y8Xk4nPks49gZOfV0ZsWzD5p_QBbfTsl_3bMw5dI-q_7OTG1HobZ-zWYqk-d7qsRl72MSa6hW1CA8LAhcgUHo3hdORaza3fTmIPo_t6j91AyUN2jLXi3RQIbgBzl2jNEwyg3RDM6oWbUve4n4dFKisO70QT74dmbc_gKpN6pR_VsLG5PKUqiyuHxhQudWNHfVFwWevNeXqVkAxXR9koHLRn_74dcgMIv5SuzhdWvvc7mpHfoKz5_dKCtMteyXc9ysx19fzZ0ddLabD2EKnRS9GQ/3va/jaTGIH1BTuijQM4CbS9AqQ/h1/zjNEV3cBOXeOolNS_2DTVjsjlJElYIyx9szbj7uQ9h8)

clean_body: I just launched my reelection campaign but I want to tell you why with a story about my family. | | Hi Derek, it’s Tammy Baldwin. I just launched my reelection campaign to continue representing Wisconsin in the U.S. Senate. I want to take a moment to tell you a bit about why I’m running, and then ask you to When I was a child, I got pretty sick and eventually got diagnosed with a serious illness. After three months in the hospital, my grandparents -- who raised me -- began looking for an insurance policy that would cover future care. As hard as they tried, they couldn’t find a single policy that would cover me. Every insurer looked at my health record and denied me health insurance because of my “pre-existing condition.” Because I was sick, my grandparents were forced to pay out-of-pocket for my treatment. I saw how much my Nana and grandfather struggled to provide the necessary care I needed. And I made a vow that I would make sure no one else would ever have to go through that. Now, because of years of work by Democrats, people like me cannot be discriminated against because of a pre-existing condition. And caregivers like my grandparents don’t have to stay up late worrying about what will happen to their savings if their loved one gets sick. But Derek, this progress is not guaranteed. Republicans continue to attack access to health care and threaten protections for people with pre-existing conditions across the country. And I can tell you that if Mitch McConnell and his Republican allies take hold of this Senate seat and the majority in 2024, countless Americans could find themselves in a place where insurance companies, once again, write all the rules. I need the support of this grassroots team to defend this seat and keep lowering costs for families. I appreciate you taking the time to read my story, Derek. There are so many other stories like mine, and I refuse to let Republicans take us backwards. I really appreciate your help early in my campaign and I look forward to talking with you soon, Tammy Tammy Baldwin U.S. Senator, Wisconsin Paid for by the Democratic National Committee and authorized by Tammy Baldwin for Senate The DNC's Congressional Split Series helps fundraise for and raise awareness around down-ballot Democrats in some of the most important races across the country. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I’m officially running for reelection to the United States Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Hi there — I have exciting news to share, and I wanted you to hear it from me:

**I’m officially running for reelection to the United States Senate.**

I know the road ahead won’t always be easy — election experts are _already_ calling me one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats on the ballot next year. But with you by my side, I know we can get this done and win big next November.

[So, will you help me start the first day of our reelection in the strongest position by splitting a donation between my campaign in Wisconsin and Voter Protecton Project today?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43329?t=6&akid=7068%2E878179%2EUo96xW) | [DONATE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43329?t=7&akid=7068%2E878179%2EUo96xW)
---
I’m so proud of the progress we’ve made in the Senate over the past few years. We’ve lowered the price of prescription drugs, addressed the climate crisis with landmark investment in clean energy, expanded health care for millions of our veterans, and so much more.

A highlight of my time in the Senate was when the _Respect for Marriage Act,_ my bipartisan bill to protect marriage equality, was signed into law late last year. That’s a moment I will never forget.

But there’s a lot more to be done, and I’m not willing to give up the fight to make things easier, better, safer, and stronger for hard-working Wisconsinites.

We have to protect Social Security and Medicare for millions of hard-working seniors who deserve the benefits they’ve spent their lives working towards.

We need to defend voting rights and protect access to the ballot box — we’ve seen the harmful impacts of right-wing extremists who try to deny election results and take away Americans’ right to safely and securely participate in elections.

And we need to re-establish protections for abortion access. After _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned, I was devastated and angry, and I’m sure you were too. Wisconsin just took a huge first step in the right direction with our Supreme Court race last week, but we still have a long way to go toward making sure every woman has the freedom to make her own decisions no matter what zip code she lives in.

I remain hopeful that we can do all of this — and more — together. But it won’t be easy, especially if Republicans have it their way. Their views are becoming more out-of-touch and dangerous by the day, and I know for sure that they will come after my Senate seat with everything they’ve got. They’re _already_ spending big on misleading ads attacking my record.

**But with you by my side, I know we can win. We’ve done it before, together, and I wouldn’t want to have it any other way this time around.**

clean_body: | Hi there — I have exciting news to share, and I wanted you to hear it from me: I’m officially running for reelection to the United States Senate. I know the road ahead won’t always be easy — election experts are already calling me one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats on the ballot next year. But with you by my side, I know we can get this done and win big next November. | I’m so proud of the progress we’ve made in the Senate over the past few years. We’ve lowered the price of prescription drugs, addressed the climate crisis with landmark investment in clean energy, expanded health care for millions of our veterans, and so much more. A highlight of my time in the Senate was when the Respect for Marriage Act, my bipartisan bill to protect marriage equality, was signed into law late last year. That’s a moment I will never forget. But there’s a lot more to be done, and I’m not willing to give up the fight to make things easier, better, safer, and stronger for hard-working Wisconsinites. We have to protect Social Security and Medicare for millions of hard-working seniors who deserve the benefits they’ve spent their lives working towards. We need to defend voting rights and protect access to the ballot box — we’ve seen the harmful impacts of right-wing extremists who try to deny election results and take away Americans’ right to safely and securely participate in elections. And we need to re-establish protections for abortion access. After Roe v. Wade was overturned, I was devastated and angry, and I’m sure you were too. Wisconsin just took a huge first step in the right direction with our Supreme Court race last week, but we still have a long way to go toward making sure every woman has the freedom to make her own decisions no matter what zip code she lives in. I remain hopeful that we can do all of this — and more — together. But it won’t be easy, especially if Republicans have it their way. Their views are becoming more out-of-touch and dangerous by the day, and I know for sure that they will come after my Senate seat with everything they’ve got. They’re already spending big on misleading ads attacking my record. But with you by my side, I know we can win. We’ve done it before, together, and I wouldn’t want to have it any other way this time around.
