subject: BLM vs Blexit
body:
I am a Black man, and I'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Matter.

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ea48c520c74342d78c83684dd46d5c89&_e=M4M5hijwKXESBTMbMzwJOnVQ6Bqaf1UhCaNBbPeRnlFQeYhTg77mXi20QPg5gKXk814K4VtQaVlLoHiq-n5G5e0tQdD66wxerPim3LgckhRSyGFRc438z2orQnpG5kICPqEXjKlzba_oH5fYBjItJGs2gljsS9JGPLU110ETZNzJ7eoywqJSP4GPRFpXv7J9bHPlMHUxKYxdhLpYAMP-sNYlgU5M_H7XHbVuurSvKPBCBl8E7Ldy_zoSNSkee2e784bgCuASuQ_nEIH30ihP6PPmaaoxKQtK9Hp9izsy8AY%3D)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - _Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you're thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, "what about them is influential?!"

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren't, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ea48c520c74342d78c83684dd46d5c89&_e=M4M5hijwKXESBTMbMzwJOnVQ6Bqaf1UhCaNBbPeRnlFQeYhTg77mXi20QPg5gKXk814K4VtQaVlLoHiq-n5G5e0tQdD66wxerPim3LgckhRSyGFRc438z2orQnpG5kICrbvPkTBJQy9yEPxial377g0vBGyOMrUwZriy30rjfCtdXAXMZibavMG9CKTT8BhzHCOdXNhGP8OfgkqzF8qRqbIIMNx-kVZ3j6nXgWMZ9Zg0G0W7rLmOaKxZ3F1XXQw9IIojFaqRLnV2N9V7BrDpDh8Lks7Z1eOx1qdfCMJHL9A%3D)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? Click here to donate any amount >>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ea48c520c74342d78c83684dd46d5c89&_e=M4M5hijwKXESBTMbMzwJOnVQ6Bqaf1UhCaNBbPeRnlFQeYhTg77mXi20QPg5gKXk814K4VtQaVlLoHiq-n5G5e0tQdD66wxerPim3LgckhRSyGFRc438z2orQnpG5kICzTDtJhHZUqkm-AyHyDFg-ar9w2shmYF0dPJMhV9DtOhzSTvl7QQVuP_DovUasJK4IM6VMc_UyrDKvDE_iZEy1bzRJLzT7M2LgNbRZB-yNuKR2CijPkbZeMJejjOMX_N6dAKSwTAG4Q4tiwkJ_U66v-FNSC9NwecPyZ6AiYgkWk8%3D)

BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law.

BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them.

BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character.

BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family.

_Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters._

**Here 's how you can help:**

_I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities_.

This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter.

BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ea48c520c74342d78c83684dd46d5c89&_e=M4M5hijwKXESBTMbMzwJOnVQ6Bqaf1UhCaNBbPeRnlFQeYhTg77mXi20QPg5gKXk814K4VtQaVlLoHiq-n5G5e0tQdD66wxerPim3LgckhRSyGFRc438z2orQnpG5kICm-9w_3N0PCp3j6YQbOAcfemi5uE3zuD-vaUveFGW2naak_K4aHbsk9CF52mRLD0sEJ0rv7neJl_JSQhnbIvXkWZfKougaZY09Fv6LwEGbIMh0vRyc32XRHGz25WqQlZi6Ib2ADUj3iwxCPu2wZi-jvBeenwnJn9_beOgwrF_QnE%3D)

**HOW BLEXIT Works**

**Step One:** We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods.

**Step Two:** We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy.

We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time.

Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses.

As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them.

**Step Three:** Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media.

BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families.

**Step Four:** We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities.

What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods.

Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man.

We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods.

**So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. **

People ask me, "What does BLEXIT mean?"

It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us.

_" If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor." \- Candace Owens_

We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end.

Thank you,

Brandon Tatum

BLEXIT Foundation

clean_body: I am a Black man, and I'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Matter. Friend, I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Matter. Now, I know what you're thinking... What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis? I ask, "what about them is influential?!" This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities? No. They aren't, but BLM is. BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations. I saw the hypocrisy long ago. That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. BLEXIT is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support. How I Started BLEXIT I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans. With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me. This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever. I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM. Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others. Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes. BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law. BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them. BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character. BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. Here 's how you can help: I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities. This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter. BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: HOW BLEXIT Works Step One: We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods. Step Two: We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy. We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time. Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses. As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them. Step Three: Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media. BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families. Step Four: We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities. What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods. Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man. We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods. So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. People ask me, "What does BLEXIT mean?" It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. " If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor." \- Candace Owens We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end. Thank you, Brandon Tatum Co-Founder BLEXIT Foundation Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Invitation to a reception for Neil Makhija on April 19
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
I am writing to ask for your support for our friend and community member Neil Makhija, who is running for Commissioner of Montgomery County, Pennsylvania, a massively important role recently held by Governor Josh Shapiro. Neil is by far the most qualified candidate, and his race is critical because he will oversee elections in 2024 for Pennsylvania’s most pivotal county.
**I will be co-hosting a virtual event alongside all of the other Indian-American Members of Congress to support Neil on April 19th at 6:00pm EST** , and would be honored if you are able to join us: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/neil-makhija-zoom?refcode=jayapal**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41523?t=1&akid=2367%2E420207%2EOXivQv).
Neil, as you may know, has served as the Executive Director of Indian American Impact, and he has helped transform IMPACT into a national force recognized last month on the [**front page of the New York Times**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41524?t=2&akid=2367%2E420207%2EOXivQv).
Neil has led the charge to elect dozens of Indian Americans around the country, as well as in building support to confirm historic judges and other major federal appointments.
If he wins the race for Montgomery County Commissioner, _Neil would represent the largest constituency of any independently-elected Indian American in the United States._
With over 865,000 people (nearly three times the population of Pittsburgh), Montgomery County has become PA's most important county for Democratic voter turnout. It is also in the third most expensive media market in the country––which is why we need your help. As Commissioner, Neil would be in charge of a $500M budget, 3,000 employees, and oversee elections and the entire mail-in ballot process in 2024.
I am proud to share that Neil has the support of Representatives Raja Krishnamoorthi, Ro Khanna, Shri Thanedar, Ami Bera, and myself, as well as many more state and local elected officials around the country.
Neil is by far the most qualified candidate in this race. And with the election in under 50 days, your support will be critical in helping to put Neil over the top. There are no contribution limits for this race.
**You may RSVP for the virtual reception with Neil, or chip in to support his campaign by clicking here:[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/neil-makhija-zoom?refcode=jayapal**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41523?t=3&akid=2367%2E420207%2EOXivQv).**
All the best,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230412-2367-footer&t=4&refcode2=2367_420207_OXivQv&akid=2367%2E420207%2EOXivQv)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=5&akid=2367%2E420207%2EOXivQv)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=2367%2E420207%2EOXivQv)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

body:
Car makers are targeting conservatives. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-quyirit-trhiujldw-w/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyirit-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Wednesday. We're so glad you're here! Thank you for choosing us to be your daily place to become informed and express your opinion. You are not alone!**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyirit-trhiujldw-y/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyirit-trhiujldw-j/) **The Well Has Run Dry** The Biden administration**[proposed actions that would significantly reduce water supplies in seven western states](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyirit-trhiujldw-t/) **amid severe drought conditions that stretch back decades. **The Truth is Coming Out** **[Hunter Biden's business partners visited the White House an obscene number of times](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyirit-trhiujldw-i/) **while Biden was Vice President. _BUT, Joe didn't know anything about Hunter's business._ **Secret Order of Rockets** Another country that is supposed to be our ally **[is sending help to Russia](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyirit-trhiujldw-d/)**. _Is there any country that we can trust?_ **It's Finally Over** Oh, Happy Day! Republicans have [**forced Biden to officially end the COVID-19 emergency!**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyirit-trhiujldw-h/) **Go Woke, Go Broke** Eighty percent of Bud Light drinkers ordered something else this week, Brewhouse owner said -- **[while the 20% who did order Bud Light"weren't on social media and hadn't heard yet" about its new transgender pitch person](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyirit-trhiujldw-k/).** **Democrat National Convention** The Democratic Party **[has picked the most dangerous city in the U.S.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyirit-trhiujldw-u/)** for their convention in 2024.

**Dialing In** Car makers are **[targeting conservatives by removing this feature from their new cars](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyirit-trhiujldw-o/)**._I thought this was a joke, but it's not!_ **Calling All Moms!** Are you a mom? If so, **[Moms for America, hosts some really great webinars centered around freedom](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyirit-trhiujldw-x/).** Registration is free. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyirit-trhiujldw-m/)!**
* It could **[happen to anyone.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyirit-trhiujldw-c/)**
* One of these is**[not like the other](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyirit-trhiujldw-q/).**
* We**[laughed](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyirit-trhiujldw-a/) **a lot**.**

**[We are looking for your feedback](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyirit-trhiujldw-f/)** to understand your first impression of our messaging. [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyirit-trhiujldw-z/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyirit-trhiujldw-v/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyirit-trhiujldw-e/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyirit-trhiujldw-s/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyirit-trhiujldw-g/) | CaucusRoom, LLC

Every American loves our country, but sometimes it just takes a few patriots to make a difference. Conservatives must stick together in these trying times to fight for what’s right — not what is convenient. [**A few people can make a difference — we need to let the country know we will never give up in the face of adversity and injustice. We will ALWAYS protect America.**](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=a23374b9ecb746f297e0ba6e44ae255d&_e=nRXwkPfOwxBiFsVxrlwMl6qsz0IqRDre0i3ygIGAOt0LSjJjMgmEpWhqoF2gYd2PD8LdI-hZjf0QSZQ8eP6xr2No055RyfKXqAIch_0Vj77sj7AoCDa3UTOo7NNikAILc-7yYwSDCFB-l8jQQ9NaU1IkAJnmXJ6cxx-rgEyL9UlvAHTDMGJOIaS9vKARpnb8pSjVaWrWqOEpdq5cfue-oaYjPcSzGGovYdTj4N9fSjSN6qqVevqtAbmNmU8kjptv874DWpjJe8VDu7aklUe603zJo24YoqyK9T7TKLhNq6dRggfGN9kUBt67S0S4lwfrxYgApyHRYiwsa951uTrzp8hWWxTxDuez78E-IiEH0VT1ZDR5To8Se0sjyB34k0RtDxP3BsTmixpyNMRRCMnyqiHuMCJUHOwkxStcf109RBRa2vjes24RK3Az3hSxbEFVVAyN2eqVEOeBlTl2y6_s1thUyRhVsloQbjDXtqaZ3zWaq7MvVwD5a4QhZsqrPIyzEt0GjDr3P1q30ixl6101Rw%3D%3D)

subject: American families are in ruins. Let’s fix them.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
I have personally carried dead bodies from our communities’ ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=96ad8186a2ea4fd294def217451752de&_t=j90XMRaAJm4WShNnFDke3yREl6tzeLhLWD90PIqjnnMkBFU_qFLY-5d47hhVClbML6mOJjSkV-kbRTohDIHv6rCqwjax5_48nsu7wk-c_L8%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=96ad8186a2ea4fd294def217451752de&_t=j90XMRaAJm4WShNnFDke3yREl6tzeLhLWD90PIqjnnMkBFU_qFLY-5d47hhVClbML6mOJjSkV-kbRTohDIHv6rCqwjax5_48nsu7wk-c_L8%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=96ad8186a2ea4fd294def217451752de&_e=X0txaO-TpP-YumtYkuyftbG5Hp_tdmEApAc0VQF_uDUGbqpgDELA3BUc4hRX2EuWtAVAlQowSZphvXZM2xKFp_2VIiWb36bK0ORcUyAnS2id4T9wHUbFwV-c7FRGnN_snlFNU0_YetM6lBhgPEZiA_Q5e19v-BAGQe2nLDDPXOKdAWnqPnpEgqxeUwvuI89vaDddCcp_KhpfrHDIVZrNYgKPwnJkCi4f9OkttPj-ftjB4FyQfRq_oyv0KQzt2We6gfMoMwhC2Y442hAj7f4eNK5IUnthckaSmvuFVCzSC-_APC1oyI6ZUaLhHd6biVeel3H1ea922HniNUETDn0gi6TKiQt8ptVOJybmXTMABCpkIlsYnfu-a48Pvm2Q8aSrILO4eVGWlZb-1PUGGGA6gw%3D%3D)
|
Fellow Conservative,

My name is Mark Lamb - I’m a husband, father, God-fearing American, and proud Sheriff of Pinal County in the great state of Arizona.

**Washington needs a new Sheriff in town, which is why today I am announcing my candidacy for the United States Senate and[hope you will become one of my campaign’s first official supporters.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=96ad8186a2ea4fd294def217451752de&_e=X0txaO-TpP-YumtYkuyftbG5Hp_tdmEApAc0VQF_uDUGbqpgDELA3BUc4hRX2EuWtAVAlQowSZphvXZM2xKFp_2VIiWb36bK0ORcUyAnS2id4T9wHUbFwV-c7FRGnN_snlFNU0_YetM6lBhgPEZiA_Q5e19v-BAGQe2nLDDPXOKdAWnqPnpEgqxeUwvuI89vaDddCcp_KhpfrHDIVZrNYgKPwnJkCi4f9OkttPj-ftjB4FyQfRq_oyv0KQzt2We6OWR5J9AyHNvf9U0Li4qCdfKtuEb3agQp_EOLoa82MqdJK5ZD2jxGVKnVQsZt2i7EHcyU8mD8cReCmzvrhlktINZP_DGMvtJNgYDjWqwbjDpKYdYQ7uR60sJiAZPd4QaNqoFmjODBKl85LRjjkWOh7A%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=96ad8186a2ea4fd294def217451752de&_e=X0txaO-TpP-YumtYkuyftbG5Hp_tdmEApAc0VQF_uDUGbqpgDELA3BUc4hRX2EuWtAVAlQowSZphvXZM2xKFp_2VIiWb36bK0ORcUyAnS2id4T9wHUbFwV-c7FRGnN_snlFNU0_YetM6lBhgPEZiA_Q5e19v-BAGQe2nLDDPXOKdAWnqPnpEgqxeUwvuI89vaDddCcp_KhpfrHDIVZrNYgKPwnJkCi4f9OkttPj-ftjB4FyQfRq_oyv0KQzt2We6mmqOgFothniVGovuDlJMESGcDjMM6xVpq_6zhBnfIzj88KKAuNTgpc06yzx9JDAXxHeZv6AoeLMAaiiser620z5HJnbqw5BVPmYtmXDhAKrE2EpdmszdsuKenM8sJ_HPbc2lRtdJrdIg0pRmW5nVjA%3D%3D)
[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=96ad8186a2ea4fd294def217451752de&_e=X0txaO-TpP-YumtYkuyftbG5Hp_tdmEApAc0VQF_uDUGbqpgDELA3BUc4hRX2EuWtAVAlQowSZphvXZM2xKFp_2VIiWb36bK0ORcUyAnS2id4T9wHUbFwV-c7FRGnN_snlFNU0_YetM6lBhgPEZiA_Q5e19v-BAGQe2nLDDPXOKdAWnqPnpEgqxeUwvuI89vaDddCcp_KhpfrHDIVZrNYgKPwnJkCi4f9OkttPj-ftjB4FyQfRq_oyv0KQzt2We6VTpSpHf_PuR_fv8jEensvy9ZoYDhNIsyhqKtZEGBVcw2-UHUVF61UArEyaJ4_z46K244TjcpDcThWhI1JzHJ26S0mN19l-lZfR2CKKBNkr8-0RA0_hjq0gt5jWWovqLEuZJ2pgdl709_h9DWdaYg9A%3D%3D)

Our sliver of Arizona is home to more than 420,000 Americans spread out over 5,000+ square miles; the place we call home is a vast and arid sundrenched landscape that also happens to be on the frontlines of several conflicts. **Not only are we fighting a war on illegal narcotics, but we’re also simultaneously fighting an immigration battle.**

As the top law-enforcement officer in the area I’m responsible for the safety and wellbeing of every man, woman, and child who calls this place home. Unlike most of the career politicians in Washington, D.C., and in Phoenix, I know that in Pinal County, the buck stops with me - _**that’s why I take my job so seriously.**_

Like so many Americans, our family has experienced deep loss over the last couple of years. We lost our son and our one-year-old granddaughter eight days before Christmas. **There is simply no pain that compares to losing a child, let alone a grandbaby.** During my son’s life, he struggled with drug addiction; he even spent time in my jail for using fentanyl.

As a result of my personal loss and the tragedy I see play out every day as Sheriff, I am hyper-aware that families across Arizona and America have been adversely affected by rising crime and drug use in our communities.

**[That is why today I’m announcing my candidacy for the United States Senate to level up my fight for Arizona families and yours in our nation’s Capitol.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=96ad8186a2ea4fd294def217451752de&_e=X0txaO-TpP-YumtYkuyftbG5Hp_tdmEApAc0VQF_uDUGbqpgDELA3BUc4hRX2EuWtAVAlQowSZphvXZM2xKFp_2VIiWb36bK0ORcUyAnS2id4T9wHUbFwV-c7FRGnN_snlFNU0_YetM6lBhgPEZiA_Q5e19v-BAGQe2nLDDPXOKdAWnqPnpEgqxeUwvuI89vaDddCcp_KhpfrHDIVZrNYgKPwnJkCi4f9OkttPj-ftjB4FyQfRq_oyv0KQzt2We6hjuGF2IW3irzCPCTzkvK94nr2fx1Ptn3TV6THVFqlCi7tvu36ow5wUpgYu1mrqb7uuWLMQDemodF2wP6Hm3MgiC6N4zmzgeiF_FABmLmIaMsgOU1zYoXEB-w8ZZwejmKJatY4HtbhZUJ9mn-FY58YQ%3D%3D)**

[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=96ad8186a2ea4fd294def217451752de&_e=X0txaO-TpP-YumtYkuyftbG5Hp_tdmEApAc0VQF_uDUGbqpgDELA3BUc4hRX2EuWtAVAlQowSZphvXZM2xKFp_2VIiWb36bK0ORcUyAnS2id4T9wHUbFwV-c7FRGnN_snlFNU0_YetM6lBhgPEZiA_Q5e19v-BAGQe2nLDDPXOKdAWnqPnpEgqxeUwvuI89vaDddCcp_KhpfrHDIVZrNYgKPwnJkCi4f9OkttPj-ftjB4FyQfRq_oyv0KQzt2We6QEQsDhrSp9r8nC-hwjFnGQi99hNwqForipPMTg94uuXqGSHYh0nNdEQmVSPYdfS60rPwXfUAx-hoYkhrKkBE5xUq5fWIZkQobbCv0FSfRsxvDnU8IHGAK-_RGQVpS0mZqAn42OXbtm6_mLBr_JSY1w%3D%3D)

I can talk about personal responsibility all day long, but what’s the point if I’m not willing to **step up and speak out** against the failure of career politicians in Washington who are too politically correct to protect us?

Not only did I have to witness my son’s incarceration in one of my jails, but I have personally **carried dead bodies from our communities’ ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers.**

Each day that I get up and put my Sheriff’s badge on, I remind myself that I’m no better than any man or woman who works for me; I have been - _and continue to be_ - on the front lines of the opioid epidemic and the border fight.

To find out more about my candidacy, **[sign up for our campaign emails here.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=96ad8186a2ea4fd294def217451752de&_e=X0txaO-TpP-YumtYkuyftbG5Hp_tdmEApAc0VQF_uDUGbqpgDELA3BUc4hRX2EuWtAVAlQowSZphvXZM2xKFp_2VIiWb36bK0ORcUyAnS2id4T9wHUbFwV-c7FRGnN_snlFNU0_YetM6lBhgPEZiA_Q5e19v-BAGQe2nLDDPXOKdAWnqPnpEgqxeUwvuI89vaDddCcp_KhpfrHDIVZrNYgKPwnJkCi4f9OkttPj-ftjB4FyQfRq_oyv0KQzt2We6nz8Guq8-HxLhqJvO0Abf4kYBfnKES6gJEcniVipuiiaG2dnhtMO5a_GtVNRG_bAgsEISeXfUimCbtrF3WKMzBAsqrq1Q_iS9NBqWTi_2HcLB-I0tlQiXGk_AcKF-aPSdRrLO0Fqx1LoOUikWy5w3lQ%3D%3D)**

In my capacity as the Sheriff of Arizona’s third most populous county, I demand excellence from myself and everyone under my command. It’s our DUTY to provide protection to the people we serve, along with an unwavering commitment to the communities under our jurisdiction.

I may currently have a big job title, **but I have even more responsibility.**

**When cartel violence spills over the border into our communities, my team is responsible for holding the thugs perpetrating the crimes in our communities accountable.**

**And when domestic violence allegations are made, my team is responsible for bringing justice to the victims.**

I was raised with a deep sense of personal responsibility that has remained with me throughout my life. Today in the United States of America, it seems to me that personal responsibility has come to be seen by many as a liability rather than an asset.

**[I’ll stand up to the woke left and the weak political establishment in Washington.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=96ad8186a2ea4fd294def217451752de&_e=X0txaO-TpP-YumtYkuyftbG5Hp_tdmEApAc0VQF_uDUGbqpgDELA3BUc4hRX2EuWtAVAlQowSZphvXZM2xKFp_2VIiWb36bK0ORcUyAnS2id4T9wHUbFwV-c7FRGnN_snlFNU0_YetM6lBhgPEZiA_Q5e19v-BAGQe2nLDDPXOKdAWnqPnpEgqxeUwvuI89vaDddCcp_KhpfrHDIVZrNYgKPwnJkCi4f9OkttPj-ftjB4FyQfRq_oyv0KQzt2We6kri3sX_oA4nicEL44ko5tXztRrmicW7gGuMaCOVjcDHzhlsBCAA0oj2_Em9HH8mkkIUyZ6t8AqbmkXzE6JkKDoobZtJW_Z24Iab67PC5bAPduo5NOxpy_9ygyJ7iQ671fjdCnDcEPC1gWtM3qRxf1w%3D%3D) **I’ll work 24/7 to do everything in my purview to secure the southern border and provide our law enforcement officers with the resources they need to succeed as our first responders.

[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=96ad8186a2ea4fd294def217451752de&_e=X0txaO-TpP-YumtYkuyftbG5Hp_tdmEApAc0VQF_uDUGbqpgDELA3BUc4hRX2EuWtAVAlQowSZphvXZM2xKFp_2VIiWb36bK0ORcUyAnS2id4T9wHUbFwV-c7FRGnN_snlFNU0_YetM6lBhgPEZiA_Q5e19v-BAGQe2nLDDPXOKdAWnqPnpEgqxeUwvuI89vaDddCcp_KhpfrHDIVZrNYgKPwnJkCi4f9OkttPj-ftjB4FyQfRq_oyv0KQzt2We6GVX0ED4efbjvOpedT9W13813OD-0jiT5bnqPxyxqtfCT6zv39TsLrxcfmhz5X65x2MPRcAGqi_0KeqfX_qpPkJTGNpIOVJfC3n2t1rewNjFbUtIYDD5D-vHJdMIl6mfkM9UXwrDnXAdaYf2NAlTLvQ%3D%3D)

As sheriff, I understand that the freedoms granted to us by the Constitution to make choices also mean the freedom to make bad choices. **That’s where personal responsibility is important.** There are times when I will have to intervene and voice objections to others in law enforcement who, despite their good intentions to control a situation or public behavior, are attempting to violate the Constitution and an individual’s rights.

Benjamin Franklin famously said, _**“Those who would give up essential liberty to purchase a little temporary safety deserve neither liberty nor safety.”**_

Pinal County, Arizona voters elected me to be their top enforcement official because they know that **[I’m tougher than a $2 dollar steak.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=96ad8186a2ea4fd294def217451752de&_e=X0txaO-TpP-YumtYkuyftbG5Hp_tdmEApAc0VQF_uDUGbqpgDELA3BUc4hRX2EuWtAVAlQowSZphvXZM2xKFp_2VIiWb36bK0ORcUyAnS2id4T9wHUbFwV-c7FRGnN_snlFNU0_YetM6lBhgPEZiA_Q5e19v-BAGQe2nLDDPXOKdAWnqPnpEgqxeUwvuI89vaDddCcp_KhpfrHDIVZrNYgKPwnJkCi4f9OkttPj-ftjB4FyQfRq_oyv0KQzt2We6iQJxIgcTUxgrI26Lw4m6feiMHN-TxhynOfFjvf5sEj4nEjJc41IXLUqwyDbblRX0YMFjnO2LR1vlnFSVLywjwcfJAMC1qVHvI1mHtmf0ulK-R-7CFDWfj8u7j3aI0ZST7WvMlTLBy-CKayqElV4uDQ%3D%3D)** Right now, Washington desperately needs someone who isn’t afraid to tell it how it is or to get their hands dirty. I feel strongly that the Constitution must be protected**,a fight I will proudly continue as your next Senator in Washington.**

The voters who gave me the use of the sheriff’s badge that I wear on my lapel know that the only interest I have in elected office is their safety. _**For me, my community and family are everything.**_

Thank you,

Not only are we fighting a war on illegal narcotics, but we’re also simultaneously fighting an immigration battle. Like so many Americans, our family has experienced deep loss over the last couple of years. We lost our son and our one-year-old granddaughter eight days before Christmas. There is simply no pain that compares to losing a child, let alone a grandbaby. During my son’s life, he struggled with drug addiction; he even spent time in my jail for using fentanyl. As a result of my personal loss and the tragedy I see play out every day as Sheriff, I am hyper-aware that families across Arizona and America have been adversely affected by rising crime and drug use in our communities. Not only did I have to witness my son’s incarceration in one of my jails, but I have personally carried dead bodies from our communities’ ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers. Each day that I get up and put my Sheriff’s badge on, I remind myself that I’m no better than any man or woman who works for me; I have been - and continue to be - on the front lines of the opioid epidemic and the border fight. You read that correctly, now more than half the U.S. allows weapons to be carried in public _without a permit._** It is mind-boggling that this legislation was signed into law amid the senseless gun violence we’ve seen this year, and yet Republicans like Ron DeSantis and his buddies in Congress seem to be more moved by political agendas than by senseless deaths from gun violence. **[Team, we must push back against the MAGA right’s extremist agenda. # NEWS RELEASE

**_FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE_**

Contact: Joel Pawloski, ConstitutionalCarry24@outlook.com
Kerry McQuisten, info@kerrymcquisten.com
Jean Sampson, CarryforAll2024@yahoo.com

**CCFO submits 1,000 sponsorship signatures**

SALEM, OR—April 12, 2023—Today, Constitutional Carry for Oregon (CCFO) submitted the required 1,000 “sponsorship signatures” to the Oregon Secretary of State’s Office, completing the next step in the process to get IP-21 on the ballot. In total, CCFO submitted 1,345 signatures, providing a buffer should some signatures prove invalid.

IP-21 seeks to amend the Oregon Constitution, establishing the right to carry concealed firearms without a permit. At present, 26 U.S. states are already constitutional carry states.

After the Secretary of State’s Office validates the sponsorship signatures, which may take up to ten days, the Attorney General’s Office will generate a ballot title. Barring legal challenges to that title, the process of gathering the 160,551 signatures for the initiative to appear on the November 2024 ballot will begin thereafter. CCFO has until July 5, 2024, to submit signatures.

Constitutional Carry for Oregon is a grassroots volunteer effort. The three chief petitioners are: Joel Pawloski, a retired Army Lt. Colonel in Marion County; Kerry McQuisten, the former mayor of Baker City in Baker County; and Jean Sampson, former city council member of Clatskanie in Columbia County. More information can be found at www.ConstitutionalCarryforOregon.com.
# # #
---
| |

clean_body: | | | | | | | NEWS RELEASE FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Contact: Joel Pawloski, ConstitutionalCarry24@outlook.com Kerry McQuisten, info@kerrymcquisten.com Jean Sampson, CarryforAll2024@yahoo.com CCFO submits 1,000 sponsorship signatures SALEM, OR—April 12, 2023—Today, Constitutional Carry for Oregon (CCFO) submitted the required 1,000 “sponsorship signatures” to the Oregon Secretary of State’s Office, completing the next step in the process to get IP-21 on the ballot. In total, CCFO submitted 1,345 signatures, providing a buffer should some signatures prove invalid. IP-21 seeks to amend the Oregon Constitution, establishing the right to carry concealed firearms without a permit. At present, 26 U.S. states are already constitutional carry states. After the Secretary of State’s Office validates the sponsorship signatures, which may take up to ten days, the Attorney General’s Office will generate a ballot title. Barring legal challenges to that title, the process of gathering the 160,551 signatures for the initiative to appear on the November 2024 ballot will begin thereafter. CCFO has until July 5, 2024, to submit signatures. Constitutional Carry for Oregon is a grassroots volunteer effort. The three chief petitioners are: Joel Pawloski, a retired Army Lt. Colonel in Marion County; Kerry McQuisten, the former mayor of Baker City in Baker County; and Jean Sampson, former city council member of Clatskanie in Columbia County. More information can be found at www.ConstitutionalCarryforOregon.com. # # | | L-R: Carol Williams (Treasurer), Joel Pawloski (Chief Petitioner), Kerry McQuisten (Chief Petitioner). Not pictured: Jean Sampson, Chief Petitioner. | | "www.KerryMcQuisten.com" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 Kerry McQuisten's Common Sense Sanctuary, All rights reserved.

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

I have personally carried dead bodies from our communities’ ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=17a8a9071ed44f4e9a0c934ee8d17661&_t=T5Zyl61wzyLA8wcAkhjxgid1VgFHCETqJgDd5VQNwi7ieUNB12Gl6iyDDN5oBbzoHrtyGJtBxXuEGUq3PxDL6GLDMOrAbTiBgW-F93OXdP0%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=17a8a9071ed44f4e9a0c934ee8d17661&_t=T5Zyl61wzyLA8wcAkhjxgid1VgFHCETqJgDd5VQNwi7ieUNB12Gl6iyDDN5oBbzoHrtyGJtBxXuEGUq3PxDL6GLDMOrAbTiBgW-F93OXdP0%3D)

Peter,

My name is Mark Lamb - I’m a husband, father, God-fearing American, and proud Sheriff of Pinal County in the great state of Arizona.

**Washington needs a new Sheriff in town, which is why today I am announcing my candidacy for the United States Senate and[hope you will become one of my campaign’s first official supporters.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=17a8a9071ed44f4e9a0c934ee8d17661&_e=6k-iX92p-yRhevqv-L_6clahreuQ6WiOlDEgMQFagCldTXKUIQ-taJa1KqzBmosxbOO4VYiBc9QbpDmCVzh031otwS4gNKOpJWv0uXbFXt4SlTS81CHnuisqzwCtPqeZWlCIjeD-Aq4TL8QocfTxZcR-OHbWie4G8gynGm9-PLGSWEDq2DBcSYNiMhF3ouY_ksY5dQ0k9_WXhIKw14xEoOKRI7H46dnQ4TuUbfg7jdUigKOjJ_MNez7OaYaNNRw1c9jU6nihpJxuCZVNWpJUDPfoI6P6P9-DMYFMHbPQqmayBUURi-Hqd5qvj6WaWDl3VgA_0Gdc47-rKfDd9KA-drQgwYaI3cC2Qm9bpLNigzCh4739caRIY-34f01AArHxX28peIRzfSXgtuCuegy9cw%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=17a8a9071ed44f4e9a0c934ee8d17661&_e=6k-iX92p-yRhevqv-L_6clahreuQ6WiOlDEgMQFagCldTXKUIQ-taJa1KqzBmosxbOO4VYiBc9QbpDmCVzh031otwS4gNKOpJWv0uXbFXt4SlTS81CHnuisqzwCtPqeZWlCIjeD-Aq4TL8QocfTxZcR-OHbWie4G8gynGm9-PLGSWEDq2DBcSYNiMhF3ouY_ksY5dQ0k9_WXhIKw14xEoOKRI7H46dnQ4TuUbfg7jdUigKOjJ_MNez7OaYaNNRw1z8TIT2K9onw4WZjYOAFdx9hnCcrw_Q3Rnnlg0Bd2dge3KwEh6u_yKdwbL2afAkA5AqhtY9vmnQUNLJQGqZ6Yk0MeW41Pk3lh98C6KFIdeyNyvGnNDZ3SlW-YMkTn-J3ueIOxDLlEHcQ7RLRcTqx68Q%3D%3D)
[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=17a8a9071ed44f4e9a0c934ee8d17661&_e=6k-iX92p-yRhevqv-L_6clahreuQ6WiOlDEgMQFagCldTXKUIQ-taJa1KqzBmosxbOO4VYiBc9QbpDmCVzh031otwS4gNKOpJWv0uXbFXt4SlTS81CHnuisqzwCtPqeZWlCIjeD-Aq4TL8QocfTxZcR-OHbWie4G8gynGm9-PLGSWEDq2DBcSYNiMhF3ouY_ksY5dQ0k9_WXhIKw14xEoOKRI7H46dnQ4TuUbfg7jdUigKOjJ_MNez7OaYaNNRw148bmTB6oUXHQcs-GJFMG6Xam7Fz8zCzfJdsF_E-zm_acZ3zzqu8wWVT6ua9E2R7RL3UDjmYRmpfgWRyvnEVF1TkNGv9_R9fW031OqE59vYQPtJ5wcD_Uu9WTkVWYAXa-488IuHYjP7bv59-hqmgQAg%3D%3D)

Our sliver of Arizona is home to more than 420,000 Americans spread out over 5,000+ square miles; the place we call home is a vast and arid sundrenched landscape that also happens to be on the frontlines of several conflicts. **Not only are we fighting a war on illegal narcotics, but we’re also simultaneously fighting an immigration battle.**

As the top law-enforcement officer in the area I’m responsible for the safety and wellbeing of every man, woman, and child who calls this place home. Unlike most of the career politicians in Washington, D.C., and in Phoenix, I know that in Pinal County, the buck stops with me - _**that’s why I take my job so seriously.**_

Like so many Americans, our family has experienced deep loss over the last couple of years. We lost our son and our one-year-old granddaughter eight days before Christmas. **There is simply no pain that compares to losing a child, let alone a grandbaby.** During my son’s life, he struggled with drug addiction; he even spent time in my jail for using fentanyl.

As a result of my personal loss and the tragedy I see play out every day as Sheriff, I am hyper-aware that families across Arizona and America have been adversely affected by rising crime and drug use in our communities.

**[That is why today I’m announcing my candidacy for the United States Senate to level up my fight for Arizona families and yours in our nation’s Capitol.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=17a8a9071ed44f4e9a0c934ee8d17661&_e=6k-iX92p-yRhevqv-L_6clahreuQ6WiOlDEgMQFagCldTXKUIQ-taJa1KqzBmosxbOO4VYiBc9QbpDmCVzh031otwS4gNKOpJWv0uXbFXt4SlTS81CHnuisqzwCtPqeZWlCIjeD-Aq4TL8QocfTxZcR-OHbWie4G8gynGm9-PLGSWEDq2DBcSYNiMhF3ouY_ksY5dQ0k9_WXhIKw14xEoOKRI7H46dnQ4TuUbfg7jdUigKOjJ_MNez7OaYaNNRw1EkRvAy8Tdr2Wr2gu3dN7XW_5MRoOdnXzi___7G8gZD0G-iilrWuPDxscAbg416P7zZOAurmSmX4C6wCmQQhDjIgYLK7cEFp6vT2WQAvM7qxUPrUElcZsl-25vPOSkrEHQ3FPZbIP82vfG4kXhJLF0w%3D%3D)**

[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=17a8a9071ed44f4e9a0c934ee8d17661&_e=6k-iX92p-yRhevqv-L_6clahreuQ6WiOlDEgMQFagCldTXKUIQ-taJa1KqzBmosxbOO4VYiBc9QbpDmCVzh031otwS4gNKOpJWv0uXbFXt4SlTS81CHnuisqzwCtPqeZWlCIjeD-Aq4TL8QocfTxZcR-OHbWie4G8gynGm9-PLGSWEDq2DBcSYNiMhF3ouY_ksY5dQ0k9_WXhIKw14xEoOKRI7H46dnQ4TuUbfg7jdUigKOjJ_MNez7OaYaNNRw1VlKHlMCGe6YoQtq5QYw2aVJViFm1P-zmdLFFLcL4hVwAlhscwb2j2NR_EkYgXwIZhP4-5vM1OkhFuJ5FJM8TYzKQIbLAQqeHRvswUtCFJXEbh8PiQFzVIPvDWwKJCNcP0XjXpMU811bexFtFrBqzyg%3D%3D)

I can talk about personal responsibility all day long, but what’s the point if I’m not willing to **step up and speak out** against the failure of career politicians in Washington who are too politically correct to protect us?

Not only did I have to witness my son’s incarceration in one of my jails, but I have personally **carried dead bodies from our communities’ ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers.**

Each day that I get up and put my Sheriff’s badge on, I remind myself that I’m no better than any man or woman who works for me; I have been - _and continue to be_ - on the front lines of the opioid epidemic and the border fight.

To find out more about my candidacy, **[sign up for our campaign emails here.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=17a8a9071ed44f4e9a0c934ee8d17661&_e=6k-iX92p-yRhevqv-L_6clahreuQ6WiOlDEgMQFagCldTXKUIQ-taJa1KqzBmosxbOO4VYiBc9QbpDmCVzh031otwS4gNKOpJWv0uXbFXt4SlTS81CHnuisqzwCtPqeZWlCIjeD-Aq4TL8QocfTxZcR-OHbWie4G8gynGm9-PLGSWEDq2DBcSYNiMhF3ouY_ksY5dQ0k9_WXhIKw14xEoOKRI7H46dnQ4TuUbfg7jdUigKOjJ_MNez7OaYaNNRw1ykkOUbjTTJspEiE5FxWqkFk-a-1ywhWaKa8qh5dpgtbr8gFJUR3reZAHqgavWrde6tD_jMvDhLoyLusN5WNujaEmAl9uveV6uqZbzq8Is0cpQpJcxdPEDD_KYnZb25m9GyELFTwmfRvo54s6SyeRnA%3D%3D)**

In my capacity as the Sheriff of Arizona’s third most populous county, I demand excellence from myself and everyone under my command. It’s our DUTY to provide protection to the people we serve, along with an unwavering commitment to the communities under our jurisdiction.

I may currently have a big job title, **but I have even more responsibility.**

**When cartel violence spills over the border into our communities, my team is responsible for holding the thugs perpetrating the crimes in our communities accountable.**

**And when domestic violence allegations are made, my team is responsible for bringing justice to the victims.**

I was raised with a deep sense of personal responsibility that has remained with me throughout my life. Today in the United States of America, it seems to me that personal responsibility has come to be seen by many as a liability rather than an asset.

**[I’ll stand up to the woke left and the weak political establishment in Washington.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=17a8a9071ed44f4e9a0c934ee8d17661&_e=6k-iX92p-yRhevqv-L_6clahreuQ6WiOlDEgMQFagCldTXKUIQ-taJa1KqzBmosxbOO4VYiBc9QbpDmCVzh031otwS4gNKOpJWv0uXbFXt4SlTS81CHnuisqzwCtPqeZWlCIjeD-Aq4TL8QocfTxZcR-OHbWie4G8gynGm9-PLGSWEDq2DBcSYNiMhF3ouY_ksY5dQ0k9_WXhIKw14xEoOKRI7H46dnQ4TuUbfg7jdUigKOjJ_MNez7OaYaNNRw12BAJWgBoCqCFLlYJVVPrcF4Do4odbLfGVmfC71tuWB0UHCeTdIGuazIqZmMEl_9gN7d7mtOsQcgbqg5_NkDBPorpXVXcAGp8cE1PkHJiXrmpGkGEHue0wojdqj4ISVh_ggTT1PUn4COS-eJdSvNVnQ%3D%3D) **I’ll work 24/7 to do everything in my purview to secure the southern border and provide our law enforcement officers with the resources they need to succeed as our first responders.

[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=17a8a9071ed44f4e9a0c934ee8d17661&_e=6k-iX92p-yRhevqv-L_6clahreuQ6WiOlDEgMQFagCldTXKUIQ-taJa1KqzBmosxbOO4VYiBc9QbpDmCVzh031otwS4gNKOpJWv0uXbFXt4SlTS81CHnuisqzwCtPqeZWlCIjeD-Aq4TL8QocfTxZcR-OHbWie4G8gynGm9-PLGSWEDq2DBcSYNiMhF3ouY_ksY5dQ0k9_WXhIKw14xEoOKRI7H46dnQ4TuUbfg7jdUigKOjJ_MNez7OaYaNNRw1mfopdYRA3Swdex_sSIwRBgrrvzIuDLtzQQnL1iqON_pp-UqAW7SekRyRSNyWjMnX4cWpE-2-38cyeGb2h7SeMNM2CWN-JKkvxGbLjA4bpzNcNjAazfx-qW9ayXyA5XpvqsTNwuIn78foxifzw3bn5Q%3D%3D)

As sheriff, I understand that the freedoms granted to us by the Constitution to make choices also mean the freedom to make bad choices. **That’s where personal responsibility is important.** There are times when I will have to intervene and voice objections to others in law enforcement who, despite their good intentions to control a situation or public behavior, are attempting to violate the Constitution and an individual’s rights.

Benjamin Franklin famously said, _**“Those who would give up essential liberty to purchase a little temporary safety deserve neither liberty nor safety.”**_

Pinal County, Arizona voters elected me to be their top enforcement official because they know that **[I’m tougher than a $2 dollar steak.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=17a8a9071ed44f4e9a0c934ee8d17661&_e=6k-iX92p-yRhevqv-L_6clahreuQ6WiOlDEgMQFagCldTXKUIQ-taJa1KqzBmosxbOO4VYiBc9QbpDmCVzh031otwS4gNKOpJWv0uXbFXt4SlTS81CHnuisqzwCtPqeZWlCIjeD-Aq4TL8QocfTxZcR-OHbWie4G8gynGm9-PLGSWEDq2DBcSYNiMhF3ouY_ksY5dQ0k9_WXhIKw14xEoOKRI7H46dnQ4TuUbfg7jdUigKOjJ_MNez7OaYaNNRw1X-AVsE_HYqEYr0gjjs5y32PIHMGzAM9yJ-0J2Afu8hj_fJBWgsfgY3G-P7-Z9kZyHBSGHIIjwLCrwKrSg69LL-jSl-wLCewxUThBsVrffJZXJFHEzvfei3Pf2uV1SNrlB8XqBSACQdZxFTm2_3i1iw%3D%3D)** Right now, Washington desperately needs someone who isn’t afraid to tell it how it is or to get their hands dirty. I feel strongly that the Constitution must be protected**,a fight I will proudly continue as your next Senator in Washington.**

The voters who gave me the use of the sheriff’s badge that I wear on my lapel know that the only interest I have in elected office is their safety. _**For me, my community and family are everything.**_

Thank you,

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=17a8a9071ed44f4e9a0c934ee8d17661&_e=6k-iX92p-yRhevqv-L_6clahreuQ6WiOlDEgMQFagCldTXKUIQ-taJa1KqzBmosxbOO4VYiBc9QbpDmCVzh031otwS4gNKOpJWv0uXbFXt4SlTS81CHnuisqzwCtPqeZWlCIjeD-Aq4TL8QocfTxZcR-OHbWie4G8gynGm9-PLGSWEDq2DBcSYNiMhF3ouY_ksY5dQ0k9_WXhIKw14xEoOKRI7H46dnQ4TuUbfg7jdUigKOjJ_MNez7OaYaNNRw1kxBRQ8YyDrQAByFneVCoUGWrkVyWQIbtso1Ey0Gay_gLEu3I0x_mhjIDb1g9-AFyjC7ZU6Ysybu9bC6FQpHXElCbHHT5UvZGDi_zcRDjrDzctZ-3MPGzThsQlWzEj45t2WWN7PlUXWBew4xMAJVcSg%3D%3D)

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

Wade, stripping away fundamental rights and almost 50 years of precedent in an instant; ⏩ ⏩ Now, an extremist Texas judge has just overturned the FDA's approval of the abortion medication mifepristone, which could make abortions impossible even in states where it's still legal; ⏩ ⏩ ⏩ And** if that wasn't bad enough, Ron DeSantis is gearing up to sign a six-week abortion ban in Florida! With the GOP controlling the House, we know they're frothing at the mouth to pass a nationwide abortion ban – but we can't let this slide, friend. We're circulating a petition to protect reproductive rights, but we're still missing your name, and we need 492 more signatures before our midnight deadline: ** | | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by AB PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. American Bridge 21st Century 800 Maine Ave SW Suite 400 Washington, DC 20024 United States

$1.
That's the donation Ilhan needs you to make this afternoon. That's right — just $1.
$1 to make sure we have the resources required to fight back against the right wing and the millions of dollars in outside spending they're already planning.
$1 to keep a champion for working people fighting for our progressive values in Congress.
$1 because the only way we fund this campaign is by lots and lots of people standing together.
Ilhan doesn't take a cent from corporate PACs, and counts on our grassroots movement to fund a winning campaign. What do you say?
**[Use this link to contribute $1 to show you stand with Ilhan Omar today. Every donation makes a difference, no matter the amount.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-apr23.QUZUGP&refcode=em230412-1-g-pd&t=2&akid=68%2E791427%2EZHnCAL)

We know Election Day seems far off in the future, but the truth is that it's the groundwork we lay here in 2023 that will ensure we can fight and win.
As always, thank you for your support.
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan

The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn't over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side. You only have until "11:59 PM" to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. "Renew before it’s too late" Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down. Thank you, Mark, National Republican Membership Office | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. NRCC 320 First St SE Washington, DC 20003 By providing your cell phone or mobile phone number you are consenting to receive calls and texts, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number with campaign notifications from the National Republican Congressional Committee (21818). NRCC is happy to help at 888-606-1023. Reply HELP for help, STOP to end. MessFreqMayVary. Msg&DataRatesMayApply. Message frequency may vary. Terms and Conditions . Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

Hey, we just launched our official store! With only 34 days left until Election Day, wearing Helen shirts, buttons, and stickers is one of the best ways to show your community that you’ll be voting for Helen Gym.

SHOP NOW → https://store.helengym.com

Every piece is union-made right here in the USA, and every order directly supports our movement for a safer, stronger Philadelphia for all of us.

ORDER A SHIRT→ https://store.helengym.com/apparel/tees
ORDER BUTTONS→ https://store.helengym.com/goods/buttons
ORDER STICKERS→ https://store.helengym.com/goods/stickers

The hot pink t-shirts have already started flying off the shelves! Can’t wait to see members of this team wearing them all over the city. Thank you for your support.

— Team Helen
Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. If you’d like to donate to Helen and help elect her as Philadelphia’s next Mayor, click here:

name: Marco Rubio
subject: More of this in the Senate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Banks for Senate
body:
| [ ](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=9628abc161e142a78db7e876231a1277&_e=V7P-LH2Oar7C2KW17JmRHfKIfR-Hdn8iknQeMyU0OOUOl469jImuxPjouTBGuNmOoHzK9I_ty5SEkklUggtyRP0boIljyzMKDGF9YkXGFM3qkqHzloymuulDszL-iMG5FkSWERSd9V5NVsZPN4kCND9DixYo9HINps63Vrck6F42d8Bb6u5Fxt_yosI3SidJuLbsvIvBeihI65CXAsokHL9ep7xOS4YkyOxcrdWyAayjeZHh-RnrZVpbUTH3vcLqT-E4VOJ9MlyugiChTgygG8Qxkx1xRK6hDEia4lQYMVaz1OsxoXxrxdxKbdQLAXFhUo1rLaQrjgKJ01TI3i-AzWXD2ReXgTJ1QgD5zejHzpu-lhMZEtJxiqD7L3kJea5914Y5GEeybD2dmfs84KFYPIJ3NyI_c_eP1yCQhNZsXILJ2R0_iY9nu1RJCk9EudWFRmkoRto82d1qDgZl5PMajmMlS8bj1VBdxGUZ5p-wOdred69mw9N_p52HNEtdsnQlTlLVkAddzyYsBNB4IU-1st9dogMm-Yc1y_4qyZiYwEjMrpMSVkzBrz7WnmgF0atpgMjOj-YcSlNIfmkW4l6vhw%3D%3D)

---
Are you happy with what I do in the Senate, friend?

I work hard and fight for your rights every day in the Senate. I want the best for American workers and families. **And I am living proof that the American Dream is very much alive.**

Now, there’s a friend of mine from Indiana who’s running for Senate. His name is Jim Banks and he shares much of my vision for our country’s future.

[](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=9628abc161e142a78db7e876231a1277&_e=V7P-LH2Oar7C2KW17JmRHfKIfR-Hdn8iknQeMyU0OOUOl469jImuxPjouTBGuNmOoHzK9I_ty5SEkklUggtyRP0boIljyzMKDGF9YkXGFM3qkqHzloymuulDszL-iMG5FkSWERSd9V5NVsZPN4kCND9DixYo9HINps63Vrck6F42d8Bb6u5Fxt_yosI3SidJuLbsvIvBeihI65CXAsokHL9ep7xOS4YkyOxcrdWyAayjeZHh-RnrZVpbUTH3vcLqT-E4VOJ9MlyugiChTgygG8Qxkx1xRK6hDEia4lQYMVaz1OsxoXxrxdxKbdQLAXFhUo1rLaQrjgKJ01TI3i-AzWXD2ReXgTJ1QgD5zejHzpu-lhMZEtJxiqD7L3kJea5914Y5GEeybD2dmfs84KFYPIJ3NyI_c_eP1yCQhNZsXILJ2R0_iY9nu1RJCk9EudWFzJhVIFqa3Ck5B2v3E0BdaE1I7uHBy0kkEviLJwPQkxnYe7lUKVVvT_R0qC3g_t9rMssKFWKG6ftk64YIOoNv9qJWt5n1MEnc-GpHM_-pb94LvS0--q18ZNGZleaD-A_9JcNx0jhZQ_9lJnKoErGaDg%3D%3D)
Jim’s a husband and father of three girls. He bravely served our country in Afghanistan and is now serving the people of Indiana in the U.S. House.

Friend, Jim Banks is the most qualified candidate for Senate that I’ve met in a very long time. **He’s a true conservative who I know will be an ally to you and me when he is elected to the Senate.** But here's the thing, friend: [**he will never win his race without YOUR help!**](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=9628abc161e142a78db7e876231a1277&_e=V7P-LH2Oar7C2KW17JmRHfKIfR-Hdn8iknQeMyU0OOUOl469jImuxPjouTBGuNmOoHzK9I_ty5SEkklUggtyRP0boIljyzMKDGF9YkXGFM3qkqHzloymuulDszL-iMG5FkSWERSd9V5NVsZPN4kCND9DixYo9HINps63Vrck6F42d8Bb6u5Fxt_yosI3SidJuLbsvIvBeihI65CXAsokHL9ep7xOS4YkyOxcrdWyAayjeZHh-RnrZVpbUTH3vcLqT-E4VOJ9MlyugiChTgygG8Qxkx1xRK6hDEia4lQYMVaz1OsxoXxrxdxKbdQLAXFhUo1rLaQrjgKJ01TI3i-AzWXD2ReXgTJ1QgD5zejHzpu-lhMZEtJxiqD7L3kJea5914Y5GEeybD2dmfs84KFYPIJ3NyI_c_eP1yCQhNZsXILJ2R0_iY9nu1RJCk9EudWFFzQ3TsN4iOLmxMBh7gr0qvK1CTpM8zXVBGfedFhNapG9smzpSymjcWrLFN-UdS3p7ZVo807l11ioQAFn_cNHANbVt1Gcds8JDndqiFA0GkuVCd80Mx3hl-FgltQdQzteNEFT8_gYiXx_4rYW9hb5jg%3D%3D)
| [ **DONATE NOW TO HELP ELECT JIM BANKS** ](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=9628abc161e142a78db7e876231a1277&_e=V7P-LH2Oar7C2KW17JmRHfKIfR-Hdn8iknQeMyU0OOUOl469jImuxPjouTBGuNmOoHzK9I_ty5SEkklUggtyRP0boIljyzMKDGF9YkXGFM3qkqHzloymuulDszL-iMG5FkSWERSd9V5NVsZPN4kCND9DixYo9HINps63Vrck6F42d8Bb6u5Fxt_yosI3SidJuLbsvIvBeihI65CXAsokHL9ep7xOS4YkyOxcrdWyAayjeZHh-RnrZVpbUTH3vcLqT-E4VOJ9MlyugiChTgygG8Qxkx1xRK6hDEia4lQYMVaz1OsxoXxrxdxKbdQLAXFhUo1rLaQrjgKJ01TI3i-AzWXD2ReXgTJ1QgD5zejHzpu-lhMZEtJxiqD7L3kJea5914Y5GEeybD2dmfs84KFYPIJ3NyI_c_eP1yCQhNZsXILJ2R0_iY9nu1RJCk9EudWFDBacaVXyrmBsv1YFrs6q5DiBik06SB667aoaFEE15_15Pov9oX7OzQjYV3hG3MUJTUCGL6Lbf1CLTjufxil3PpD_EzDQKR4PRz8E5XeSRpR0hN7NtTo9LwLNkv0P8N4yuUVprS_e5IlZpST7WWbSjw%3D%3D)
---

I wish Rep. Banks could just waltz into the Senate and join me in the fight to save our country, but as we all know, Senate races are far from a walk in the park.

Republicans lost Senate seats in 2022 because we were unprepared. **_That cannot happen again._** Democrats are already gearing up to fight Jim Banks on his run and they will win if we don’t start preparing now!

[**So please, friend, chip in whatever you can to get help get Jim’s campaign started. I’m really counting on you to help him out, I need an ally in the Senate who we can all rely on!**](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=9628abc161e142a78db7e876231a1277&_e=V7P-LH2Oar7C2KW17JmRHfKIfR-Hdn8iknQeMyU0OOUOl469jImuxPjouTBGuNmOoHzK9I_ty5SEkklUggtyRP0boIljyzMKDGF9YkXGFM3qkqHzloymuulDszL-iMG5FkSWERSd9V5NVsZPN4kCND9DixYo9HINps63Vrck6F42d8Bb6u5Fxt_yosI3SidJuLbsvIvBeihI65CXAsokHL9ep7xOS4YkyOxcrdWyAayjeZHh-RnrZVpbUTH3vcLqT-E4VOJ9MlyugiChTgygG8Qxkx1xRK6hDEia4lQYMVaz1OsxoXxrxdxKbdQLAXFhUo1rLaQrjgKJ01TI3i-AzWXD2ReXgTJ1QgD5zejHzpu-lhMZEtJxiqD7L3kJea5914Y5GEeybD2dmfs84KFYPIJ3NyI_c_eP1yCQhNZsXILJ2R0_iY9nu1RJCk9EudWFMJGrpc3o23Br599eiwhKrqXG_cxHiVBCPDkBuaSfD-YLIbLw-QTxrQmN0k6eV2YIWObh-ADtvIN8nwqnTfoazvP1IajP6hFtM2-5u-H2K9qTKH2ImYbmSiXDQOD5NLQEbjxNHiyq8bEPWaU8QvJUjQ%3D%3D)
[ **HELP SEND JIM BANKS TO THE U.S. SENATE NOW** ](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=9628abc161e142a78db7e876231a1277&_e=V7P-LH2Oar7C2KW17JmRHfKIfR-Hdn8iknQeMyU0OOUOl469jImuxPjouTBGuNmOoHzK9I_ty5SEkklUggtyRP0boIljyzMKDGF9YkXGFM3qkqHzloymuulDszL-iMG5FkSWERSd9V5NVsZPN4kCND9DixYo9HINps63Vrck6F42d8Bb6u5Fxt_yosI3SidJuLbsvIvBeihI65CXAsokHL9ep7xOS4YkyOxcrdWyAayjeZHh-RnrZVpbUTH3vcLqT-E4VOJ9MlyugiChTgygG8Qxkx1xRK6hDEia4lQYMVaz1OsxoXxrxdxKbdQLAXFhUo1rLaQrjgKJ01TI3i-AzWXD2ReXgTJ1QgD5zejHzpu-lhMZEtJxiqD7L3kJea5914Y5GEeybD2dmfs84KFYPIJ3NyI_c_eP1yCQhNZsXILJ2R0_iY9nu1RJCk9EudWF9_rQue-Q-m1K2_tvtvx6EhGME6Vn03ZQrEqUwIW475OjfQmyRiJjxsNabXqtJOtbysEIJsVJrNA-js9P3B0w6BQK4dkJHC4UD0R6PjCE3kZTpvIMpvIc0I8Z0k-lcFc9LlA7ty1IIUtrTVuItfsugA%3D%3D)
---

Thank you so much for your support,

Marco Rubio

Paid for by Banks for Senate

name: Tim Scott
subject: I’ve got some news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT PRESIDENTIAL EXPLORATORY COMMITTEE
body:
I’ll cut right to the chase, I can’t stress this enough... | |
---
| | | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1cd25c7506de4aaebdd3d00d1b648a08&_e=MV0d6Z7ilLL9NFT_Wo_xfYEZVLKd4Yom8EvWVLtKLeSn3rMXzpL9vlEGps7jgQfk9o0fE2zAMbO1eqTJof8bRar49xVihiCJQq4o_PR7e2-mV9miDb4nbZLWuFxbbVN0hSJi1FzykFuTC0dkixGESCIvL8Cq7foBUhyf3U3SpqyFXdVgCd9sDpDikXKE6rI8VbxpePbuCZZEmFtwx7ZCcYWRvBkTAji0zdhEjsq_YbwB-qMCaFmWGC9gYRqtIO7i6pblNScdnJLEskSaRvSMHau_S30OgkIoj3oD4VbAiT686tis8Yj5bX8TeU65Li8ODOkQ5-Tmi54t1T7Vj6AayY4ARpJYgHiuBMy3FFngXe6ltv5_Ap52xcdk6IRGrVbD)
---
It's Tim Scott.

I'm really glad you chose to open this email so I'll cut right to the chase: **I just launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee.**
I believe in securing the border.
I believe in election integrity.
I believe in parental rights.
I believe in supporting our brave law enforcement.
**And I believe that with faith and conservative values, this country 's best days are ahead of us.**

---
| | | [SUPPORT TIM SCOTT HERE](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1cd25c7506de4aaebdd3d00d1b648a08&_e=MV0d6Z7ilLL9NFT_Wo_xfYEZVLKd4Yom8EvWVLtKLeSn3rMXzpL9vlEGps7jgQfk9o0fE2zAMbO1eqTJof8bRar49xVihiCJQq4o_PR7e2-mV9miDb4nbZLWuFxbbVN0hSJi1FzykFuTC0dkixGESCIvL8Cq7foBUhyf3U3SpqyFXdVgCd9sDpDikXKE6rI8VbxpePbuCZZEmFtwx7ZCcYWRvBkTAji0zdhEjsq_YbwsE8vPpxzXVJjMWxjy5e-cDhNcU72aacjU4o4c9F-Yfax4LtU7etHdPJE0KS1ZqAozf_LzJ2MbDisuKD6DTS3ReiToxYoVog2hWj3IdhC3Wz_15I9jexwyyAWTjjNzsqMDITVNsN6fmFr4KAicUPce "SUPPORT TIM SCOTT HERE")
---

Here's the deal, my faith is the central pillar of my life. It's what guides me through my day. Without God in my life, I would have no purpose and that's why I need your help to restore faith to our nation's values.

I can't stress enough that I can't do this alone. Polls show Americans are losing faith and if we don't take action right now, it could be gone forever. But I won't allow this and I certainly hope you will not either.

_**[So, if you agree with me that we can attain a better tomorrow and are determined to ensure the future of our country is rooted in conservative values, then I'm humbly asking you to be one of the first donors to my Presidential Exploratory Committee Fund. clean_body: We expect this race to be the most competitive in the country, so we have to build a war chest right now. | You may be receiving this email because of your support for Democrats in Arizona. Democrats came within 1 point of defeating Republican David Schweikert. We’re counting on supporters like you to join our team and help flip this seat. However, if you no longer wish to receive updates from us, you can at any time. = | Peter, Earlier today, I announced my campaign for Congress in Arizona’s 1st Congressional District. I’m so grateful for all the support we’ve received so far - it is clear that Arizonans want a CEO with a conscience, and I’m ready to serve. = | = David Schweikert is a corrupt career politician who values power more than his own constituents. Last year, Democrats came closer to flipping this seat than they ever have before, and we’re ready to finish the job next year. We expect this race to be the most competitive in the country, so we have to build a war chest right now. I’m running for Congress because I’m passionate about creating real, lasting change in our community. Arizonans have suffered under Schweikert’s failed leadership for far too long, but I’m committed to being a new voice in Congress so we’re able to build a better future for our residents. = | | | = | = | = | = | = With appreciation, Kurt * | | = Paid for by Kroemer for Congress Kroemer for Congress PO Box 9413 Phoenix, AZ 85068 United States | | ---|--- = = Email communication is a crucial part of our campaign, but if you no longer wish to receive emails about how you can be a part of the movement to defeat Republican David Schweikert, please

name: Sheriff Mark Lamb
subject: Washington needs a new Sheriff in town
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
I have personally carried dead bodies from our communities’ ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=9915df7d110b425bbc1b74e4cd4cad36&_t=c7syS5qAb3mprHbf3C2-yJ_KX36heGZxcdoPa0mMHEdTHnGSH2F6diMKIR8TnwBZBtwePSdyhTb77j35mqSZzcr5k5hAPYiu7bhH5hkDplE%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=9915df7d110b425bbc1b74e4cd4cad36&_t=c7syS5qAb3mprHbf3C2-yJ_KX36heGZxcdoPa0mMHEdTHnGSH2F6diMKIR8TnwBZBtwePSdyhTb77j35mqSZzcr5k5hAPYiu7bhH5hkDplE%3D)

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9915df7d110b425bbc1b74e4cd4cad36&_e=-AiZM6eHUnQckLJ-I867QIlXtUbWp9jforKvFrVVTylVJIO3s3nXu0-CTdgCkq2pHjqSFGHC0gYS0T-V3SomI7yy2ZoNQccTIqfNBcza9bhQF3OcJ4fEB4houZRblpY8eWbK1Jkj-iNrMh69RXY2AonF2HTV3LD66m9mQa9W2RJpI-yMacMVhMs7rnc2xJdH8iPoypLdZUUPn4R-jh62PXYloBd8nHgGgJjKnUeRfN8hao8vM3-Z_9qWje-MQvh38UWjmsWvGCJYrxFx0wivMCzDscSHy42D0drOlh3u5uWDQkKy77w4AdLzcfWVyVmDE9CxKlWjMmU0tiKXoFtVNBT83V-M4gZ5zi-bNwIN5rpbNQVhfH6Jb5YbHYWuqeIu0T4pnneYeSMR963GZlJgAmHwbUEZ_vR2Dbt84epu80U%3D)
|
Peter,

My name is Mark Lamb - I’m a husband, father, God-fearing American, and proud Sheriff of Pinal County in the great state of Arizona.

**Washington needs a new Sheriff in town, which is why today I am announcing my candidacy for the United States Senate and[hope you will become one of my campaign’s first official supporters.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9915df7d110b425bbc1b74e4cd4cad36&_e=-AiZM6eHUnQckLJ-I867QIlXtUbWp9jforKvFrVVTylVJIO3s3nXu0-CTdgCkq2pHjqSFGHC0gYS0T-V3SomI7yy2ZoNQccTIqfNBcza9bhQF3OcJ4fEB4houZRblpY8eWbK1Jkj-iNrMh69RXY2AonF2HTV3LD66m9mQa9W2RJpI-yMacMVhMs7rnc2xJdH8iPoypLdZUUPn4R-jh62PXYloBd8nHgGgJjKnUeRfN8hao8vM3-Z_9qWje-MQvh3FVXP0VF3duAFNXzbySwa6Q7okwlypXdVJJ_9J4yvaa7tiFa00eGRZhUh1YbxtCI1RPoNkLugMQbT5ARTA7xg7QNOPwRxaemwSMBIVa2NsYt_PJ6Nj8_dfyuRSdeH9crp7YeUGiV0P9dojBTTQJaPQ2xVIF34VlDiwLWpco3i9LU%3D)**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9915df7d110b425bbc1b74e4cd4cad36&_e=-AiZM6eHUnQckLJ-I867QIlXtUbWp9jforKvFrVVTylVJIO3s3nXu0-CTdgCkq2pHjqSFGHC0gYS0T-V3SomI7yy2ZoNQccTIqfNBcza9bhQF3OcJ4fEB4houZRblpY8eWbK1Jkj-iNrMh69RXY2AonF2HTV3LD66m9mQa9W2RJpI-yMacMVhMs7rnc2xJdH8iPoypLdZUUPn4R-jh62PXYloBd8nHgGgJjKnUeRfN8hao8vM3-Z_9qWje-MQvh3i7gjV9TkqdumAOWNjkgtrBx0_xNqlmRwaFKyGqCfUEITxQSqLxwR0jU5xMGnEMDehExi2o6OFVQO1pwOz7nyouf-suMNtMgkfpGv5gAEGABn8wqCkQZTXF3CKDEsaivFVIIJw4QtIg3G6Q3NAiyJK0yB1-sY4vtZ8pCSPTtIDmQ%3D)
[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9915df7d110b425bbc1b74e4cd4cad36&_e=-AiZM6eHUnQckLJ-I867QIlXtUbWp9jforKvFrVVTylVJIO3s3nXu0-CTdgCkq2pHjqSFGHC0gYS0T-V3SomI7yy2ZoNQccTIqfNBcza9bhQF3OcJ4fEB4houZRblpY8eWbK1Jkj-iNrMh69RXY2AonF2HTV3LD66m9mQa9W2RJpI-yMacMVhMs7rnc2xJdH8iPoypLdZUUPn4R-jh62PXYloBd8nHgGgJjKnUeRfN8hao8vM3-Z_9qWje-MQvh3JlO4s48gQFdcSMsLIICuDDDtGI0Eomo8VWa_uAcZpZdjBl-dXvGfnHv5hMC4ASma0kbujIlBrBHOwM7nssgSS4jRXjKhhJ3nTqwf4eeJnqKvZk6Bj30tDebBHfe2O22I-1NcoFXCuKrRI1W6MUfand68WJz7PlEao606MI6ZVpQ%3D)

Our sliver of Arizona is home to more than 420,000 Americans spread out over 5,000+ square miles; the place we call home is a vast and arid sundrenched landscape that also happens to be on the frontlines of several conflicts. **Not only are we fighting a war on illegal narcotics, but we’re also simultaneously fighting an immigration battle.**

As the top law-enforcement officer in the area I’m responsible for the safety and wellbeing of every man, woman, and child who calls this place home. Unlike most of the career politicians in Washington, D.C., and in Phoenix, I know that in Pinal County, the buck stops with me - _**that’s why I take my job so seriously.**_

Like so many Americans, our family has experienced deep loss over the last couple of years. We lost our son and our one-year-old granddaughter eight days before Christmas. **There is simply no pain that compares to losing a child, let alone a grandbaby.** During my son’s life, he struggled with drug addiction; he even spent time in my jail for using fentanyl.

As a result of my personal loss and the tragedy I see play out every day as Sheriff, I am hyper-aware that families across Arizona and America have been adversely affected by rising crime and drug use in our communities.

**[That is why today I’m announcing my candidacy for the United States Senate to level up my fight for Arizona families and yours in our nation’s Capitol.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9915df7d110b425bbc1b74e4cd4cad36&_e=-AiZM6eHUnQckLJ-I867QIlXtUbWp9jforKvFrVVTylVJIO3s3nXu0-CTdgCkq2pHjqSFGHC0gYS0T-V3SomI7yy2ZoNQccTIqfNBcza9bhQF3OcJ4fEB4houZRblpY8eWbK1Jkj-iNrMh69RXY2AonF2HTV3LD66m9mQa9W2RJpI-yMacMVhMs7rnc2xJdH8iPoypLdZUUPn4R-jh62PXYloBd8nHgGgJjKnUeRfN8hao8vM3-Z_9qWje-MQvh36-NYUlypelCXb-V6N8Kr8UEIGUhgUz9twgHrxrzPEy1A8UDBu-AoQiQq_dSq3Vjri4rtXNhFXyCITem5CW3WvnvAw6QMhwqYO0f8X98eFgUJZt9bRJfwDla-pGuvaUC4n54gBBogBQZKXhrhWlNIhyw0AXpjz_foNuSnKU7cRcc%3D)**

[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9915df7d110b425bbc1b74e4cd4cad36&_e=-AiZM6eHUnQckLJ-I867QIlXtUbWp9jforKvFrVVTylVJIO3s3nXu0-CTdgCkq2pHjqSFGHC0gYS0T-V3SomI7yy2ZoNQccTIqfNBcza9bhQF3OcJ4fEB4houZRblpY8eWbK1Jkj-iNrMh69RXY2AonF2HTV3LD66m9mQa9W2RJpI-yMacMVhMs7rnc2xJdH8iPoypLdZUUPn4R-jh62PXYloBd8nHgGgJjKnUeRfN8hao8vM3-Z_9qWje-MQvh3Kx3q5yuZm0OQJUcINTrz63R595QvtBTDxF69B3jENEEn_xO1KjiO8IXNB7ImiLOHgoe4JQKrrCD-x01WP7aKz0QMojiUWMz2o7rPfZq7AeXCAsTSPEnoY2QrEaNRSnQVBWSknjtVkdnPvxPFgFdSPATspt4JPFmiLfhHkb5hKaE%3D)

I can talk about personal responsibility all day long, but what’s the point if I’m not willing to **step up and speak out** against the failure of career politicians in Washington who are too politically correct to protect us?

Not only did I have to witness my son’s incarceration in one of my jails, but I have personally **carried dead bodies from our communities’ ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers.**

Each day that I get up and put my Sheriff’s badge on, I remind myself that I’m no better than any man or woman who works for me; I have been - _and continue to be_ - on the front lines of the opioid epidemic and the border fight.

To find out more about my candidacy, **[sign up for our campaign emails here.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9915df7d110b425bbc1b74e4cd4cad36&_e=-AiZM6eHUnQckLJ-I867QIlXtUbWp9jforKvFrVVTylVJIO3s3nXu0-CTdgCkq2pHjqSFGHC0gYS0T-V3SomI7yy2ZoNQccTIqfNBcza9bhQF3OcJ4fEB4houZRblpY8eWbK1Jkj-iNrMh69RXY2AonF2HTV3LD66m9mQa9W2RJpI-yMacMVhMs7rnc2xJdH8iPoypLdZUUPn4R-jh62PXYloBd8nHgGgJjKnUeRfN8hao8vM3-Z_9qWje-MQvh301HTL4l9bRwiMLFETHgGI8lbwx1wzL-fOev9d1eh0SYyeiQVnwyeY8lkctHqSnSEJQstuICZd6oIqkup4c0AGRqoc-cJ7HeM3bFXiKnhTrHVigch1xvWUvMLHU4s-QLY_skKLbQuN9LpyDDtxBVT62SpEg2ipveg13RYZl1apYk%3D)**

In my capacity as the Sheriff of Arizona’s third most populous county, I demand excellence from myself and everyone under my command. It’s our DUTY to provide protection to the people we serve, along with an unwavering commitment to the communities under our jurisdiction.

I may currently have a big job title, **but I have even more responsibility.**

**When cartel violence spills over the border into our communities, my team is responsible for holding the thugs perpetrating the crimes in our communities accountable.**

**And when domestic violence allegations are made, my team is responsible for bringing justice to the victims.**

I was raised with a deep sense of personal responsibility that has remained with me throughout my life. Today in the United States of America, it seems to me that personal responsibility has come to be seen by many as a liability rather than an asset.

**[I’ll stand up to the woke left and the weak political establishment in Washington.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9915df7d110b425bbc1b74e4cd4cad36&_e=-AiZM6eHUnQckLJ-I867QIlXtUbWp9jforKvFrVVTylVJIO3s3nXu0-CTdgCkq2pHjqSFGHC0gYS0T-V3SomI7yy2ZoNQccTIqfNBcza9bhQF3OcJ4fEB4houZRblpY8eWbK1Jkj-iNrMh69RXY2AonF2HTV3LD66m9mQa9W2RJpI-yMacMVhMs7rnc2xJdH8iPoypLdZUUPn4R-jh62PXYloBd8nHgGgJjKnUeRfN8hao8vM3-Z_9qWje-MQvh3c5ap0nPdB2gygfpgUyczciURDPniN-UIMfTvO6Hh006aSxFSCwRcr6XHxjCUTsGQ2rPjKptYSxmzdNyqFws6TLKGqD9_EOpj1NwqedFsJRh5mVqLnpVMZqMlCH52xw1CT15LyYVm1vuZ_sJp-__4OQWFijXhwe5fxdXGKNPm1KA%3D) **I’ll work 24/7 to do everything in my purview to secure the southern border and provide our law enforcement officers with the resources they need to succeed as our first responders.

[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9915df7d110b425bbc1b74e4cd4cad36&_e=-AiZM6eHUnQckLJ-I867QIlXtUbWp9jforKvFrVVTylVJIO3s3nXu0-CTdgCkq2pHjqSFGHC0gYS0T-V3SomI7yy2ZoNQccTIqfNBcza9bhQF3OcJ4fEB4houZRblpY8eWbK1Jkj-iNrMh69RXY2AonF2HTV3LD66m9mQa9W2RJpI-yMacMVhMs7rnc2xJdH8iPoypLdZUUPn4R-jh62PXYloBd8nHgGgJjKnUeRfN8hao8vM3-Z_9qWje-MQvh3irwq-x8a6zl8h_QmuXmeoAjM3fxag8ej-s2CCUTseDIvxAGw22IXYjKH3kw6tQnJi6BrxodPsufTshff3gs8rnV6KAZWukyPEpcD9R6Y3zpn3K4fYfgORPLsmMlaE59WZ5ZdUwo7hgii18z9Qv6wrqbThl7g2K0yzT_x1ZHTirk%3D)

As sheriff, I understand that the freedoms granted to us by the Constitution to make choices also mean the freedom to make bad choices. **That’s where personal responsibility is important.** There are times when I will have to intervene and voice objections to others in law enforcement who, despite their good intentions to control a situation or public behavior, are attempting to violate the Constitution and an individual’s rights.

Benjamin Franklin famously said, _**“Those who would give up essential liberty to purchase a little temporary safety deserve neither liberty nor safety.”**_

Pinal County, Arizona voters elected me to be their top enforcement official because they know that **[I’m tougher than a $2 dollar steak.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9915df7d110b425bbc1b74e4cd4cad36&_e=-AiZM6eHUnQckLJ-I867QIlXtUbWp9jforKvFrVVTylVJIO3s3nXu0-CTdgCkq2pHjqSFGHC0gYS0T-V3SomI7yy2ZoNQccTIqfNBcza9bhQF3OcJ4fEB4houZRblpY8eWbK1Jkj-iNrMh69RXY2AonF2HTV3LD66m9mQa9W2RJpI-yMacMVhMs7rnc2xJdH8iPoypLdZUUPn4R-jh62PXYloBd8nHgGgJjKnUeRfN8hao8vM3-Z_9qWje-MQvh3r9EQACrH0mg42DY8l60vZiylvavfPuUiOw-vK0eyNSXy_ykx-gDqwohdXdKRLaJol3vc5nx_g2ErlUyKPFj3YH9MsghoboE3GqbX3VoBH0hULkBzxMB7OS9nzFcTXEkMNtoCO8KSdZ0eohYqYVrex_f7Me4WNmMg88d-PtXlobU%3D)** Right now, Washington desperately needs someone who isn’t afraid to tell it how it is or to get their hands dirty. I feel strongly that the Constitution must be protected**,a fight I will proudly continue as your next Senator in Washington.**

The voters who gave me the use of the sheriff’s badge that I wear on my lapel know that the only interest I have in elected office is their safety. _**For me, my community and family are everything.**_

Thank you,
