clean_body: I have personally carried dead bodies from our communities’ ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers. | | Peter, My name is Mark Lamb - I’m a husband, father, God-fearing American, and proud Sheriff of Pinal County in the great state of Arizona. Washington needs a new Sheriff in town, which is why today I am announcing my candidacy for the United States Senate and Our sliver of Arizona is home to more than 420,000 Americans spread out over 5,000+ square miles; the place we call home is a vast and arid sundrenched landscape that also happens to be on the frontlines of several conflicts. Not only are we fighting a war on illegal narcotics, but we’re also simultaneously fighting an immigration battle. As the top law-enforcement officer in the area I’m responsible for the safety and wellbeing of every man, woman, and child who calls this place home. Unlike most of the career politicians in Washington, D.C., and in Phoenix, I know that in Pinal County, the buck stops with me - that’s why I take my job so seriously. Like so many Americans, our family has experienced deep loss over the last couple of years. We lost our son and our one-year-old granddaughter eight days before Christmas. There is simply no pain that compares to losing a child, let alone a grandbaby. During my son’s life, he struggled with drug addiction; he even spent time in my jail for using fentanyl. As a result of my personal loss and the tragedy I see play out every day as Sheriff, I am hyper-aware that families across Arizona and America have been adversely affected by rising crime and drug use in our communities. I can talk about personal responsibility all day long, but what’s the point if I’m not willing to step up and speak out against the failure of career politicians in Washington who are too politically correct to protect us? Not only did I have to witness my son’s incarceration in one of my jails, but I have personally carried dead bodies from our communities’ ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers. Each day that I get up and put my Sheriff’s badge on, I remind myself that I’m no better than any man or woman who works for me; I have been - and continue to be - on the front lines of the opioid epidemic and the border fight. To find out more about my candidacy, In my capacity as the Sheriff of Arizona’s third most populous county, I demand excellence from myself and everyone under my command. It’s our DUTY to provide protection to the people we serve, along with an unwavering commitment to the communities under our jurisdiction. I may currently have a big job title, but I have even more responsibility. When cartel violence spills over the border into our communities, my team is responsible for holding the thugs perpetrating the crimes in our communities accountable. And when domestic violence allegations are made, my team is responsible for bringing justice to the victims. I was raised with a deep sense of personal responsibility that has remained with me throughout my life. Today in the United States of America, it seems to me that personal responsibility has come to be seen by many as a liability rather than an asset. I’ll work 24/7 to do everything in my purview to secure the southern border and provide our law enforcement officers with the resources they need to succeed as our first responders. As sheriff, I understand that the freedoms granted to us by the Constitution to make choices also mean the freedom to make bad choices. That’s where personal responsibility is important. There are times when I will have to intervene and voice objections to others in law enforcement who, despite their good intentions to control a situation or public behavior, are attempting to violate the Constitution and an individual’s rights. Benjamin Franklin famously said, “Those who would give up essential liberty to purchase a little temporary safety deserve neither liberty nor safety.” Pinal County, Arizona voters elected me to be their top enforcement official because they know that Right now, Washington desperately needs someone who isn’t afraid to tell it how it is or to get their hands dirty. I feel strongly that the Constitution must be protected,a fight I will proudly continue as your next Senator in Washington. The voters who gave me the use of the sheriff’s badge that I wear on my lapel know that the only interest I have in elected office is their safety. For me, my community and family are everything. Thank you, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb: | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year. | Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Mark Lamb - I’m a husband, father, God-fearing American, and proud Sheriff of Pinal County in the great state of Arizona.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e02e5f8eb3244d4ca6300c61ef7724b7&_e=qXJapnBQFGwb6lBGiorW3F9Zn0hYMxFe09hy2evJjNr9EZQNdoobwP0fwr4O1FVycF0igJ8LRd7pLSne1_wgrlcZOS-lSdJdfmP3YwDl0feKM-h9sN1eTp9V-gdwsoeTtHGPwlTm9mB1twic2Wq4rxYS32dwyoAaiwXaqNsimLElBq4CGvTKb_zMkhiswo7U0E8JQGJS4Dl3XDtS2D09I57BCVHXlqbxV-7Zpw6ccd9W7EA_bxAzjIt9xKZiUFJk0bk39XEivuN1A9D7neaMfCYREO87QEGCQA30ilV2s6gi9FRx_rBgo7j2SznR8E7PGv3pCmDCcC4pCkLABDJICKuBEApFJXIQMv1ZrzwvOXbL5ilESR-BufHGsdTRlBq_24cIcpKnRIkwkuUwLVNrFg%3D%3D)

Our sliver of Arizona is home to more than 420,000 Americans spread out over 5,000+ square miles; the place we call home is a vast and arid sundrenched landscape that also happens to be on the frontlines of several conflicts. **Not only are we fighting a war on illegal narcotics, but we’re also simultaneously fighting an immigration battle.**

As the top law-enforcement officer in the area I’m responsible for the safety and wellbeing of every man, woman, and child who calls this place home. Unlike most of the career politicians in Washington, D.C., and in Phoenix, I know that in Pinal County, the buck stops with me - _**that’s why I take my job so seriously.**_

Like so many Americans, our family has experienced deep loss over the last couple of years. We lost our son and our one-year-old granddaughter eight days before Christmas. **There is simply no pain that compares to losing a child, let alone a grandbaby.** During my son’s life, he struggled with drug addiction; he even spent time in my jail for using fentanyl.

As a result of my personal loss and the tragedy I see play out every day as Sheriff, I am hyper-aware that families across Arizona and America have been adversely affected by rising crime and drug use in our communities.

**[That is why today I’m announcing my candidacy for the United States Senate to level up my fight for Arizona families and yours in our nation’s Capitol.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e02e5f8eb3244d4ca6300c61ef7724b7&_e=qXJapnBQFGwb6lBGiorW3F9Zn0hYMxFe09hy2evJjNr9EZQNdoobwP0fwr4O1FVycF0igJ8LRd7pLSne1_wgrlcZOS-lSdJdfmP3YwDl0feKM-h9sN1eTp9V-gdwsoeTtHGPwlTm9mB1twic2Wq4rxYS32dwyoAaiwXaqNsimLElBq4CGvTKb_zMkhiswo7U0E8JQGJS4Dl3XDtS2D09I57BCVHXlqbxV-7Zpw6ccd9W7EA_bxAzjIt9xKZiUFJk_gw-fmUHGKIV7yZl8UXnjspUq_ULF37BAFncWjSyf3x5PuGjovnu3OgNXWH0emzrm6i6oIOv66bBqDDn2BwlH4s5iWKEFsYvqvR41u1asp6T_qwuP1hzyALs4sFgwIzAt0eW30o9gwXo6AAZTeJQ2A%3D%3D)**

[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e02e5f8eb3244d4ca6300c61ef7724b7&_e=qXJapnBQFGwb6lBGiorW3F9Zn0hYMxFe09hy2evJjNr9EZQNdoobwP0fwr4O1FVycF0igJ8LRd7pLSne1_wgrlcZOS-lSdJdfmP3YwDl0feKM-h9sN1eTp9V-gdwsoeTtHGPwlTm9mB1twic2Wq4rxYS32dwyoAaiwXaqNsimLElBq4CGvTKb_zMkhiswo7U0E8JQGJS4Dl3XDtS2D09I57BCVHXlqbxV-7Zpw6ccd9W7EA_bxAzjIt9xKZiUFJk2Ukcs8Zx0lcx3Zt87--6A-HZkQzxTXlV0A1Bz2IGCjT4iWAvwumQADTPWvrjr-XApQbQceEizo0HQRF7TJI58W4Cj883ZLpFcUCgpHhTkn9jKnR7-lAAo0mLO7QJxYpma635eLpVyA1xMHZ27qfE3A%3D%3D)

I can talk about personal responsibility all day long, but what’s the point if I’m not willing to **step up and speak out** against the failure of career politicians in Washington who are too politically correct to protect us?

Not only did I have to witness my son’s incarceration in one of my jails, but I have personally **carried dead bodies from our communities’ ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers.**

Each day that I get up and put my Sheriff’s badge on, I remind myself that I’m no better than any man or woman who works for me; I have been - _and continue to be_ - on the front lines of the opioid epidemic and the border fight.

To find out more about my candidacy, **[sign up for our campaign emails here.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e02e5f8eb3244d4ca6300c61ef7724b7&_e=qXJapnBQFGwb6lBGiorW3F9Zn0hYMxFe09hy2evJjNr9EZQNdoobwP0fwr4O1FVycF0igJ8LRd7pLSne1_wgrlcZOS-lSdJdfmP3YwDl0feKM-h9sN1eTp9V-gdwsoeTtHGPwlTm9mB1twic2Wq4rxYS32dwyoAaiwXaqNsimLElBq4CGvTKb_zMkhiswo7U0E8JQGJS4Dl3XDtS2D09I57BCVHXlqbxV-7Zpw6ccd9W7EA_bxAzjIt9xKZiUFJkHEcxe0OXtclNQ4Oy3-leM7PByqIbKlEEUY4wPwR3xa6kql5UC75gw728q8NiVQVGNQjDQPBydy6cqW9cgROeaRYpv4FJ2DYjbxdj4XdKJGkUdoDXj73pLMJrqUO2aNZiiWLhow5MmD0oZr2_mLst6Q%3D%3D)**

In my capacity as the Sheriff of Arizona’s third most populous county, I demand excellence from myself and everyone under my command. It’s our DUTY to provide protection to the people we serve, along with an unwavering commitment to the communities under our jurisdiction.

I may currently have a big job title, **but I have even more responsibility.**

**When cartel violence spills over the border into our communities, my team is responsible for holding the thugs perpetrating the crimes in our communities accountable.**

**And when domestic violence allegations are made, my team is responsible for bringing justice to the victims.**

I was raised with a deep sense of personal responsibility that has remained with me throughout my life. Today in the United States of America, it seems to me that personal responsibility has come to be seen by many as a liability rather than an asset.

**[I’ll stand up to the woke left and the weak political establishment in Washington.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e02e5f8eb3244d4ca6300c61ef7724b7&_e=qXJapnBQFGwb6lBGiorW3F9Zn0hYMxFe09hy2evJjNr9EZQNdoobwP0fwr4O1FVycF0igJ8LRd7pLSne1_wgrlcZOS-lSdJdfmP3YwDl0feKM-h9sN1eTp9V-gdwsoeTtHGPwlTm9mB1twic2Wq4rxYS32dwyoAaiwXaqNsimLElBq4CGvTKb_zMkhiswo7U0E8JQGJS4Dl3XDtS2D09I57BCVHXlqbxV-7Zpw6ccd9W7EA_bxAzjIt9xKZiUFJk93eT4yw8aU2twU6XDP_l1Y8sXXjU5sfjAmIcqE_kxAE_6ne7RvkTLQHzac4wuZ-59o6HU1Y2D8H08pHzcYVDSvo8MDqLoRJPE_QnFUHRKJvkPWSmeFBhMHjfE_-QSQilIT25nfmMwIzPP20WYJiVFA%3D%3D) **I’ll work 24/7 to do everything in my purview to secure the southern border and provide our law enforcement officers with the resources they need to succeed as our first responders.

[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e02e5f8eb3244d4ca6300c61ef7724b7&_e=qXJapnBQFGwb6lBGiorW3F9Zn0hYMxFe09hy2evJjNr9EZQNdoobwP0fwr4O1FVycF0igJ8LRd7pLSne1_wgrlcZOS-lSdJdfmP3YwDl0feKM-h9sN1eTp9V-gdwsoeTtHGPwlTm9mB1twic2Wq4rxYS32dwyoAaiwXaqNsimLElBq4CGvTKb_zMkhiswo7U0E8JQGJS4Dl3XDtS2D09I57BCVHXlqbxV-7Zpw6ccd9W7EA_bxAzjIt9xKZiUFJkTzNMCRcevv3wrNcXEPlAAxSSiIXC32VQ8iY1EmFbyD6FZb30yuveVGhRwufy1ocCi910V-4YflQKl8KTtvae3vGN5w6SBNzGauCxCq469_ERjavNbSt9y0_jIFQaL9dQidRlUAQrVh3coCPiHztmxg%3D%3D)

As sheriff, I understand that the freedoms granted to us by the Constitution to make choices also mean the freedom to make bad choices. **That’s where personal responsibility is important.** There are times when I will have to intervene and voice objections to others in law enforcement who, despite their good intentions to control a situation or public behavior, are attempting to violate the Constitution and an individual’s rights.

Benjamin Franklin famously said, _**“Those who would give up essential liberty to purchase a little temporary safety deserve neither liberty nor safety.”**_

Pinal County, Arizona voters elected me to be their top enforcement official because they know that **[I’m tougher than a $2 dollar steak.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e02e5f8eb3244d4ca6300c61ef7724b7&_e=qXJapnBQFGwb6lBGiorW3F9Zn0hYMxFe09hy2evJjNr9EZQNdoobwP0fwr4O1FVycF0igJ8LRd7pLSne1_wgrlcZOS-lSdJdfmP3YwDl0feKM-h9sN1eTp9V-gdwsoeTtHGPwlTm9mB1twic2Wq4rxYS32dwyoAaiwXaqNsimLElBq4CGvTKb_zMkhiswo7U0E8JQGJS4Dl3XDtS2D09I57BCVHXlqbxV-7Zpw6ccd9W7EA_bxAzjIt9xKZiUFJkx3fVq2HoO6AE-o77KNR6As12ZR178Tdi01OkI2h_IgJcUViPh4gPS1rjUzSuL1t6Q4zqrdQkhrPckrma73t4LivMwdIGwHz4vNbLuQ25yvS3iJplUlPESuPWvEJPCTgpOLytMMN648-wML30pAt7MQ%3D%3D)** Right now, Washington desperately needs someone who isn’t afraid to tell it how it is or to get their hands dirty. I feel strongly that the Constitution must be protected**,a fight I will proudly continue as your next Senator in Washington.**

The voters who gave me the use of the sheriff’s badge that I wear on my lapel know that the only interest I have in elected office is their safety. _**For me, my community and family are everything.**_

Thank you,

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e02e5f8eb3244d4ca6300c61ef7724b7&_e=qXJapnBQFGwb6lBGiorW3F9Zn0hYMxFe09hy2evJjNr9EZQNdoobwP0fwr4O1FVycF0igJ8LRd7pLSne1_wgrlcZOS-lSdJdfmP3YwDl0feKM-h9sN1eTp9V-gdwsoeTtHGPwlTm9mB1twic2Wq4rxYS32dwyoAaiwXaqNsimLElBq4CGvTKb_zMkhiswo7U0E8JQGJS4Dl3XDtS2D09I57BCVHXlqbxV-7Zpw6ccd9W7EA_bxAzjIt9xKZiUFJk_mCEpnBCUSfGl1ct88_eQI3qLzM_gZKnrNu_DcnB3iQsE3hutcYjU-GgmaVw_qmbonghINbS2wxgoSgO2NrN1tpR8bjWCVCpp9bq7-lRMhZt1D0EXTdo_7_KXM_WtXcPYbMH4DALiLwI0N87mc_i8A%3D%3D)

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

clean_body: I have personally carried dead bodies from our communities’ ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers. | | Fellow Conservative, My name is Mark Lamb - I’m a husband, father, God-fearing American, and proud Sheriff of Pinal County in the great state of Arizona. Washington needs a new Sheriff in town, which is why I am announcing my candidacy for the United States Senate and Our sliver of Arizona is home to more than 420,000 Americans spread out over 5,000+ square miles; the place we call home is a vast and arid sundrenched landscape that also happens to be on the frontlines of several conflicts. Not only are we fighting a war on illegal narcotics, but we’re also simultaneously fighting an immigration battle. As the top law-enforcement officer in the area I’m responsible for the safety and wellbeing of every man, woman, and child who calls this place home. Unlike most of the career politicians in Washington, D.C., and in Phoenix, I know that in Pinal County, the buck stops with me - that’s why I take my job so seriously. Like so many Americans, our family has experienced deep loss over the last couple of years. We lost our son and our one-year-old granddaughter eight days before Christmas. There is simply no pain that compares to losing a child, let alone a grandbaby. During my son’s life, he struggled with drug addiction; he even spent time in my jail for using fentanyl. As a result of my personal loss and the tragedy I see play out every day as Sheriff, I am hyper-aware that families across Arizona and America have been adversely affected by rising crime and drug use in our communities. I can talk about personal responsibility all day long, but what’s the point if I’m not willing to step up and speak out against the failure of career politicians in Washington who are too politically correct to protect us? Not only did I have to witness my son’s incarceration in one of my jails, but I have personally carried dead bodies from our communities’ ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers. Each day that I get up and put my Sheriff’s badge on, I remind myself that I’m no better than any man or woman who works for me; I have been - and continue to be - on the front lines of the opioid epidemic and the border fight. To find out more about my candidacy, In my capacity as the Sheriff of Arizona’s third most populous county, I demand excellence from myself and everyone under my command. It’s our DUTY to provide protection to the people we serve, along with an unwavering commitment to the communities under our jurisdiction. I may currently have a big job title, but I have even more responsibility. When cartel violence spills over the border into our communities, my team is responsible for holding the thugs perpetrating the crimes in our communities accountable. And when domestic violence allegations are made, my team is responsible for bringing justice to the victims. I was raised with a deep sense of personal responsibility that has remained with me throughout my life. Today in the United States of America, it seems to me that personal responsibility has come to be seen by many as a liability rather than an asset. I’ll work 24/7 to do everything in my purview to secure the southern border and provide our law enforcement officers with the resources they need to succeed as our first responders. As sheriff, I understand that the freedoms granted to us by the Constitution to make choices also mean the freedom to make bad choices. That’s where personal responsibility is important. There are times when I will have to intervene and voice objections to others in law enforcement who, despite their good intentions to control a situation or public behavior, are attempting to violate the Constitution and an individual’s rights. Benjamin Franklin famously said, “Those who would give up essential liberty to purchase a little temporary safety deserve neither liberty nor safety.” Pinal County, Arizona voters elected me to be their top enforcement official because they know that Right now, Washington desperately needs someone who isn’t afraid to tell it how it is or to get their hands dirty. I feel strongly that the Constitution must be protected,a fight I will proudly continue as your next Senator in Washington. The voters who gave me the use of the sheriff’s badge that I wear on my lapel know that the only interest I have in elected office is their safety. For me, my community and family are everything. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Do you support raising the minimum wage?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
| | |
---
I've said it before and I'll say it again, friend: If you love your country, you fight for the people who make it work.
Unfortunately, too many Washington politicians don't understand – or refuse to acknowledge – this simple idea. In the last 40 years, corporate profits and salaries of those at the very top have _skyrocketed,_ but the federal minimum wage is just $7.25.
**It’s long past time that we recognize the dignity of work in our country – and **raising the minimum wage is a critical step.
**That's why I'm fighting as hard as I can in the Senate to advocate for fair compensation, overtime pay, and a higher minimum wage – but to make these values a reality, I need to know that this team is with me. I'm counting on 27 more folks to respond to my live poll before midnight – including you, friend. So please, tell me right now:**
| | **Do you support raising the minimum wage?**

| **Sen. Jacky Rosen OFFICIALLY launches first reelection campaign – in a top race that could decide Senate control!**

Peter, with _FiveThirtyEight_ predicting that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, all eyes are on us to defend this must-win battleground seat.

**Here’s the problem:** Experts at _The Washington Post_ are calling Jacky one of the most vulnerable senators in the entire country. And now, the GOP is coming after her as a TOP target for defeat.

National Republicans wasted no time before launching attack ads against us, so it couldn’t be more urgent to fight back immediately. We’ve defied the odds before in Nevada, and we can do it again – **but not without a surge of grassroots support.**

**We’re still waiting for another 4,282 grassroots supporters to become Founding Donors of our reelection campaign before midnight – so please, Peter:**

It's Tim Scott.

I'm really glad you chose to open this email so I'll cut right to the chase: **I just launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee.**
I believe in securing the border.
I believe in election integrity.
I believe in parental rights.
I believe in supporting our brave law enforcement.
**And I believe that with faith and conservative values, this country 's best days are ahead of us.**

---
| | | [SUPPORT TIM SCOTT HERE](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1acd8f1637374984a0a7af179a672d91&_e=PseGL4MX0901Oth2EZFkSv9ZoSaWlJaf98XpWDYv6HOQWybVMz6tU3kQzA2a7WmtSJjzDSYC9yv1qeUgg0AieJ4olwwcxyFgVjgkF9xEmYhQUayxyZUg05AfeByrXwXOrRIKlYzROsgz2pRpxFCFoHAJkCOBA_e5NbMEeHLz7RYf2W8Ob0BOEbowSjuL3hIPz4xJPNSVpINYA6FVwPN0Rf57J8v3gLGi5387zPdzVN_DjiYi9lIk1vEW8kSlN_7AD04abdBmdHqPQiHAOCQMfn-AATsI_YB3W9qjy5qhTWkGrsEcos6oy0lXA-2PdsyBRdLAWvOBZOySTa2ePp-8GbQjNJucauhNv8XYbcoSK3Dsv8Xuf9_ADnGeeNAi2Os7 "SUPPORT TIM SCOTT HERE")

Here's the deal, my faith is the central pillar of my life. It's what guides me through my day. Without God in my life, I would have no purpose and that's why I need your help to restore faith to our nation's values.

I can't stress enough that I can't do this alone. Polls show Americans are losing faith and if we don't take action right now, it could be gone forever. But I won't allow this and I certainly hope you will not either.

_**[So, if you agree with me that we can attain a better tomorrow and are determined to ensure the future of our country is rooted in conservative values, then I'm humbly asking you to be one of the first donors to my Presidential Exploratory Committee Fund. Can I count on you?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1acd8f1637374984a0a7af179a672d91&_e=PseGL4MX0901Oth2EZFkSv9ZoSaWlJaf98XpWDYv6HOQWybVMz6tU3kQzA2a7WmtSJjzDSYC9yv1qeUgg0AieJ4olwwcxyFgVjgkF9xEmYhQUayxyZUg05AfeByrXwXOrRIKlYzROsgz2pRpxFCFoHAJkCOBA_e5NbMEeHLz7RYf2W8Ob0BOEbowSjuL3hIPz4xJPNSVpINYA6FVwPN0Rf57J8v3gLGi5387zPdzVN-VTtlme5iAbqs2w6BlsuXVWRUn281j05dprOCantViwB-P0kxQHRFUvrekS6Io-Qmn7YXgP7vIBDweR_lFs6bYgOo1aAKrINmhYoF4kJqB6ZP6JHOEQJW4V66TlZjduIBtvfeQIYXfwc7frRRoX_5S "So, if you agree with me that we can attain a better tomorrow and are determined to ensure the future of our country is rooted in conservative values, then I’m humbly asking you to be one of the first donors to my Presidential Exploratory Committee Fund. I just launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee, and I couldn't be more excited to hit the ground and listen to more Americans about their concerns, worries, fears, and priorities.

But the truth is, accomplishing our goal isn't cheap. _**[So today, I'm humbly asking if you could please chip in $5, $10, $25, or anything you can afford to help my team and I keep trying to restore FAITH in America.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1acd8f1637374984a0a7af179a672d91&_e=EMtXlX8_XwsKwqylJ2nVQaZogfaDhwjpzgKqFak-bdhWgAYnRnziCigRypHA1WHExZeEHE1aDDkKol_H6ANG4tvzFkq_Ni7RE0VNzL5Iay-ar5uznBnuVI3euYiUsXHazMKcOLChnvcXyPRIJM7BDFp8AJht-ScBU4glJFCwiAodAQmneKxH4RLtVsDq17-FgDFZVQC_HuYoRADu1H0Q5KzGhvZ3T6fX0pqgoKJA5rr5wV4GZy8jIEdZcbL-WCxnfvcuJVCOa7FqI8KRpvc7RG1YAwpc0P0vq1bJiVMRGUuSXMnAIqOPOQhurwS0Co14SDQxxJvHFzSAYEmrw0iryxPmxqCDELnbs3-ZsCH7CI5B2LS4-JgdXgHMEyj745Bq "So today, I’m humbly asking if you could please chip in $5, $10, $25, or anything you can afford to help my team and I keep trying to restore FAITH in America.")**_ I believe our best days are ahead of us, but I can't do this alone. I was raised in a single-parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13. **I understand the value of a dollar.**

I don't take asking for money lightly. I know that every donation made is a sacrifice, and I am forever grateful for each and every gift.

I'm really glad you chose to open this email so I'll cut right to the chase: I just launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee. I believe in securing the border. I believe in election integrity. See below: | But, patriots like you collectively helped raise our campaign $1,646,622 in response to the Fake News’ censorship. When will the Democrats ever learn that all of their dirty tactics backfire on them? They impeach me.I shoot up in the polls. They arrest me.I shoot up in the polls – and we raise almost $15 million. They censor me. We raise $1.6 million. The MAGA movement is the most resilient movement in history. And it’s because it’s fueled by patriots like YOU who truly love our country. There’s NOTHING more powerful than that. | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: Mon, Apr 10, 2023 Subject: We were CENSORED on national TV To: <test@test.com> | Friend, During my National Address on the night of my arrest, Fake News ABC BLURRED OUT the cell phone code on my podium used to bring in donations to our campaign. See it for yourself: | The Fake News is FURIOUS that our campaign has raised a RECORD amount of money ever since I was indicted – so now they’re shamefully trying to OBSTRUCT our historic flow of grassroots donations. Don’t let them get away with it! Let’s prove that their despicable tactics BACKFIRED with another surge of grassroots contributions. Interestingly, the SAME NETWORK did NOT blur out Biden’s donation code... | Is this not ELECTION INTERFERENCE? But, Friend, even despite the most egregious acts of election interference from the Fake News, the legal system, and the Deep State, I have no doubt that we will prevail and MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. body:
Did you hear? The 2024 Democratic National Convention will be held in Chicago next August, and you (and a friend!) can enter to win a chance to join Democrats from across the country in the Windy City. | |
---
Did you hear, Derek? **The 2024 Democratic National Convention will be held in Chicago next August, and you can enter to win a chance to join Democrats from across the country in the Windy City.** The winner will get two tickets to the convention (bring a friend or loved one, Derek!), travel to and from Chicago, and a fully covered hotel stay. Grassroots supporters like you are the heart of our party. In appreciation of all you do, we want every Democrat to have the chance to witness this historic moment in person! [All you have to do to be automatically entered for a chance to win flights, a hotel stay, and convention admission is show your support for Democrats nationwide with a $7 donation today. Your donation will support critical DNC programs that Democrats rely on to compete and win nationwide. ](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJSC5DC8NVH4ZcWJK0Qpif1K-X4XgItH4h00NSdp_micMU27LAzyn0fb4B3eJXSskEYLvdikrO91x1JgzQYNIVk38ia9XtIaHperr-nqWr6icuuBix7a9QxOy6t83ikkFTsbeXRvXt6VHo_jgthCKlSIwarriNfS-LXOOKbN2iQdfQjH7athPBQlLCLrBURLZikulUxPNOYYjKJ88uLk7zV2LSaN3T3gAK2SntaVbvREao57dzTjm8N4mVcj_myyZIrNI9zOBntsx-Qn7II9HnVH6RCOqmX2UEr3o9-SxbcLQDm5nXyyKNcpclYL6fxlSuxeI8RsnuM80WFZHcuUfcL4p_--iMtD16aEkMunPtqUPvTp8DcalJhiYnFKfkCdjFTg9yfZhUhw6l565a03m6h0qYC9Rn3O8DLl7_iu_MgbcFK8LobIRdMJJT3M5nbSdK/3va/dd1Ed0fuRPWZ64Sa-6fu9w/h0/4Beewek8sKqi6sow0_HuiWxNqesryoGRvEKZ0BgIauM)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Alfonso=20For=20Congress?=
subject: Newsletter
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/alfonsoforcongress.com/newsletter?e=16d812e81c)
---
|
---
|
---
# Grassroots, working-class candidate for West Michigan!
Welcome to your political newsletter focused on issues related to water quality, veteran affairs, and social security. As a Marine veteran, you understand the importance of taking care of our nation's resources, including our waterways. Additionally, you have first-hand experience with the struggles and challenges faced by our nation's veterans. Finally, as a Marine veteran, I understand the importance of social security and ensuring that it remains viable for future generations.Water Quality: As a former marine, I know how important it is to protect our waterways. Recent events have highlighted the need for increased attention to this issue, and as your representative, I am committed to working towards solutions that ensure clean and safe water for all Americans. This includes funding for infrastructure improvements, investing in renewable energy sources, and promoting sustainable agriculture practices.Veteran Affairs: I know firsthand how much our veterans have given to our country, and I am committed to ensuring that they receive the support and care they deserve. This includes increasing funding for the Department of Veterans Affairs, improving access to mental health services, and addressing the backlog of disability claims. Additionally, I will work to expand job training and educational opportunities for veterans as they transition back to civilian life.Social Security: Social Security is a crucial safety net for millions of Americans, and it is imperative that we protect and strengthen it for future generations. I will work to ensure that social security remains solvent, including examining options for increasing revenue and exploring ways to make the system more efficient. I will also fight against any efforts to privatize or dismantle social security, which would be a disservice to the hardworking Americans who have paid into the system for their entire lives.Thank you for your service to our country, and I look forward to working with you to address these important issues.Sincerely, Joseph Alfonso

| | | | | |
---
# We have been continuing to grow!
Having a growing team means we are able to reach more and more people in our community. Whether it’s local non-profits, unions, community organizers, local leaders and more we are committed to improving the lives for us all.|
---

| | [SENATE DEFENDERS FUND] The next three days are *huge* in the fight to protect the future of abortion access [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61716985/400932876/1959759072?sourceid=1048903&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjkwYTI1ZC04ZGQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VOUAASYRmkdRIeFJhMqc2IZRG6Zs6MkEoycUev2K8w0=&emci=f190a25d-8dd9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f290a25d-8dd9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) We're running a three-day Senate Defenders fund to help STOP Republicans from controlling Congress with an anti-choice agenda. Are you ready to take a stand, Peter?

**Donate on launch day to help reach our $125,000 goal and support Democratic pro-choice women who can keep anti-choice Republicans OUT of power:**

**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61716986/400932877/1959759072?sourceid=1048903&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjkwYTI1ZC04ZGQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VOUAASYRmkdRIeFJhMqc2IZRG6Zs6MkEoycUev2K8w0=&emci=f190a25d-8dd9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f290a25d-8dd9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** Peter,

By now you likely know that Democrats are defending more than twice as many Senate seats as Republicans this cycle just to maintain our _razor-thin_ 51-49 majority. We know that if Republicans flip the chamber, they WILL pass a national abortion ban _and_ gain the ability to appoint conservative judges across the country who they _know_ will uphold it.

That's why, over the next three days, we're raising $125,000 for our Senate Defenders fund — a fund dedicated to supporting the Democratic pro-choice Senate women who can stop Republicans in their tracks.

[**Donate now (on launch day!) to help hit our ambitious $125,000 goal and pledge your early support for the Democratic pro-choice women on the frontlines of the fight to protect our Senate majority.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61716987/400932878/1959759072?sourceid=1048903&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjkwYTI1ZC04ZGQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VOUAASYRmkdRIeFJhMqc2IZRG6Zs6MkEoycUev2K8w0=&emci=f190a25d-8dd9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f290a25d-8dd9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)

I won't sugarcoat it, Peter: the race to protect our Senate majority will be tough. But we can't lose sight of one key insight from last November: Abortion wins elections. And every candidate we support is a _fierce_ pro-choice champion.

This cycle senators including **Jacky Rosen (NV)** , **Tammy Baldwin (WI)** , and **Mazie Hirono (HI)** will be defending key seats that we cannot afford to lose. Joining the ranks of these unapologetically pro-choice candidates is Rep. **Elissa Slotkin (MI-SEN)** , who's running to hold an open blue seat that will be critical to holding the majority.

Pro-choice women are the voices we need in the fight to defeat anti-choice extremism in the Senate. The 2023-2024 cycle is underway, and this community knows better than anyone that early support in key races can make a _huge_ difference come Election Day. ****So please, donate toward our $125,000 Senate Defenders Fund goal to support the pro-choice women committed to the fight to defend our _razor-thin_ majority and help keep dangerous Republicans out of power:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Senate-Defenders-Fund](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61716994/400932885/1959759072?sourceid=1048903&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjkwYTI1ZC04ZGQ5LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VOUAASYRmkdRIeFJhMqc2IZRG6Zs6MkEoycUev2K8w0=&emci=f190a25d-8dd9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f290a25d-8dd9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**** Thank you,

Jessica Mackler (she/her/hers)
Senior Vice President, Campaigns, EMILYs List

body:
